lines: Uri Uwera Uwera ,Mwami Mana yacu,
Kare mu gitondo tukuririmbire :
Uri umunyambaraga uri umunyebambe;
Uri Ubutatu uri Imana imwe
Uri uwera Uwera; dore abera bose,
baguhimbazanya n'abamalayika,
Tukuramye, Mwami, wahozeho kera,
Kandi uriho, kandi uzahoraho.
Uri Uwera Uwera, kandi ubwiza bwawe
Buruta uko bwarebwa n'abacumuye.
Niwowe wenyine wera urusha bose
Ubuntu no  gutungana kose.
Uri Uwera Uwera, Mwami Mana yacu,
Ibyaremwe byose biragusingiza :
Ur'umunyambarag'ur'umunyebambe:
lngoma yawe ntizahanguka.
Dushim’ Iman' ihoraho Kukw ari Yo yaturemye;
Yatugiriy’imbabazi, Tuyishime, Haleluya.
Iman' ijy'itugabira Ibyiza bidukwiriye :
Abayo bayiringiye Duhora tuyisingiza.
Yemwe ngabo z'Uwiteka, Namwe bamarayika be,
Muhora mu rurembo rwe, Mumuhimbazanye natwe.
Dushim’ Imana y'ubuntu, Tuyishime twebwe twese :
Dushime Data wa twese N'Umwana n'Umwuka Wera.

title: Mwa bari mw isi yose mwe

lines: Mwa bari mw isi yose mwe,Nimuhimbaz' Uwiteka.
Muhore mumukorera, Kukw ibyo bidukwiriye.
Mumenye yuk' Uwiteka Ari we watwiremeye;
Turi n'intama aragira, Tur' izo mu mukumbi we.
Mwinjire mu marembo ye, Mugere no mu rugo rwe,
Muhore mumusingiza, Muhimbaze n'izina rye.
.Umwam' Imana ni mwiza; Imbabazi n'ubuntu bye
Iteka bizaboraho; Mwese mushim’ izina rye.
Dushime cyan'izina ryawe,Yesu mukiza wacu, Tukwimik’utwitegekere
Umwami wacu Yesu Usumba byose.
Mwa bishwe bamubahora mwe, mwishimire mw,ijuru; muhimbaz’uwadupfiriye
namwe rubyaro rw’Adamu mwe, bacunguwe na Yesu, muhimbaza mwese Dawidi.
Abakuwehw’ibyaha twese, twahaw’ubwo buntu bwe, nimuze tumupfukamire.
Mwa bava mu mahanga mwese, nimwumvir’umukiza; ni we mucunguzi w’abantu.
Twifuza cyane gusohora mw’ijur’aho Yes’ari, ngo tumushim’iteka ryose.
Duhimbaz’Uwitek’Imana no kuyisenga. Kukw ari yo yaremy’ibyo mu isi n’iby’ijuru Yesu  mwami wez’imitima yacu Ngo turirimbir’Imana.
Duhimbaz’Uwitek’Imana no kuyisenga  kukw’ijy’itegeka neza  mu bihugu
izaduh’ibidukwiye byose, byose twizer’iri jambo ryayo.
Duhimbaz’uwitek’Imana no kuyisenga yaraturemye; ni yo yaduhay’ubugingo;
iturinda mu byago byacu byose; ni y’itugirir’ubuntu.
Duhimbaz’uwitek’Imana no kuyisenga.Ibihumeka byose bishim’izina
ryayo;Tuyikunde kukw ar’umucyo wacu;Tuyisab’iminsi yose.
Nagir’indim’igihumbi, Na bwo byananira Gusingiz’umucunguzi Ngo mbirangize neza.
Umfashe, Man’ihoraho nkwiz’icyubahiro cy’izina ryiza rya Yesu namamaz’ishimwe rye.
N’izina ridutinyura mu bwoba dufite ;ruhumuriz’ubabaye rikabyuts’uwaguye.
N’ukuri, Yes’ashobora, Gutsembahw ibyaha,Akesh’amaso ye Abacumuye bose.
Gipfamatwi, umva Yesu kiragi ririmba kimug’itere hejuru mpumyi tumbira Yesu.
Dor’abera bo mw ‘ijuru barishimye
cyane Baririmbira Yes’iyi ndirimbo nshya.
Bat’Icyubahiro cyose kib’icya Yesu, Wadunz’akatwuhagiz’amaraso.
Abo bose bari bandujwe n’ibyaha kera none
bambay’imyenday’abakijijwe bat’icyubahiro.
Uwahoz’ar’umugome Yes’amuhindura umutambyi
w’umwami tumusingize tut’icyubahiro.
Iyo Yes’atadukunda turaeozw’ibyaha  tuba twihebye
rwose twakozwa na non’icybahiro nde?
Turirimbire n’aband’uko yadukijije bibareherez’ahw ari,
baririmbe bati ’icyubahiro.
Izina rya Yesu-turaryubaha, Twemer’umukiza-yukw ari’uwiteka Ngo biter’Imana-icyubahiro Kuko Yes’ari we-jambo ry’Imana.
Yesu ni we jambo-ryaremy’iyi, si n’umunsi n’ijoro-n’izuba n’ukwezi n’inyamaswa na zo -n’ibiguruka n’umuntu mw’ishusho - y’uwiteka se.
Yaciye bugufi, - az’ino mw’isi, maz’abanyabyaha - babi baramwica, nubw’afit’izina - ry’icyubahiro, hanyum’arazuka ajya mw’ijuru.
Mwene Dat’ushimwe - iryo  zina rye, wice bugufi - kukw’ari we Mana. N’umukiza wacu - yitw’uwiteka. kokw’izina yiswe - rirahebuje.
None mu mutima - waw’umwimike: rek’anesh’atsembe - ibyo byaha
byawe, yahaw’ubutware - ngw’agutsindire wa mubishi wawe - iy’ahingutse.
Kand’umwami Yesu - azagaruka,  azany’ubutware - n’icyubahiro cye. Maz’iyi si yose - izamwimika; najye nzamubona - njyemusingize.

Yes’ashimwe turamushim’umukiza Hose bahimbaz’urukundo rwe Mumushime ngabo zo mw’ijuru Mwese Muhimbaz’ubuntu n’ubwiza bwe Ukw’intama zirindwa n’umushumba Ni ko Yes’arind’abana be Mumushime ngabo mw ijuru mwese Mutanarir’urwo rukundo rwe.
Yes’ashimwe turamushim’umukiza kubw’ibyaha byacu yapfiriye yaje mw’isi
ngw’atubohore adukize aduh’ubugingo budashira yarabambw’abyemejwe n’urukundo abagome baramuhemukira yambikwa n’ikamba ry’amahwa mu mutwe byos’abyemezwa n’urukundo rwe

Yes’ashimwe turamushim’umukiza yarazutse yicara mw’ijuru non’ashimwe n’abari mw’ijuru rirerire none twese ntitugitiny’urupfu nyagasani wararunesheje ahubwo rwahinduw’irembo ry’ijuru no kuzaka kwawe  mucunguzi.
Nshim’umwami wo mw’ijuru
Ntang’ibyo mushimisha
Nari mboshyw’arambohora
Nari ndway’arankiza
Tumushime tumushime (X3)
Ni we mwam’uhoraho.
Basogokuru kera
bari mu  mubabaro
abagirir’imbabazi
tumuhimbariz’ibyo
na none tumwizigire (X3)
kukw ar’uko yahoze.
Ni data wa twese mwiza
Az’intege nke zacu
nukw’aradukuyakuya
ngw’aturinde satani
duhimbaze imbabazi ze (X3)
zitarangir’iteka.
Yemwe bamarayika beza
nimushim’uwiteka
namwe bera bo mw’ijuru
bavuye mwisi yose
mwese mwishimane natwe (X3)
nyirigir’uhoraho.
Mpimbariz' Iman'ibyo yankoreye: Yatanz' Umwana wayo w'ikinege, Amfir' ab' icyiru cy'ibyaha byanjye; Nukw’anshir' icyanzu ngo njyemw’ijuru.
Nsingize, nsingize Yesu  wamfiriye! Nsingize, nsingize uwo Mwami wanjye!
Namwe ngo nimuz' abageze kwa Se;Mumwitabe mwese, mumusingize !
Yamberey' inshungu i Gologota, Angur’ amaraso : sinkir’ uwanjye. Uwab’ umugome, akamwizera,Yakizw' ako kany' akababarirwa.
Yakoz' ibikomeye ! Twishimane ! Twishimir' ubuntu n'imbabazi ze. Nyamar' ubw'
azaza tumwirebera,Nta wavug' uburyo tuzamushima.
Tunezerewe k’ Umukiza yaje.
Yadupfiriye twese, maz' arazuka.
Turirimbir' Umukiza ko yadupfiriye! Haleluya, tunezerwe kuko yazutse !
Tunezerewe kw ar' Umucyo w'isi; Ni we weyuy’ umwijima twahozemo.
Tunezerewe kw amaraso yeza; Yaduhay' agakiza; turacunguwe.
Tunezerewe ko twarihiriwe, ubw' Uwera yapfirag' abanyabyaha.
Tunezerewe k' Umukiz' ariho; Ni we Mwana w'intama watsinz'urupfu.
Tunezerewe kw ari mw ijur' ubu; N' Umuvugire wacu ku Mana yera.
Tunezerewe k' Umukiza wacu Azaz’atujyan' atugeze mw ijuru.
Uwambitswe ker' ikamba Ritatse mu mahwa None yambitsw' iry'ubwami Kuko yanesheje.
None yicaye mw ijuru, Ategeka byose, Ari we Mwami w'abami N'umucy' udashira.
Ni we munezero wacu N'uw'abo mw ijuru : Yatwerets’ urukundo rwe, Ubwo
yabambwaga.
Yes' umusaraba wawe, Nubw' ar' uw'isoni, Uvamw ubuntu kubwacu N'ibyishimo byinshi.
Tubabarana na Yesu, Tukir' aha mw isi. Maze, ni tujya mw ijuru, TuzImana na
We.
Mukiza, ku musaraba,waradupfiriye:twabishwe n'ibicumuro,tubeshwaho na wo.
Mana,turaguhimbaza;
Twemeye yuk' ur' Umwami;
Haleluya ! Haleluya !
Data wa twes' udashira,
Isi yos'irakwambaza :
Haleluya ! (x 5)
Ni Wowe wera dedede,
Mwami w'iyi si n'ijuru :
Haleluya ! Haleluya !
Dor'icyubahiro cyawe
Cyamamaye mw isi yose :
Haleluya ! (x 5)
Kand' abahanuzi bawe
N'intumwa nziza za Yesu
Haleluya ! Haleluya !
Baguhimbazanya, Mana,
N'abishwe babamuhora :
Haleluya ! (x 5)
N'itorero na ryo n'uko
Ry'abera bo mw isi yose
Haleluya ! Haleluya !
Rikunda kugushimana
na za ngabo zo mw ijuru :
Haleluya ! (x 5)
Data wa twese n'Umwana
N'Umwuka Wer' Iman' imwe,
Haleluya ! Haleluya!
Iman' imwe mu Butatu
Ishimirw’ icyubahiro :
Haleluya! (x 5)
Nimushim' izina ryiza
ry'Uwiteka Rurema;
N'icyubahiro cye cyinshi
nimucyamamaze hose hose!
Nimuvug' urukundo rwe,
bose barwumve,
Abo ku mpera y'isi
bamenye kw akiza.
urukundo rw'Uwiteka ruratemba nk'uruzi kand'ubuntu bwe n'ibambe ntabwo
bizashir'iteka ryose
Nimushim' Umwami Yesu :
ni we Mwana w'Intama
Wapfiriy’ abanyabyaha,
hanyum' agahambwa mu gituro!
Maze, ku wa gatatu,
yaneshej' urupfu,
Arazuk'arazamuka,
yima mw ijuru.
Kand' umuns' uzaza vuba,
Yes' agaruke mw isi
Kwim' ingoma ye n'ubwami
mu cyubahiro n'ubwiza bwinshi,
Isi n'ijuru byombi
binezerwe hamwe
N'inyamaswa n'inyoni
n'ibyaremwe byose.
Icyo gihe cy'ibirori,
tuzarimba twishimye,
Twiteguye nk'umugeni,
uko arimba yitegur' umukwe;
Kukw Umwam' azamanuka
ngw az' adusange,T
ub' imbata ze zera
zinezerw' iteka.

Nshim' Umuremy' uhoraho Wahanits' ijuru, Inyanj'akazidendeza; Yiremeye byose.  Yashyizeho n'izuba rye Kumurika ku munsi, N'ukwezi n'inyenyeri bye
Byo kwaka n'ijoro.
Mushime ko yategetse Imyaka ngw imere; Yaremeshej' ijambo rye Ibizima
byose. Nitegerez' ibyiza bye Ku mpande zos' iteka, Hasi no hasi no hejuru; Ntabwo bihinyuka.
Mw isi nta kintu kiriho Kiterekan' ibye. Ni We wenyin' utegeka Izuba n'imvura.
lmana ni Y' ibeshaho Twe n'inyamaswa zose.Nta hantu twayihungira, Nta na hw
itagera.
b.
Mukiza. Mwungeri mwiza,Dushorez' urukundo.
Ikiganza cyawe cyiza Kitugaburir'
ubu.uhimbazwe, Mucunguzi,
Mukiza turi  abawe. Twebwe tur' abaw' iteka  Kand' uhimbazwe, Yesu.
No kubw' imbabazi zawe Utwuhagir' ibyaha; No kubw' imbaraga zawe Wez'
imitima yacu,
Turashaka kukumvira Mu mategeko yawe; Nuko kubw' ibyo, dushaka Kubon'
imyizerere.
Mukiza, Mwungeri mwiza.Turagukurikira. Utugwiriz' imbaraga Kand  uiy'
uturamira.
juru ryawe, Mana, Riraguhimbaza:
Ushimwa. n'ikirere N'ibirimo byose.
Bishim' ubudasiba Ku manywa na n'ijoro
Icyubahiro cyawe N'ubwenge n'ubuntu.
Izuba ryawe, Mana, Hamwe n'inyenyeri
N'ukwezi na ko, byose Biraguhimbaza.
Bibwiriz' amahanga Atarumv' ibya Yesu
Ubwiza bw'Umuremyi Wabiremye byose.
Ijambo ryawe ryera N' iry'ukuri rwose;
Ni ryiza, kandi ni ryo Riduhumuriza.
Kand' ubutunzi bwawe N'ubwenge bwo mw ijuru,
Duhora tubihabwa lyo tukumviye.
Nta n'umw' ubasha kubwe Kwirinda ngw atagwa.
No kujy' akor' ibyiza No kudacumura :
Man' ujy' umfash' iteka.Ndeke kukwibagirwa
No kugucumuraho Bikakubabaza.
Ibyo waremye byose Byo mw ijuru n'isi
Bishim' izina ryawe;
Nanjye ndisingize. Ndashaka kugutura Uyu mutima wanjye
N'uyu mubiri na wo; Bib' imbata zawe.
Mbony' Umukiza  mwiza,niYesu Krisito,
Ni W' urut' inshuti zose zo mw isi.
Igikundiro cye cyinshi ni cyo cyanyemeje
Kumusanga  ngw anyuh'agir' ankize!
Anyurura mbabaye, ankiz' amakuba; Amaganya yanjy' ajy'ayanyakira, Yaka nk'inyenyer' iteka; n'uw'igikundiro;
Ni W' urut' inshuti zose zo mw isi
Anyurura mbabaye, ankiz amakuba, Amaganya yanjy' ajy' ayanyakira; Yaka nk'inyenyer' iteka: n' uw'igikundiro;Ni w' urut' inshuti zose zo mw isi.
Intimba zanjye zose, yarazikoreye;
Uko ngeragejw' andinda wa Mubi.
Ibyantwazag' igitugu, yarabimbatuye :
N'igihome cyanjye, njya mwihishamo
Naterwa na Satani, ngahinwa n'inshuti, Yes' azantabar' angeze mw ijuru ! Yaka
nk'inyenyer' iteka; n' uw'igikundiro;
Ni W urut’'inshuti zose zo mw 'isi
Ntazansiga nk'imfubyi, ntazampemukira.
Mpora mbeshwaho no kwizera gusa.
Ubw' angoteshej' ingabo, nta cyo ngitinya pe.

Ajy' antungisha manu yo mw’'juru.Njya nkumbura n'umunsi nzagera Mw’ ijuru.Nzanezerwa ni mureba mu maso :


Yaka nk'inyenyer' iteka; n' uw'igikundiro. Ni W’ urut' inshuti zose zo mw isi.
Mwami, turagushima, Turaguhimbaza rwose :
Mana, turagukuza Hamwe n'abamarayika.
Turagupfukamiye, Turakuramya, Mwami
Kiz’ abaw’Uwiteka. Ushimish' impano zawe
Ukuz' ubwiza bwawe, Bub' ubwaw’iteka ryose !
N'urukund' ubajyane Mu Bwarni bwo mw ijuru !
Hos’amahoro yawe Agwire mu bawe bose!
None n’bihe byose! Mw isi no mu nyanja
Hose, Izina ry'Umukiza Ripfukamirwe cyane !
Shimishwa, Mwuka wera ! Shimishwa, Data wa twese !
Shimishwa, Mwami Yesu,Murokozi wacu twese !
Nukw imbabazi zawe Zibahw iteka ryose
Mwami mwiza w'ijuru,Twese twaje kugushima,Uri Nyir'imbaraga, Muremyi w'ibintu byose; Kand' uduh'amahoro, Udukiz' imitima.
Watumy' Umwami Yesu Ngw atwigish’ibyiza byawe;Twe gukomez’ibyaha, Kandi turek' ingeso mbi; Kuk' utubabarira, Twese turagushima.
Mana yo mw ijuru, Byos' uri nyira byo, Kand' ubiduh' ubudasiba. Utang’ utImana; Ujy' udukenura, Bituma tuguhimbaza.
Impan' ihebuje Yes’ atugabira N' ubuntu bwe n'amahoro ye. Yatubabariye, Twaramugomeye : Mbes’ ibyo s’ igitangaza?
Mwami, ndakwinginze, Nubwo ntakwiriye, Nyigiza hafi, tugumane ! Mpa kugukorera, Ndusheho kwemera Gukund’ ibiri mw ijuru !
Njya nshima nshima nshima nshim' Imana mu mutima, Mu mutima, mu mutima. Njya nshima nshima nshima nshim’ Imana mu mutima, Mu mutima wanjye.
Nta n'urubanza, nta rubanza nshiriweho rwose, Mu mutima, mu mutima. Nta
n'urubanza, nta rubanza nshiriweho rwose,Mu mutima wanjye.
Mfit' amahor' arut' uko yamenywa mu mutima, Mu mutima, mu mutima. Mfit'
amahor' arut' uko yamenywa mu mutima, Mu mutima wanjye.
Uwiteka n'umunyambabazi ;N' Umukunzi wac' udahemuka; Nta warondor' imbarag' agira; Nta wager'urukundo rwe rwinshi.
Ni We Tangiriro n'Imperuka. Aturindish' imbaraga nyinshi. Tumushimir' ibyatubayeho; Tumuragize n'ibir' imbere.
Mana Rurema , ndagushima : Wabonetse muri Yesu. Dor' urukundo rwawe rwinshi Wakunze twebw’ abangizi ! Mana, watanz' Umwana wawe Ngw adukirish' amaraso ye.
Njye nguhimbaza, Mwami Yesu,Kuko wangiriy' ibambe, Kandi Unkurahw ibyaha byanjye. Muvunyi wanjye, ndagushima; Ndakwihaye, mb' uwawe rwose.
Wasiz’ ubwiza bwawe bwose War' ufit' ahw Iman' iri, Umber’ Intama y'igitambo, Utwar' ibyaha by'abantu. Ngukundira, Mukiza wanjye Ibyo wanyishyuriye byose.
Urwo rukundo rwawe rwinshi Rujya runtangaza cyane, Uko nagiriw’ ubwo buntu,
Usumba byos' akamfira !Reka ngukunde, Mwami Yesu; Iminsi yose ngushimishe.
Mutabazi wacu Yesu, Twese tuguhimbaze;
Ni wowe wadupfiriye,Yesu Mwana w'Intama.
Yes' ashimwe. Yes' ashimwe Icyubahiro kibe Icy' uwo Mwana w' Intama. Duhimbai izina rye.
Twar’imbohe za Satani,Twari mu mubabaro; Yatuboheshej’ ingoyi, Yes' aratubohora.
Tuguh' imibiri yacuN'imitima n'ubwenge; Kand’ibyo dufite byose Bib' i by awe, Mukiza.
Tukwijejwe cyanecyane N’ uk' ushobora rwose Kuturinda no kutwoza Ibyo twagucumuye.
Muganga wacu ni Yesu:Ni we Mukiza wacu; Ni na w' ubyuts' abaguye ; Umv' ijwi ry'ugukunda !
Indirimbo z’lmana Ni zo zidushimisha : Turirimbane, tuti; Yesu, Yesu, Yesu !
imyend' urayirihiwe ! Umv' ijwi ry'Umukiza. Azakugeza mw ijuru. ng' unezeranwe
na We.
Izina ryiza rya Yesu Ni ryo rikuru rwose. Dushim uwo Mucunguzi Imyaka yacu
yose.
Uduhagarare Hagati, Mukiza,Iki gihe cyacu Cyo guseng' ucyeze.
Yesu tugisenga, Suk' Umwuka Wera Mu mitima yacu, Atubwir' ibyawe.
Kwinjira kwe kwera Kutumar' ubwoba N'agahinda kose, Tube mu mahoro.
Tutabuzwa n'ibyo, Yes’ inzira yawe, Tuzayikomeza. Dufit' intege nshya.
Kandi tukigenda,Tuzategercza igihe cyo kuza Kwawe turi maso.
Ai Mukunzi wanjye we, Umpe kukwihishamo. iyo ntewe n'iby'isi N'ingabo za Satani, Mutabaz’umpish'ubwo , Ba banzi be kumfata Umber' ubuhungiro, Mu rupf' uzanyakire.
Nta bundi buhungiro, Mwam’ unyirokorere; We kunsiga, Krisito, Komez' uiy'
undengera. Ni Wow' ump’ imbaraga,Nta wundi mfit' umfasha; Mbundikiz' amababa, Uhor' undind' ibibi.
Ur' umunyambabazi Zitarangira, Yesu; Usindagiz' urushye, N'urway' uramukiza,
Urera bihebuje,Nta bwo ngutunganiye; Ndi mubi bikabije,  Wow' urakiranuka.
Yesu ni Wowe soko Y'amazi y'ubugingo, Reka nkunyweho cyane, Undudubiz'
imbere. Nuk' umutima wanjye Ujye wuzur' iteka, Amazi y'iyo soko Abe mensh'
adakama

Umbabarir' umpire.Bimveho ! Bimveho ! Umbabarir' Umpire.

Ndakwinginz’ undengere.Ndengera, ndengera Ndakwinginz' undengere.

Urukundo rwawe, Yesu, Ruva ku musaraba, Urunyerek' ub' unkize ; Noneh'
unyiharire.nkiz'ubu! nkiz'ubu! noneh'unyiharire!
Mwam' utuvubir' imvura, Nkuko wasezeranye Twunva twumye mu mitima : Uduhembuz' imvura.
Utuvubir' imvura, iy'umugisha wawe  Hahoze hagw' urujojo: Duh'umuvumbi wawe
Mwam' utuvubir’ imvura :Yaduhembura rwose. Twumva mu matw' irahinda : Uyidusohozeho !
Mwam' utuvubir’ imvura,Iducunshumukeho  . Tuje guhabw' umugisha Wadusezeranije.
Mwam' utuvubir' imvura Icyamp' ikagwa vuba, Ubu tukiri ku mavi, Tukigutakambira
Ndagushimiye, Mukiza ,Urukundo wankunze; Nuk' umpindur’ umugende  W'amazi y'ubugingo.
Mb' umugende gusa, Yesu,Wuzuyemw imbaraga Z'agakiza kawe, Mwami,
Kitbone kuntembamo.
Mb' umugend' ugez' amazi Mu mitim’ isaraye, Ibone kunyw' agakiza K'ubutumwa bw'ineza.
Mb' ikibindi cyawe, Yesu :Nuk' unyoz' untunganye, Maz' unyuzuz' ayo mazi, Ni
yo Mwuka w'Imana.
Mb' umugabo wo guhamya Uburyo wankijije : Waranguze ngo mb' uwawe, Nuk'unyuzure rwose.
Yesu, suk' Umwuka Wera Mu mutima wanjy’ ubu, Kugira ngo ngez' amazi   Yawe mu basaraye !
Ndusheho kukwegera, Mukiza, Ne kukuba kure: Nkwishingikirizeho, Mukiza, Ungendeshe neza.
Nerekan’ icyubahiro cyawe Mu byo nkora byose; Akanwa kanjye kajye kavuga
Ibyiz' umbwiriza.
Umpindure nk'isoko y'ibyiza,Itemb' idakama; He kugir' undi nkorer' iteka, Databuja mwiza.
Kand' imigambi yanjye n'inama Ubyigandurire; Nyemeza k' ur' Umwami wenyine Untegcka byose.
Ni Wowe mutsima w'ubugingo N'amazi mazima; lyo nishwe n'inzara n'inyota, Ni Wow' ujy' umpaza.
Ni Wow' uhaza kwifuza kwiza,Kose niyumvamo. Ni tujy' i wawe, nta cyo, Mukiza, Tuzifuz' ukundi.
Umpe Kukwegera Mana Yanjye
Naho Twafatanya Umusaraba
Nagumya Kwishima,
Nkajya Ngusenga Nti:
Umpe Kukwegera Mana Yanjye.
Umpe Kukwegera Mana Yanjye
Jy’undenger’iteka Ngumye Nkwizere
Ntewe Na Satani,
Ujy’undwanirira
Umpe Kukwegera Mana Yanjye.
Naho Natungurwa N’umwijima
Nkisegur’ibuye Mbaye njyenyine
Nzabe Nka Yakobo
Ndot’ibyo Mw’ijuru
Nkomeze Nkwizere Mana Yanjye.
Wakinguy’ijuru Mana Yanjye
Urwego Ruriho Rutugezayo
Mugenzi Komera,
Jy’usab’itek’uti
Tujye Tugumana  Mana Yanjye
Ntumpiteho  Mukiza We Wumv’uko Nganya Ubw’ugenderera Abandi Nanjye Ntusige.
Yesu Mukiza Wanjye Wumv’uko Nganya Ubwo Ugenderera Abandi Nanjye Ntusige.
Mpa Kweger’intebe Yawe Mpabw’imbabazi Ngupfukamiye Mbabaye Mpa Kukwizera.
Nta Wundi Nakwizigira Ni Wowe Nshaka Mvur’ibikomere Byanjye Umbabarire
Ur’isoko Y’amahoro Nyir’ubugingo Singir’undi Niyambaza Keretse Wowe
Tuguman' iteka,—Mukiz' uhebuje. Ijwi ryawe ryiza—Rizan’ amahoro.
Ku manywa na n'ijoro,—Ndagushak'iteka. Ndahiriwe, Mukiza:—Twigumanire.
Ndagushak' iteka :—Jy' ungum' iruhande.Nsind' amoshya yose,—lyo turi kumwe.
Ndagushak'iteka ,—Nturiz' amaganya. Ngwin' ubu, tubane,—Mbone gutungana.
Ndagushak' iteka,—Nyigish' iby’ ushaka Kand' uce muri jye—Ingeso zose mbi.
Ndagushak' iteka,—Wa Mwami wera  we! Mb' uwaw' unyobore,—Nyir'imigisha
Ai Mana  Ndondor’umenye Ibyo Nkora Byose Werekane Uko Ndi Kose Ntifata Uko Ntari.
Ndondorere Uyu Mutima Ni Wowe Ushobora Kugaragaza Ibirimo  Mu Bwihisho Bwawo.
Umurik’ahatabona Ah’umwijim’uba Ump’umutima Ukangutse Uzinukw’icyaha
Kand’umeny’ibyo Nibwira N’imigambi Yanjye N’ibimbamo Binyanduza Bikangir’imbohe.
Mvugutira Kand’unshure Inkamba Zimvemo Umpindur’icyuma Cyawe Uhor’ukoresha.
Maze Nkwikubis’imbere Mpishurirwe Rwose Yukw’Imana Ar’urukundo Rutagir’ingano
Ngwino, mutima wanjye, Witab' Umwami wawe ! Winjir' umuhakweho, Kukw akund' abaz' i We.
Kw ar’ Umwam' ukomeyc, Wamusaba bike, se ? Ubushobozi n' ubwe, N'ubuntu n'imbabazi.
Mbanze nsab' imbabazi, Kuko nakugomeye. Umutwaro w'ibyaha, Dor' ubury' undembeje !
Amaraso wavuye, Uri ku musaratia, Yoz,'abakiranirwa, Nukw anyoz' ambpneze.
Unduhure nonaha, Ndakwihay' unturemo! Wanshunguj' amaraso, Nukw unyitegekere!
Mu rugendo rw'iyi si, Mb' intumwa ya Krisito, Ahw ashak' antumeyo, Nkuz' izina
rya Yesu !
Ndakwizeye, Yesu ,Mwana w'intama ko wamfiriye.None,ndakwinginze, Unyoz' umutima, Nonubu, mb'uwawe unyakire !
Nyuzuz' imbabazi, Unyobor' inzira, umpembure !Ubwo wankunz' utyo, Ukamfira, Yesu,  Umvugutire, nanjye ngukunde!
Ni nterw' umwijima N'ibyago by'iyi si, unyobore ! Mmar' umubabaro, Weyur’
umwijima, Kandi ntundekere kure yawe !
Nasezeranije guhora Ngukurikira, Yesu; Iminsi yos' umpore hafi, Mukiza wanjye mwiza. Singitiny' intambara mbi zose.Wow’ umpagarikiye, Sinashobora kuzimira, Ni mpora nkuyoboka.
Ndashaka yuko twibanira, Ni ngeragezwa n'isi. , Numv' amajwi yay' anyinginga
Iteka ngo nkuveho. Ababisha baranyegereye, Bar’ inyuma n'imbere. Nyamara,
nkwisunge, Krisito, Undind' ibicumuro.
Mukiz’ ijwi ryawe numvise Rindutir’ ayo yose : Unyongorere mu mutima Ngo
ntumvir’ ayo moshya, Hor’ umbwiriz' ibyo kuntinyura,  Kand' uhor' ;untegeka,
Uvuge ngo nanjye nkumvire, Murengezi nizera.
Mukiza wasezeranije Abagukurikira Yuk’ uzabageza mw ijuru, Bahoraneyo nawe.Kandi nanjye nasezeranije Guhora ngukorera; Umfashish’ ubuntu n'ibambe, We Databuja wera
Kand’ umpe kuger' ikirenge Mu cyawe, Muyobora. Imbaraga zawe zonyine,Ni zo
njya niringira. Ujy’ unyobor' iyo nzira yawe,Nkiriho mur'iyi si; Maz' uzanyakire mw
ijuru, Mukunzi wankijije.

title: Mwami wanjye, nshaka kuba Uwakijijwe nawe

lines: Mwami wanjye, nshaka kuba Uwakijijwe nawe: Nake kubwawe wenyine Kuk' ur' umucyo wanjye;Mu kwitonda kwanjye numve Urukundo rw'ukuri. No mu mwijima w'ijoro, Nkwibuke, Mwami Yesu.
Mwami wanjye, nshaka kuba Urumuri kubwawe, Ngo njye mmurikir’ ab'isi Baheze mu mwijima.Nakire mu nzira zabo, Bakuri kure cyane. Mbageze ku Mwami Yesu, Ngo na bo bamwizere.
Mwami wanjye nshaka kuba Uvug' Ijambo ryawe, Namamaze, Databuja,Yuko
watubambiwe: Abari mu rupfu rubi, Mbabwir' ikibakiza, Mpumuriz’ abababaye;
Nyobore bos’i Bwami.
Ngwino, Mwami Yesu ,ngwino, Kuko tugukumbuye. Utuvane mu ntege nke, Uturuhure vuba.
Yesu, byishimo by'abawe,Byiringiro by'ababi, Amahanga yose yose. Arakwifuza cyane.
Yesu ni ryo zina wiswe :Waje kuturokora, Wavuts’ ur' akana gato, Nyamar' uri
n'Umwami.
Kubw’ Umwuka wawe wera, Mwami Yes' unyimemo ! Nuk' ungirir' uk' ushaka,
Uzangeze mw ijuru !
Tubabarire :—Duh' umugisha.
Tumurikirwe—N'ubuntu bwawe,
Ngw inzira yaw' imenyekane mw isi, Abantu
bameny' ubugingo bwawe.
Kand' amahanga—Agusingize.
Nukw anezerwe,—Kand’ aririmbe.
Ur’ Umucamanza n'Umwami wabo;
Uzacir' ab'isi— Imanza nziza.
Wategets’ isi—Ngo yer’ irnyaka.
Mana, ni Wowe—Uturengera.
Imigish' uduha—Tuyamamaze,
Maz' iyi si yos' ikugandukire.
Ndagushaka, Mwami Yesu Ntabwo nakwishoboza. Ndifuza k’ umpora hafi, Ukajy' ump' imbaraga.
Nta cyo nti... nya noneho.., Nkore byo... s' untegeka... Njye nguku.. .rikira hose,
Nkumvira, nguhakwaho.
Ndagushaka, Mwami Yesu Jye nd' umunyantege nke. Uzamber'umujyanama. Nta wundi mbitezeho.
Ndagushaka, Mwami Yesu,Aho ndi mur'iyi si, Mu muvumbi no ku zuba, Mu
bimbabaza byose.
Ndagushaka, Mwami Yesu, Hos' uzajy’ unyobora; Ngeze kuri wa Mugezi, Uzamfashe nywambuke.
Unjye imbere, Mana isumba byose,
Njye ndi umunyantege nke.
Muri iyi si ko ndi umwimuikira,
Ntagufite, nagera he?
Unjye imbere, unjye imbere,
Mbera ingabo inkingira.
Yesu umbere Ingabo inkingira
Mwami undudubirizemo isoko
Y'amazi y'ubugingo.
Unyoboze umuriro n'igicu
Mu nzira injyana mu ijuru.
Mbera impamba, mbera impamba
Ijya intunga mu nzira,
Ijya intunga ngana mu ijuru.
Ni ngera ku nkombe ya rwa Ruzi,
Uzampe gutinyuka
Amazi maremare y'urupfu,
Nyambuke, ngere mu ijuru.
Nzaririmba, nzaririmba
Indirimbo z'ishimwe,
Indirimbo zigusingiza.
Ube maso, Mukristo: Nturuhuke nonaha, Amakub'ari hafi; Usabe !
Ababisha b'lmana Bajya bakwubikira, Baguciriy' ibico; Usabe !
Ujye wambar’ intwaro yesu yakwihereye. Ku manywa 'na n’ijoro, Wirinde !
Umv' abatsinze kera lyo ntambar' urwana; Baraguhugura, ngo : Usabe !
Umva n'Umwami wawe, Yesu wagupfiriye, Ni We watubwiy' ati ; Ba maso!
Iryo jamb'uryemere N'umutima wizeye, Kugira ng' urikore; Usabe !

title: Ni jye, ni jye gusa, Nkwiriye gusabirwa

lines: Ni jye, ni jye gusa, Nkwiriye gusabirwa.
Ni jye, ni jye gusa, Nkwirive gusabirwa.
Si na data, si na mama,Ni jye jyenyine, Nkwiriye gusabirwa. Si na data, si na
mama, Ni jye jyenyine, Nkwiriye gusabirwa.
Kandi si na mwene data,Ni jye jyenyine, Nkwiriye gusabirwa. Reka, si na mwene data.
S' abo mu muryango wacu, Ni jye jyenyine, Nkwiriye gusabirwa. S’ abo muryango wacu....
Ndetse si n'inshuti zanjye,Ni jye jyenyine, Nkwiriye gusabirwa. Reka, si
n'inshuti zanjye ....
(ly’Abirabura bo mw‘Amerika)
Ibihe nseng' Uwiteka
Bintarura mu mpagarara,
Ngo nigir' aho Data  ari,
Muganyir' ibyo nkennye byose
Mu bihe by'umubabaro,
Bimpumuriz' umutima.
Nsind' ubukana bw'Umwanzi,
Mubihe byiza byo gusenga.
Ibihe nseng' Uwiteka
Binyemeza yukw asubiza.
Ategerej' abana be,
Ngo bamusang' abakenure
Ndamwihereje rwos’ ubu
Kuko yampamagay' ubwe.
Niringiye bwa Buntu bwe:
Nogez' ibihe byo gusenga.
Guhora nseng' Uwiteka
Kujye kummar' umubabaro,
Kugez' aho nzager' i We,
Mmwirebere ngeze mw ijuru,
Niyambuy' umubir’ upfa,
Nambaye kudapf' iteka;
Ubwo ni bwo nzasezera
Ku bihe byiza byo gusenga.
Muze mwenyine, twihererane, Munsang’ ahantu hatar' abantu; Dor’ imiruhw irabarembeje; Urusaku rurabaruhije.
Murek’ ibyifuzwa n'ab'iyi si, Mushak' ibyahishw’ abanyabwenge; Jyewe na Data tubana namwe : Ntimuri mwenyone, turi kumwe.
Murajye mumbwir’ ibyo mwibwira, Ibyo muvuga n'ibyo mukora, Mu miruho yanyu munaniwe; Bimenywa n'uz' imigambi yanyu.
Inzir' iraruhije  mwitange, Mutazananirwa mukigenda; Mury' umutsim' uter' imbaraga, Munywe no ku mazi y'ubugingo.
Nuko, mukor' imirimo yanyu; Nzajya mbafasha mu mibabaro; Uwitanga nzamugororera; Ndaza vub' umusek utambitse.
Muze. musange Yes' ubakunda, Mwese nimuze, mwe kuzuyaza. Yes’ arashaka yuko mukira,Nuko, mumwitabe.
Yes' ubw’ uzaza, tuzishima twese, Tujye kuban’ akaramata nawe, dutandukanye n'isi n'ibyaha Tubanye mw ijuru.
Mwese nimuze, mwitabe Yesu, Abaruhur’ a bah' amahoro. Nuko, mumuh' imitima yanyu, Yos’ ayibarire.
Wibuke yukw’igihe gikuze : Nta n'umw' umenya kw atinda mw isi, Umwami Yes' ageze bugufi; Tebuk'umwakire!
Utahe ! Utahe ! Ko wazerereye? Mu gihugu cya kure, Ibya S' ubyayirayo?
Mwana wanjy' uzimiye, Tyo ngwino, garuka !Ngwino ,Ngarukira !
Utahe ! Utahe ! Nturarambirwa se ? Izo ngurub' uzite ! Ibyo zirya si byiza.
Utahe ! Utahe ! Ntuzi ko niriwe Mpagaz' aha kwirembo, Mfit' ubwuzu kubwawe.
Nimusang’ Umwami Yesu :Arabaruhura; Nimubyumve, mw’ abarushve,Yasezerany' atyo. Ni W' ugab’umugisha: Ashobora byose.  Ni W’ ugab' ubugingo Butazashira.
Nimusang' Umwami Yesu :Dor' arabashaka; Nimubyumve, mw' abahabye,Yasezerany' atyo. Kand' ushavura wese,Agahab' inzira, Yumvire Yesu vuba. Az' amwakire.
Nimusang' Umwami Yesu :Atang' imbaraga; Banyantege nke
mubyumve,Mumwisunge mwese. Satan' arabarwanya, Akajy' abashuka. Yesu yaramutsinze: Nimutinyuke !
Kand' usang’ Umwami Yesu Ntazamukumira; Mwe gushidikanya rwose, Mwumve munezerwe. Akund' abanyabyaha Urukundo rwinshi. Arabahamagara Ngo muz' ahwari.
Yemwe mwes' abananiwe N'abaremerewe, Muyoboke Yesu Kristo; Arabarahura.
Mumwizere, mumwizere,Mwizere Yesu, Abarenger' abakize Ibyaha byanyu.
Yavushijw' amaraso ye Ngo tuzasugire; Mumwemer’ abuhagire, Aboze dedede.
Yesu ni W' utuyobora Mu nzira y'Imana; Mubanguke, mumwizere, Mumukurikire.
Nimuze muteranire Mu nzira ye nziza; Nuko muzamushimira Iteka mw ijuru.
Yes' araduhamagara kureka ibyaha byose :ahora atubwira iteka ngo tumukurikire.
Tumere nka ba barobyi, Bumvis' amagambo ye; Bemeye gusig' ibyabo, Ngo
bamukurikire.
Atubuza kwifuz' ibyo Mw isi n'icyubahiro; Azaduh' ibiduhaza, Ni tumukurikira.
Nubwo twaba tunezerwa, Cyangwa turi mu byago, Yes' araduhamagara, Ngo tumukurikire.
Yes' araduhamagara;Nuko, tub' intore ze, Tumukunde, tumusenge, Tuzageze ku gupfa.
Yes' aragutegereza; N' inshuti yawe. Araguhamagar' ati : Ngwino hano !
Ita ku magambo meza Akubwir' ati : Nabambiwe kugira ngo Ngucungure.
Mbes’ ubuntu bwanjye bwinshi Ubwangir' iki ? Ntiwanyemera, nkaguha Agakiza?
Mbese ntiwamaz' imyaka myishi mu byaha, Ur' imbata ya Satani, Nturambiwe?
None, reka nkubohore, Naw' unyizere, Unkurikire wishimye, Ub' uwanjye.
Yesu yahoz' akubwira Kensh' ibyo byiza; Dore, n'ub' arakwinginga ! Wamwang'ute?
We gutind' ahar' ijwi rye Ryahora vuba; Ubu n'igihe gikundwa, We gutinda.
Mwami Yesu, singitinda; Noneho ndaje. Ububata bwawe bwiza Ni bwo nkunze.
Yes' araguhamagara :Ngwino,murushywa ! Ubu tugisab' Imana, Ngwino, murushywa ! Ubu n' igihe gikwiye Ngwino, murushywa ! Itaba Yes' uyu munsi ! Ngwino, murushywa!
Ubwo wumv’ uremerewe, Ngwino, murushywa ! Yes’ akuruhure none :Ngwino,
murushywa ! Nta w' ajy' ashuka, mugenzi,Ngwino, murushywa ! Yes' arakwakira none : Ngwino, murushywa !
Yes' arakwinginze ng' uze :Ngwino, murushywa ! Aguh' umugisha mwinshi;Ngwino, murushywa ! N' umunyambabazi rwose : Ngwino, murushywa !
Tukigusabir' Imana, Ngwino. murushywa !
Shobuj' uguhamagara Munyabyah' umwitabe, Wumvir' ijwi rye ryinginga : N' Umucunguzi wawe.
Mwitabe Mwitabe ! Sanga Yesu nonaha
N' iki gitum' umutera Kukurindira cyane ? Kera kose waramwanze None ngwino : ntutinde !
Banguk' aguh' uyu munsi Ubwera n'imbabazi N'amahoro y’ adashira N'ubugingo n'ubwami.
Agutegey' amaboko,Agukund' akwifuza. Banguk' uve mu bugoryi : Ngwino, wikebaguza.
Aracyaguhamagara :Wihut' atarahita. Wumvir' ijwi rye ryinginga, Udasanga yagiye !
Nimuze, mwa ndushyi mwe mwese,Muremerewe, murembye. Yes' aje kubasanganira N'ubuntu bwe n'urukundo Mwese, nimuze ! Muze, mwese ! Mumwitab' arabifuza !
Nubw’ ur' umunyabyaha byinshi, Humura ye ! N' uw'ibambe ! I by' agushakaho nibike :  N' ukwihan' ukamwizera. Wa munyabyaha we wihebye, Arakogesh' amaraso.
Umwana wera w'Uwiteka Yubamiy' i Getsemane, Baramubamb' ari tw' azira.
Nukw ati : Birarangiye ! Utegerej' iki se, kandi ? Ibyo ko biguhagije !
Dore, yazamutse mw ijuru,Atsinz' urupfu n'ibyaha ! Aratuvugira kuri Se,
Agaragaz' amaraso.Na S' akareb' izo nkovu ze, Nihanny' akambabarira.
Nukw abakijijwe na Yesu Tuzamusanganirayo ! Abo mw isi n'abo mw ijuru Ni ko
kuririmba, tuti : Turagushimye ! Haleluya ! Ur' Umukiza n'Umwami !
We, mutim' urira,—Uze kwa Yesu; Amakuba yawe,—Uyamubwire.
Mubwire buhoro—Ibikuriza; We kugir' ubwoba,—Kandi wirira.
Bwira Yesu byose,—N' inshuti yawe, Ibikubabaza—N'ibigutera.
Arakund'afasha—Abashavuye; Wizer' ijambo rye,—Kandi wirira.
Abaremerewe—N'ibiruhanya, Babwire kw Imana—Yabaruhura.
Ubahumurize,—Ut' Umukiza Amar' agahinda :—None, mwirira !
Umwuk' ukubwira,—Wumv' ijwi ryawo,Uve mu butindi.—Reba ku Giti! Umwuk' ugushaka,—Ntuwunanire ! Ur’umunyabyaha:—Sanga Krisito.
K' ur’ umunyehirwe,—Uratiny' iki ? Akira kunesha :—Waracunguwe. Ugutitiriza,—
Ntuwushavuze. indirimbo zawe—Zisange Yesu.
Mu mutima wawe—Here dedede. Ber' Umwuka Wera—Urusengero. Umwuk'
ukongeza—Kwizera kwawe, Ugukomereze—Gukund' Imana.
Ntumwa za Yesu, murangurure, Mwamamaze mw is' ubwo butumwa bwe! Nimukwiz' inkuru z'Umucunguzi :Ubikunz' amwitabe!
haz' uwemeye ! Haz' uwemeye  Mubibwir' abato n'abakomeye. Yemera gutarur' abazimiye : Ubikunz, amwitabe!
Ubikunze naze, ntakererwe. Yinjire mw irembo twugururiwe. Yesu ni we nzir' igeza mw ijuru :Ubikunz' amwitabe !
Ubikunze wese namwumvire : Ntabw' avuguruz' isezerano rye. Umusang'
agabany' ubugingo bwe :Ubikunz' amwitabe !
Yemwe, banyabyaha mwe, Mwitab' Umucunguzi. Nubwo mwe mwazimiye, Mwemer' abatarure !
Muririmbe,.. .munezerewe... Yesu yaki... r’  abacumuye... Vug' iryo ja... mbo, ryamamare... Yukw ababi' abakira.
Muz' abaruhur' ubu, Muze, mumwiringiye. Arabakira, nubwo Mwanduye bikabije.
Wa mutima wanjye we, Nta rubanz' ukiriho, Kuko bya bicumuro Byose yabyishyizeho !
Yakir' abacumuye, Nanjy' uko ndi nanduye ! Noze mu maraso ye : Azangeze mw
ijuru.
Namwe, mwa bakonje mwe, Nubwo mwamuvuyeho, None nimutebuke,Yes'
aracyabifuza.
Muze ku Mwami w'ubugingo Bangizi, musange Yesu.
Ni We wenyin' uzabakira; Azabah' Umwuka wera.
umukunz' akihan' ibyaka Ntabwo yanga kumwakira.
Abamwizera mw isi yose Abatabaz’ imbaraga;
Urukundo rwe rutangaza Ruboneka hose hose.
Kirisito, Mukiza rnwiza,Tungany' imitima yacu; Duhe gukiranuka rwose N'amahoro no kwizera.
Musange Umwami ugira ubuntu ,abatakimwizigira .ntiyanga kwakira abatindi;ahabura'abazimiye Kandi yemeye kubapfira: Yabaviriy' amaraso. Nta kindi abasha gukirisha Abanze kumvir'Imana.
Musang' Umwami ujy' ahembura Nimuze, mwes' abaguye, Batacyizigir' agakiza :Abategey' amaboko ! Yakirishij' ubuntu bwinshi Wa munyabyahakaz' arira; Na Wa mwambuzi babambanywe Ntiyarnwisungiy' ubusa.
Musang' ubasha kuruhura; Az' ibibarushya byose. Kubw' urukundo rusaga, Ahez'
ibibashavuza. Cya gihe,muri Getsemani,Yariz' amarira menshi : Kubw' ubuntu bwe buhoraho, Azahanagur' ayanyu.

Ngwino, ngukize, mwangizi: Nabony' ishavu ryawe ryose; Nyamar' ushatse ko ngukiza,Ukwiriye kunyumvira.Dor' uko mpagaze ku rugi;Ndi Shobuj' Umucunguzi. Nkuzaniy' imigisha myinshi : Mbese, ntiwankingurira ?

Kera, narakuvukiye,Ngucunguz' ubugingo bwanjye. Mbese, k' unangiw' umutima, Ubuz' uko wanshyiramo ? Namaz' iminsi myinshi cyane Ku rugi rwawe nkomanga. Mugenzi, ko bugiye kwira, Mbese, ntiwankingurira ?
Rya joro ridacy' iteka Ni ryir' uzantabaza s' ute ? Ntutind' unyitab' uyu
munsi,mNgukikire, nkurengere ! Igihe cyawe kirakuze;Ntuvug' uti : Nzaz' ubundi.
N' uza ku rugi rwanjy' utinze, Uzakomangir’ ubusa,
Nubwo wumv' utanyitaho, Jye ndacyakwinginga ngukunze, Nkurindire kugeza
ryari ?Ngwino, ndakwifuz' i wanjye;Dor' uko mpagaze ku rugi :Ndi Shobuj'
ukwitayeho. Nkuzaniy’ imigisha myinshi; Mbese, ntiwankingurira ?
Uhagaze, Mukiza Ku rugi rukinze,  Utegereza yuko Bagukingurira. Ariko, bene Data,N'iby'isoni nyinshi Gukingiran' Umwami Yes' Umucunguzi.
Akomanga ku rugi.Kandi dor' afite Inkovu z'imbereri N'ikamba ry'amahwa. Mbeg' urukundo rwinshi Rw' utegerez' atyo ! Nta kindi cyaha kibi nko kutamwakira!
Umwam' atwingingisha Ijwi ryongorera, Ati : N'iki gituma Mungirira mutyo? Mwami, tugiz' isoni Z'uko guhemuka :Nonehw injira, Mwami Ntudusig' ukundi.
Nta kindi gihesha gukiranuka Mu b'isi no mu bo mw ijuru, Keretse kwizera ko wogejwe de N'amaraso ya Yesu masa.
Wogejwe na Yesu ? Watunganijwe n'amaraso ? Har' ubwo yakuhagij' amaraso?  Mbes' imyambaro yaw' irera?
Amaraso ya Yesu yogej' atyo Abanduy' imitima yabo: Ntimukererw' ahubwo mutebuke, Mwezw' imitima yanyu neza.
Umukiz' ubw' azagaruk' afite Icyubahiro cy'ubwiza bwe, Abatari bezwa bazinjir' i we Mu birori by' ubukwe bate?
Bazatinya guhinguk' imbere ye, Bazahinduk' ubwoba busa. Nukw iyambur' iyo myambaro mibi Yes' akwambik' iye y'ubukwe.

title: Nkuko Mose yamanits' inzoka ku giti

lines: Nkuko Mose yamanits' inzoka ku giti, Abarembejwe bakayireba, Bagakir' uburibwe, bakaba bazima Kubw’ imbabazi z'Uwiteka,  Ni ko na Yesu Yatumanikiwe ku Musaraba kera : Tumurebe, tumwiringire.
Mutim' ushavuye, reb' Uwagupfiriye;Reba Yesu wakumanikiwe ! , Munyabyah' umutumbir' aragukiz' ubu,Umureb' urakira rwose ! Reba, wizere ! Kubabarirwa kwawe kuv’ i Gologota :' Reba, reba ku Musaraba
N'iki cyatumy' Umwana w' Iman'ababazwa ?umv' icyatumy' abambwa ku giti,
Kand' icyatumye yambikw' ikamba ry' amahwa: Ni kubwawe n'ibyaha byawe ! Reba, wizere ! Dor' urupfu n' urwe, nahw imyandu n' iyawe : Reba, reba ku Musaraba.
Naho warir' ukicuz' ukanababara,Ntibyarih' ibicumuro byawe. Dor' impongan'
ikwiriy' ibyaha wakoze N' amaraso ya Yesu masa.Reba, wizere ! Wizer'
Uwakubambiw' arakurokora : Reba, reba ku Musaraba,
Yagukirishije ya mibyimba yagize;Ni na We gukiranuka kwawe. Yakubeshejeho,
war' uwo kurimbuka : Wakjr' ubwo bugingw aguha.Reba,wizere ! Yes’ ubw' atagipfa,tuzabanaho na we : Reba, reba ku Musaraba.
Nimuze mwese kumv' inkuru nziza Z'agakiza kabwirizwa none. Yesu yabasanze :Arabashaka; Namwe muh' Umwami Imitima.
Mwitinyishwa n'uko mufit' ibyaha,Ngw azabang' abater' umugongo; Ntabwo
yabigira :Yasezeranye Kwikir' uwihannye Umwizera.
Ni W' ubwe wizanye gukiz' abantu;Yavuye ku Witek' aza mw isi. Ngo tubon'
ijuru,Yaradukunze; Yaratubambiwe;Yaravumwe!
Abwira bos' ati : Jye nd' Ubugingo,Kand' unyizera wese ntazapfa. Nzamuha
kubaho Mu bwami bwanjye; N'urupfu nzamuha Kurunesha.
Hagarara, munyabyaha ,Kuk' uri mu mwijima; Urarindagira hose, Ugiye kwiyahura.
Ngwin'Iman' ijya yakira munyabyaha wese. Ibuka, nta n'umwe yanze : Ngwin' irakurokora.
Wajyaga wibwir'ibibi,Ukagir' agahinda; Washatse gutsind' ibyaha, Nyamar' urananirwa.
Washaka kuza mu mucyo Ng' ubohorwe n'Imana? Wakwemera kuyikunda Nkuko na Y’ igukunda?
Teg’ amatwi, munyabyaha : Araguhamagara. None wemere gukizwa ; We kwihemukir' utyo !
Twaheze mu mwijima mwinshi cyane; Umucyo w'isi ni Yesu ! Ubwiza bwe bwaralumurikiye : Umucyo w'isi ni Yesu !
Sang' uwo Mucy' ukwakir' ubu ! jye nzi yuko wammurikiye, Nari nd' impumy’
arampumura. Usang' uwo Mucyo nawe !
Nta mwijim' ugir' uri kumwe na we:Umucyo w'isi ni Yesu ! Tugendane na W'
atumurikire: Umucyo w'isi ni Yesu !
Mwa mpumyi zaheze mu mwijima mwe,Umucyo w'isi ni Yesu! Mwoge mu maraso, muhumuk' ubu : Umucyo w'isi ni Yesu !
Har' indi s' itagomb' izuba rwose, Umucyo waho ni Yesu ! Umwana w''ntam'
ahaber' izuba : Umucyo waho ni Yesu !
Ngwino. zan' ibyaha byawe Kuri ya soko nziza. Ubiyirohemo byose, Wiboner' ihumure.
Gira bwangu ! Wizarira ! Nturushy' utindiganya na hato.  Yiteguye kugukiza: Arakwinginze ng' uze.
Ngwino, zan' ibyaha byawe Kuri ya soko nziza, Nubwo bitukura rwose, Birab'
umweru dede.
Umv' amagambo ya Yesu, Wihan' umwiringire ! Mwitab' aguh' ubugingo; Nuk’ umukurikire.
Subira kuri ya soko,Ni ho wakirira pe; Ni cyo kizatum' impundu Zivugira mw ijuru.

title: Jye mfit' Umukiz' ujy' amvugira ku Mana

lines: Jye mfit' Umukiz' ujy' amvugira ku Mana.
N' inshut' idahana, si nk' izo mw isi
itek' arandind'akankingira n'ibyago.
Icyamp' Uw' akab’Umukiza wawe!
Njye ninging' Imana ngw’ ikwereke Yesu.Ngumwakire nawe : ni ko ngusabira.
Nahaw' ikibanza na Data wo mw ijuru
Mu rugo rwe rwera kubw' Umwana we
Azangezayo ngo tuban' iteka ryose.
Icyampa ngo nawe tuzabaneyo !
Nzahabwa n'umwambaro mwiza,wera cyane
Tw' abacunguwe yatubikiyeyo.
Njya ngir' amatsiko, nkawifuza,mugenzi
Icyampa ngo naw' uzawambar' ubwo
Kur'ubu, njya ngir' amahoro mu mutima:
Nyahawe na Yes' Umukiza wanjyi
Atemba nk'uruzi : ab'isi ntibayazi.
Icyampa ngasang' uyahawe nawe
N'umara kumwemera h' Umukiza wawe
Uhamye mu band' iby' agukoreye,
Usabe n'Iman' ibahishurire Yesu,
Bahabw' ubwo buntu wahawe nawe
Yesu ni we Nshuti yacu; Ni W' utwikorerera Imibabaro n'ibyaha, Akatwuzuza na Se. Dore, tubur’amahoro,Tuyabuzwa n'ubusa, Kuko tudasaba neza Ibyo dukena byose.
Ni tugir' ibyago byinshi.Tugashukwa n'Umubi, Tumuganyir' amaganya,Kukw
ayadukuraho. Ha'rihw indi nshuti nk'iyi Yababarana natwe ? Yes' az' intege nke
zacu, Tumwisunge dusaba.
Niba ufit' ishavu ryinshi ukababara rwose,ubuhungiro ni Yesu: ngwino
tumwihishemo. inshuti zidutaye, zikaduhemukira, Yes' adukingir' ingabo,
Akaduhumuriza.
Bene wacu bo mw isi, Mwese ni mutwiteho,Mwitegure kumvira Imigambi y'Imana.
Satani yayobeje Sogokuruza wacu,Amuteg' ikigoyi,Maz' amuta mu rwobo.
Nuko, natw' abana be Tumukurikir' ubwo, Twibagirw’ Uwiteka, Tugwa mu minyururu.
Umv' ubuntu bw'Imana, Ko butangaza cyane ! Nawe, wabwiyumvira, Warek' iby'ugundira.
Ntangazwa n'Uwiteka : Yambuy' uwo Mwana we Bwa bwiza bukomeye, Ngw az'apfir' abagome.
Yemeye guhemurwa, Nta n'icyaha yakoze, Yicw' urupfu rubi pe, Atubohor'
ibyaha.
None, banyabyaha mwe, Bakene na bakire, Uko muri, mwitabe, Mwakir'
Umucunguzi !
Umva, munyabyaha we.Yes'ukw akuburira : Sigaho gukinisha Ubugingo n'urupfu!
Umubir' ushukana Uzasaz' ushireho, Ujy'iy' utagaruka : Nuko, wibikinaho.
Takambir' Iman' ubu, Itarac' amateka :Yo ntikinish' ibyayo. Ngwin' usab'
imbabazi !
Gupfa ntikuba kure : We kujarajar' utyo ! Ntuzi k' uzarimbuka ? We kugum' uk'
ur' uko.
Haguruka ! Huguka ! Hung' urupfu rw'iteka  Yesu n’ ubukiriro:Wamuhungiyeho se?
Kera har' umubibyi Wasohoy' imbuto; Zimwe zigwa ku nzira, Zimarwa n'inyoni, Izindi ku rutare,Zumishwa n'izuba,Kuko zari zibuze Ahantu horoshye.
Mu mahwa hagw' izindi,Zikurana na yo; Nukw aziniga zose, Ntizera na gato.
Izindi mbuto zigwa Mu butaka bwiza;Zimeze. zirakura, Zer' imbuto nyinshi.
Har'umubibyi wundi,Ni Yesu Krisito. Ijambo ry'agakiza Ni iyo mbut' abiba, Kand’
imitima yacu Ni na yo mbibe ye,Ari mib’ ari myiza, Amishamw imbuto.
Ku mutwe n'ibiganza No ku birenge bye, Hatonyang' amaraso Akibib' imbuto;
Imvura ni y'imeza Imbuto z'iyi si : Amaras' akameza Izo mu mitima.
Mugenzi, har' ibiki Mu mutima wawe ? N’ inzira nyinshi, mbese ? Cyangwa n'
urutare ? Cyangwa n' imbibe nziza? Mbe harafumbiwe ? Weramw imbuto nziza,Cyangw' umez' amahwa ?
Umwami Yes' azaza Gusarur' imbuto; Azaz’ afit' intara, Maz' azigosore; Ingano
nziza zose Azazihunika, Maz' umuram' awute Na wo mu muriro.
Uzajya hehe wowe ? Nturabimenya se? Uzajya mu kigega, Cyangwa mu muriro?
Urorere gutinda :Wihane nonaha! Uyu n' umunsi mwiza Wo kwemererwamo.
Jy' uhor' undinganirije Ay  magambo meza. Umpugur' uyamenyeshe, Aya magambo ye. Ayo ni yo njya nkunda, Ni y' ampesh' amahoro.
Ni yo meza, ndayakunda, Anter' ibyishimo byinshi : Ni yo meza, ndayakunda,
Anter' ibyishimo.
Krist' aber' abantu bose Aya magambo meza. Mumwitabe, banyabyaha, Mwumv'
amagambo ye. Abayoboz' ituza, N' amagamb' atunganye.
Kwiza hos' ubutumwa bwe Bw'aya magambo meza. Muz' arabababarira, Mwumv’amagambo ye. Yesu ni We Mukiza, Utubeshahw iteka.
Mwa bitang' igicuri mwe, Muyoberw' umusaraba, Turababwira turira Yuko mubabaza Yesu.
Mpisemo guhora nkizwa,Ngashingwa mu gakiza ke;Sinzava mu gakiza ke
Mwa barets’ ubugingo mwe, Mukabuguran' iby'isi, Ubw’ ibyo bizabora se
Muzakuramo ndamu ki ?
Mwa barets’ igihugu mwe, Cyuzuy' ubuki n'amata, Mukimiranye vuba ye,
Musubiye mw Egiputa !
yemwe abavug' inkurumbi cya gihugu Siyoni,  mwit’ amananiza bshoboker'
uwizeye.
Dor’ amaraso ya Yesu ;ni  mo dukirizw’ ibyaha, Ngwino, dusubiraneyo, Tugere ku Musaraba !
Yemwe bakunzi ba Yesu, Mwihane, ye kubabara ! Mumaramaze kwitanga, Igihe ni kigufi pe !
Mwa batuy'imitwaro mwe, Ko mugifit'ingata se ? Turababwira turira Ko muri
kure ya Yesu.
Muze, musange Krisito, Ku ntebe ye y'imbabazi, Dor' abategerej' ubu ; Muz' arabababarira !

title: Teg’ amatwi, wumve ijwi rya Yesu

lines: Teg’ amatwi, wumve ijwi rya Yesu.
Arakongorera,—Akwinginga.
Ati: Wemere—Ko nkurokora: Ni . ..jye. ..Mucunguzi—Ntiwaza se?
Umvir' ijwi ryiza—Rigusaba ngo, Nganyir' amaganya,—Nyikorere.
Umuhungireho,—Umwihishemo. Arakuruhura—Unaniwe.
Ni wowe yazize—Ku Musaraba Emer' aguture—Ibyo byaha
Ur’ uw'intege nke :—W' arakomeye  Umwiyegurire,—Usugire.
Ubwo yakuguze,—Non' umwinjize Mu mutima wawe,—Akwimemo.
Mwami, wakomeretse: ni twe waziraga
wahemuw'utyo mwami Ushinyagurirwa.
Ker' utaraza mw isi, War'ufit' ubwiza !
Dor’ uko bagushyize Mur' abo bambuzi
Mpindukirir' undebe, Mukiza w'ukuri:
N'impano y'imbabazi Njya nkuboneramo.
Yesu, waramfiriye:N' ibyanjye wazize;
Ump' amahoro masa Kuko nkwiringira.
Kand' imipfire yawe Ni yo yankijije.
Intera kugushima Mu kubaho kose:
Imbabazi n' izawe, Mucunguzi wanjye.
Nah' urupfu rwantera, Nta cyakunkuramo.
No mw ipfa ryanjye, Yesu, Uzambe bugufi:
Urupfu ni runsinda Uzamar'ubwoba.
Kokw umubiri wanjye Uzabor' uveho;
Nyamara, nzakubona Mu maso,Mukiza.
Mukiza wanjye  mfite Ubwuzu n'ishimwe,
Ngo ndeb’ inkovu zawe Wagize kubwanjye!
Umpe kunesha rero, Nkuko wanesheje.
Hahirw' uzapfa apfira Muri wowe, Yesu
Umutwaro wanjye, Krisito, Warawikoreye. Bakubambye ku Musaraba,Ni jyewe wazize; Unkuraho wa mutwaro : Sinkiwikoreye !
Igikombe cyanjye cyarimo Kuvumwa n'urupfu; Nuk' ucyiranguza kubwanjye; Ibyo bisharira, Uherak’ ubisimbuza Ibyiza by'ijuru.
Uwiteka wang' ibyaha pe Yabanguy' inkoni Ariko si jye yakubise, Ahubwo ni
Wowe i lyo mibyimba, Krisito, Ni yo yankijije !
Haguy’ iy' nkundura, Yesu,Jye nkunamamw ubwo; Iguhitiraho ku Giti, Jye
ntiyanyagira. Yarakunshocaguriye; None, hareyutse.
So yakuy inkota ye yera,Aragusogota;  Umutima waw' uhinduka Urwubati rwayo.
Non' iyo nkot' iragimbye : Nta cy' ikintwar' ubu !
Jye napfanye nawe, Krisito, Ubwo wamfiraga; Urazuka, nzukana nawe,Uraz'
unturamo. Non' untungany' unyeze de, Uzangez' i Wawe.
N'iki cyankiz' ibyaha? N' amaraso yawe, Yesu.
N'iki cyanyeza rwose ? N' amaraso yawe, Yesu.
Ayo maraso ye Ni y' amboneza rwose : Nta cyampa gukira, nk' amaraso y'Umukiza.
Nta kindi cyantunganya,Nk'amaraso. yawe, Yesu, Nta kindi cyiru mfite, Nk'amaraso yawe, Yesu.
Nta cyantsembahw ibyaha,Nk'amaraso yawe, Yesu. Nta byanjye byamboneza,
Nk'amaraso yawe, Yesu.
Ni Wowe niringira N'amaraso yawe, Yesu, Ni Wow' ump' amahoro, N'amaraso
yawe, Yesu.
Nguhimbariza cyane Amaraso yawe, Yesu. Mwami, ndagushimira Amaraso
wamviriye.
Amaraso  Y’umucunguzi Niyo Soko Yoz’abanduye Niyo Yesu Abanyabyaha De Bakabonera  Rwose.
Ndaguhimbariza Mucunguzi Imbabazi Wangiriye Ukanyoz’ibyaha Nakoze Mu Maraso Wavuye
Urya Mwambuzi Mwabambanywe Ayarabutsw’aranezerwa Nanjy’umwihebe Mubi Nka We Untabare Umboneze.
Mwami Yesu Mwana W’intama Njya Ngukundira Mucunguzi Amaraso Yaw’atunganye Ayo Watuviriye.
Nta N’ikindi Kibasha Nkayo Kudutsembaho Ibicumuro No Gucungura N'abemeye Kwizer'umucunguzi.
Mperey’aho Nayaboneye Ava Mu Bikomere Byawe Nogez’urukundo Wankunze Nzagushima Ndinde Mpfa.
Nd’ino Mw’isi,Birananira Kugushim’uko Bikwiriye Nyum’uzamp’urundi Rurimi Njye Ngusingiz’iteka.
Amaraso y'Umukiza Yakuyiriye.
Yayaviriy' abagome N'abanyabyaha.
Amaraso y' Umukiza Yakuviriye, Rek' akoze, rek' akweze, Agukiz' ubu.
Amaraso y'Umukiza Ni y' atunganya. Rek’ atembe nk' umugezi, Akugeremo.
Nubw' ufit’ ibyaha byinshi,Kandi wanduye, Amaraso y'Umukiza Arakweza de.
Amaraso ni yo masa yanyishyuriye irya myenda yanjye yose,ndababarirwa.
Ubu nshiz' amanga cyane Kwinjir' Ahera, Kuko yaduhay  inzira Mu maraso ye.
Amaraso yo kunesha Ni yo ndwanisha, Nsind' ibyaha na Satani, Nshobojwe na yo.
Amaraso y'Umuhuza Wacu n'Imana, Ni y' ambonez' umutima ; Ndayasingiza.
Mbe, ntiwaturw' ibyo byaha byawe ? Usange Yesu ! Usange Yesu  Ntushaka no kubinesha rwose ? Wizer' amaras' akiza.
Amaraso,kokw ashobora  Imitim' ishobewe Amaraso y’ Umucunguzi Ni yo mas' atuneshereza.
Mbe, ntiwaturw' ubwigenge bwawe? Usange Yesu ! Usange Yesu ! Akugir’ umugwaneza nka we !Wizer' amaras' akiza !
Mbese, ntushaka no kwezwa dede?Usange Yesu ! Usange Yesu ! Emer' akoz’ ibyo byaha byose, Wizer’ amaras’ akiza !
Mbese, ntushaka kumuyoboka? Usange Yesu  Usange Yesu ! No kumusingiz’ iteka ryose? Wizer' amaras' akiza !
Numva  Yes ’Anyemeza
Ko  Mbuz’ Imbaraga
Ngo  Njye  Museng ’Iteka
Ntacyo  Nzamuburana
Yanyishyuriye Ya  Myenda  Yose Yambabariye  Ibyaha Atuma   Nera De.
Niw ’ Ufit’  Imbaraga
Zihagije Rwose
Zo Gukiz’ababembe
Zigakiz’umutima.
Singir ’Icyiza  Nkora
Nibesherejweho  N ’Ubuntu
Bwawe  Gusa  Nezwa
N’ Amaraso De.
Nasaga  N ’Uwapfuye
Mu  Mutima  Wanjye
Maze  Yes ’Aranzura
Kandi  Niw’Unkomeza
Imbere  Ya  Ya  Ntebe
Nzahagararayo
Nzaba  Njyany ’Iminyago
Nyishyikirize Yesu
Yesu yaje kunshaka, Ndi kure ,nzimiye, Anshyira ku bitugu Nukw arantarura  ! Maz’ abamarayika be. Baririmba basingiza.
Umv' uko yankunze  Umv' uko yanshatse ! Ibuk’ amaraso yanguze ! Mbur’uko
mbivuga, numiwe
Yasanze nkomeretse,Nukw aranyomora Ampumurira neza  At' Ur’ uwanjye ko! Sinari numv' ijwi nk'iryo, Nduhuka mu mutim’ u’bwo.
Anyereka n' inkovu Zo mu biganza bye, N'izatewe n'amahwa Zo mu ruhanga rwe. Nibaz’ icyo yambonyemo, Cyatumye yihangan' atyo!
None, tuban' iteka; Mu maso he hera Hamvir’ umucyo mwinshi, Uhor' unyobora;
Amp' ibikwiriye byose; Mbur' uko mbimushimira.
Nduhutse mu mutima,Amp' amahoro ye. Iteka ntegereje Umuns' azazaho,
Antahukan' angez' i We. Anguze n'amaraso ye.
Nari kure y'lmana mu ngoyi, Ntazi ko naboshywe; Mbohorwa n'amaraso ya Yesu, Ngez’ i Goligota.
Shimwa Gologota !Shimwa Gologoto ! Ni hw ibyaha byanjve byankuriweho.
Shimwa Gologota.
Yesu ni we wankuye mu mbohe !Njye muririmbira,  Indirimbo nshya nziza
yampaye; Ngez' i Gologota !
Yahamperey' Umwuka hw ingwate,Mwakira nishimye. Yemeye no kumba mu
mutima, Ngez'i Gologota.
Ngwino, sang' Unwkiza, mugenzi Nukw akubohore.Yesu  yahaniw' abanyabyaha
Rimw' i Gologota.
Genda umusangeyo! Gend' umusangeyo, Ahw ibyaha byanjye nabyogerejwe  Gend’umusangeyo
Ai Gitare Cy’Imana Reka Nguhungireho
Kubw’imbabazi Zawe Kera Waramenewe Non’ubu Nkwihishemo Umujinya W'Imana
Amazi N’amaraso Byo Mu Rubavu Rwawe Binkiz’uburyo Bwombi Urubanza
Rw’ibyaha N’imbaraga Mbi Zabyo Bye Kuzansind’ukundi.
Ibyo Twakora Byose N’umwete Wacu Wose N’agahinda Gasaze N’amarira
Adashira Byose Ntibyashobora Kudukurah’ibyaha
Ntacyo Nzanye  Mu Ntoki Cyabasha Kunshungura Simfit’icyo Naguha
Nizey’umusaraba Uwo Wamfiriyeho Niwo Njya Niringira.
Dore Nambaye Ubusa Ndakwinginze Unyambike Sinabasha Kwikiza
Ndagushakaho Ubuntu Unyuhagir’ibyaha Mutabazi Ne Gupfa.
Ushimwe, Mana , ko wampaye Yesu. Akankirish’ urupfu rw' akanzukira.
Haleluya, Nyirigira ! Haleluya  Amen! Haleluya, Nyirigira ngwino umpembure!
Yankirishjje wa Musaraba we, Singicirwahw iteka ku’bw' amaraso.
Nar' uwo gupfa, Yes' aransimbura. ibicumuro byamye ni byo yazize !
Ngwin' umpembure! maramw ubukonje !Ats' umurir' ubu mu mutima wanjye !
Umunsi Mwiza Nibuka
N’uwo Nakwemereyeho
Wamberey’umucunguzi
Njye Nkwiz’ibyawe Nishimye
Nsingize,Nsingize Yesu Wanyogej’ibyaha Anyigish’iby’inzira Ye Ngo Nsenge,
Nshime Nezerwe Nsingize,Nsingize Yesu Wanyogeje Ibyaha
Warangije Kundokora Nd’uwawe Nawe Ur’uwanjye Iryo Jwi Ryawe Ryinginga

Najyaga njya kw iriba ry'iyi si, Mfit' inyota nyinshi cyane, Naba ngiye kunyw'
agakam' ubwo, Nuko nkayabura, nkiheba.
Nuzuy ' agahinda n'ubwihebe,Mbuz' ibyo niringiraga; Maz' amaso yanjy' arahumuka, Ndakureba, Yesu, ndanyurwa
Yes' amp' amahoro y' atarondoreka Andinda mu byago byose. Uko mba kose, nzajya nishima, nti: Nguwe neza, ndatunganiwe.
Ni neza... Ndatuje... Nguwe neza , ndatunganiwe !
Satan' iy' antey' ankandas’imyambi ye,Njya mpeshw' amahoro menshi No
kwibuka Yes' uko yandengeye, Ava mw ijuru ngw anshungure.
Ibyaha byanjye yabyikoreye byose: Ntiyashigaje na kimwe Byabambwe byose ku Musaraba we : Yes' ashimwe  Yarankijije !
Kuv’ubu, kubwanjye kubaho ni Kristo; Ndetse, singitinya gupfa; Urupfu na rwo
ruzamber' indamu. Yes' ampay' amahoro menshi
Mumeny' iyo tujya: n' i bwami mw ijuru; Ntabw' ar’ i kuzimu mu mva.Ni twumva za
mpanda, tuzanezerwa. Uzagaruka ryari, Yesu ?
Ubw' Umwami Yes' ankunda , Nd' amahoro! Kubw' imbabazi ze nyinshi,Nd' amahoro! Nuhagiwe n'amaraso; Nkomezwa n'ubuntu bwinshi; Kand' amfashe n'ukuboko: Nd'amahoro!
Naho haz' i byago byinshi, Nd' amahoro  Yesu n' Umukiza wanjye:Nd' amahoro!
Niragij' Imana, Data; Nguma muri Yesu Kristo; Nejejwe n'Umwuka Wera: Nd'
amahoro!
Byose bizambera byiza: Nd' amahoro! No mu byago, nzaririmba:Nd'amahoro
Naho ndiho, naho napfa,Nzi ko nkundwa n'Uwiteka; Yes' amp' ibyo nkena byose:
Nd'amahoro.
Yesu, tuguhungiyeho; Udutabare, tudapfa.Nubwo tutabikwiriye,Utubabarire
Mukiz' utwemere Nubwo turi babi. Yesu, waradupfiriye: Mukiz’utwemere
Ntabwo twaguhish' ibyaha; turatsinzwe rwose arlko Amaraso yawe Yesu,yaratuviriye.
Ntabwo twashobora rwose Gutungany' ingeso zacu. Iyo tubigerageje, Biratunanira.
Dore, nkwikubis' imbere! Ungirir’ uko washaka. Sinshyanga Mwam’unkureho
Ingeso zose mbi.
b.
Numvis’ijwi ryawe, Yesu, ndagusanze, Ndaje, Mucunguz' unyoze Mu maraso yawe.
Mwami w'abami  waaramfiriye.Nje gupfa hamwe nawe, Ye, ku Musaraba.
Numvis' ijwi ryawe, Riti: Nyizigira ! Unkomereze kwizera, Kandi, tugumane.
Numvis' ijwi ryawe Ryinjiiye muri jye, Rimbwiriza kujya nkunda Nkuko naw'
unkunda.
Numvis' Ijwi ryawe,Wowe, wamfiriye! Mwami, mbane naw' iteka; Ni Wow'
unyizeza.
Ubu, nj'uko ndi, niringiye Gus' amaraso wamviriye Kandi yuko wampamagaye  Mucunguzi, nditabye, nditabye.
Ubu,nj’uko ndi, mbuyerezwa N'intambara yo mu mutima N'intimba nyinshi
n'ubwihebe: Mucunguzi, nditabye, nditabye.
Ubu, nj’uko ndi: sinabasha Kwikurahw ibinter' isoni; Niringiy’amaraso yawe:
Mucunguzi, nditabye, nditabye
Ndeger’Umusaraba , Nnar we, nkennye, mpumye; Nta kindi kindi nshaka : Ngusabye kunkiz’ubu.
Mwami ndakwiringiye Ayi Mucunguzi wanjye; Dor’uko nkunamiye  Mwami
Yes’unkiz  ubu.
Nakwifujije kera,Ndi mu ngoyi z'ibyaha; Maz’umbwiranez'uti: Ngukiz’ibicumuro !
Ubu ndakwihereje: End’ibyo mfite byose, Ubwenge n'imbaraga; Byose Yes’ubyakire.
Nizey’ibyo wavuze N'amaraso wavuye; Ndicuza gutinda ntyo: None, Yesu, nyakira!
Yesu, non’ungezemo ; Urakaza, Mukiza ! Nta n'ineng' umbaraho  Shimwa, shimwa, Nyakuza !
Nazimiriye kure yawe Non’untarure! Nagundiriy' ibyaha byanjye : Ndaje, noneho.
Nditabye  Nditabye Ntabwo nzongera. Nyemerer’ umbabarire. Mwami, nyakira!
Napfapfany' iyo myaka yose :Non’untarure  Nkwitwayeho, Mukiza wanjye Ndaje, noneho.
Narembejwe n’ibyaha byanjye :None untarure! Niringiy’ urukundo rwawe: Ndaje, noneho.
Wamviriy’amaraso yawe :Non' untarure! Ubwaw' uraz’ uranshungura  Ndaje,
noneho.
Umv’uko ntats' unkize, Yesu Non’untarure ! Mukiza, nyeza nk'urubura : Ndaje
noneho.
Mwumv' imbabazi z'Imana : Ntabwo zarondoreka ! Mbeg’ umunyabyaha nkanjye  Koko yababarirwa?
Ndaje, Yesu ..ndakwitabye.. Uko ndi ko...s' unyemere Ndaje, Yesu ndakwitabye
Mukiz’unyakire.
Nari kure y'Uw' unkunda,Mbabaz' umutima we, Kuko namwimag' ahw aba Mu
wanjye yapfiriye!
None Yesu, ndakwihaye,Umbohor' undokore. Ibi byaha binyomaho, Non’uz'
ubinkureho !
Haleluya : yanduhuye ! Singishidikany' ubu ! Ndi mu nzir’ijya mw ijuru,
Nuzuy’umunezero.

Nsiz' ububata n'umwijima, Ndaje, Yesu; ndaje, Yesu. Mbony’ umudendezo n'umucyo: Yesu, ndakwitabye! Nsiz’ubutindi n'uburema, Mbony' ubukire n'intege nyinshi. Mvuye mu byah' urankijije : Yesu, ndakwitabye !

Mvuye mu byago n'ibihendo, Ndaje, Yesu; ndaje, Yesu, Mbony' indamu mu rupfu rwawe, Yesu ndakwitabye! Mvuyemw intimba n'amarira, Ngeze mu byishimo. bidashira. Nshizemw induru, mpaw' impundu Yesu, ndakwitabye!
Nsiz' amahane n'ubwigenge,Ndaje, Yesu; ndaje, Yesu. Ngeze ku kwemer'
lby’ukunda,Yesu, ndakwitabye! Ntay' ibyanjye, nguhungiyeho; Mvuye mu bwihebe, nd' amahoro: Ntaye Satani, ngo mb' uwawe : Yesu, ndakwitabye!
Nsize gutiny' urupfu n'imva, Ndaje, Yesu; ndaje, Yesu. Mbony' umutim' ushyitse
mu nda,Yesu, ndakwitabye ! Nkuwe mu kanwa k'inyamaswa, Ntashye mu rugo
rw'intama zawe! Mpere none, nkugandukire: Yesu, ndakwitabye!
Ndagukurikira, Yesu; Nemey' umusaraba.Jye nta shinge, nta rugero : Urampagije wenyine.
Ndagukurikira, Yesu, Ubwo wanguz’amaraso; Ndakwihaye, Mwami Yesu: Kera
waranyitangiye.
Icyubahiro n'iby'isi, Sinkibimaranira. Kubwa Yesu, ndabiretse: Amp’ibviza byo
mw ijuru.
Nahw ab'isi bazanyanga, Ni ko bakugiriye. Ntibankund' akaramata: Wowe ntabw' uzanzinukwa.
Uwansek' ansuzuguye, Byakunsunikiraho. Uko bizamera kose, Uzabinyihanganisha.
Ko mpaw’urukundo rwawe, Har’ikindi nshaka se? Ibinezaneza by'isi, Simbishaka:
mfite Yesu.
Nshaka Yesu; nta wundi nifuza. Andengera mu byago by'iyi si. Nshaka Yesu; ni W' umpumuriza.Nah' undi yakwishoboza, jye Nshaka Yesu !
Nshaka Yesu  Nshaka Yesu Nshaka Yesu, ntasiba : Mu mahoro, mu byago, Ni
We nshaka wenyine;None n'iteka  ryose, Jye nshaka Yesu
Nshaka Yesu : n' inshuti yanjy’ubu. N' Umujyanam' uhor'unyobora. Nshaka Yesu,
ngw ansindir' Umwanzi;Jyenyine nzi ko nta cyo maze ; Nshaka Yesu.
Nshaka Yesu : ni we Murengezi. S’inshuti yac' abanyabyaha se? Nshaka Yesu :
nafashwa n'undi se? Ntawund’ ukund'abantu nkaWe : Nshaka Yesu !
Mukiz' utubonez' iminsi yose; Mu kubaho kwacu, tugusingize. Utubonekere,tur' abangizi; Nukw amahoro yaw’atwinjiremo.
Tugendan' iteka mu byiringiro; Tubabaye nabwo, tukwizigire. Hahirw’ uruhurwa
n'inama zawe, Ukamutabar’ ukamwikiriza.
b.
numvise ijwi ry'Umukiza, Anyihamagarira; None, mutim' ungomesha, Umvir'
Umucunguzi.
Akir' ubugingo bwanjye: Mwam' ubwitegekere; Ubwimemo, budakurwa Mu
mategeko yawe.
Ujy'ukoresh' uk' ushaka Ubu bugingo bwanjye; byanjye ndabigutuye: Databuja,
nd' uwawe.
No mu bihe byanjye byose, Komeza kunshorera N'imbaraga zawe zose;
Ujy'untegek' iteka.
Wowe, Mana, ndaguhimbaza Kukw ari nta yindi man’ibaho;Nguhaye n'umutima wanjye Ump' imbaraga z'Umwuka wawe, Mbashe gukor' ibikunezeza, Mw izina ry'Umwami wacu Yesu.
Nuzuzw’Umwuka wawe wera, Umutima wanjy' uwutegeke;Ujy'unyobor inzira
yawe, Ngo nyinyuremo ntajya nzimira; Kandi, ni nanirw' ujy'untabara, Ugez’ubw’uzansohoz’i Wawe.
Yesu, Mukiza wanjye, Nguhany' ibyishimo Uyu mubiri wanjye, Ng’ub’uwawe rwose.
Akir' ituro ryanjye, Mwana w'UwIteka, Utum’ Umwuka Wera, Umanukiremo,
Sintinya na gatoya Kukwiyegurira, Kubw'’imbabazi zawe, Murokozi wanjye.
Umuriro w'Umwuka Uz' ub’unyakemo, Umare mu mutima Ibitar’ibyawe.
Za vuba, Mwami Yesu, Ube Databuja; Iteka nzab’ uwawe Kuk' uhor'unkunda.
Mukiza Yesu, ntabara, Kukw abantu babiri Bari mu mutima wanjye, Umw' akund’und’agoma.
Ndengera  Ndengera Mwami wanjye, ndengera
Umwe ni we Mwuka wawe Unyiringiz’ijuru; Und’ahor anyoshya nabi, Ashaka
kunshumuza.
Mwami, sinkor' ibyo nkunda, Nubwo mpora mbyifuza.  Ibibi byo ndabikora,
Nubw’iteka njya mbyanga.
Murokoz' umucyo wawe Umurikire neza, Ngo wa muntu mubi nanga Atamperana rwose.
Iyo nirwanya ntyo, Mwami, Nta mahoro mba mfite. Ndagukunda, ndagushaka
Mfasha,nesh' uwo mubi
Kiz' imbata yaw' irushywa, Ihor'ikuganyira; Umpe n'ububasha bwawe Ngo njye
nsinda Satani.
Ndashak' uburuhukiro Mu bwami bwawe bwiza; Mfasha ngo wa wundi nanga
Atambuza kujyayo.
Mwami, ndakwimitse : wime Mu mutima wanjye, Sinibagirweya mahwa : Njyan' i Gologota !
Ibyabay’i Getsemane N’ibyo wababajwe byose, Sinzobyibagirwe, Mwami: Njyan’i Gologota.
Unyereke ya mva, Mwami,Aho bagushyize, Aho marayika wera Yaray' ataramye.
Nje nka Mariya, Mukiza, Kukurabukira; Nsanz’imva y’ irimw ubusa; Nshimy’Uwanzukiye!
Unkorer’ umusaraba,Niyange, mb’uwawe; Nsangire naw’ igikombe Wanyoye kubwanjye.Ndengera  Ndengera Mwami wanjye, ndengera
Mwami Yesu, ndagukunda, Ndakwihaye by'ukuri. Urukundo rwawe rwinshi Ni rwo rubinyemeza.Sinkibabazwa n'amakuba Yose nterwa n'iby'iyi si, Kuko mbyemereye kubwawe Kugira ngo ngushimishe.
Ndagukunda, Yesu Wemere kumpaka, Nta kindi cyampaza, Mwami, Keretse
wowe.
Mwami, ngwin’umpishurire Ibyiza wankoreye. Nubwo nizeye buhoro, Ngeza ku
Musaraba ! Nyigish’uko wankunze, Yesu, Nkiri mubi bikabije, Ngo nitegerez' igiciro Kimpesha kubabarirwa.
Ndushijeho kugukunda, Ndushaho kunezerwa; Ar' aheza cyangw’ ahabi,Nta bwo
mbur’amahoro.Ariko, Yesu, ntagufite, Nta mahoro nsigaranye; Iby'iyi si, nubw' ari
byiza, Nta cyo byamarira rwose.
Untwar' untwar’untware, Yesu, Mwami Yes’ untegeke ! Untwar' ungir'’imbata yawe Mwami Yes’untegeke!
Ibyaha byanjye byari byinshi: Mwami Yes’untegeke! Nyamara, byos' urabijyana: Mwami  Yes’untegeke!
Wangabiy’ amahoro menshi :Mwami Yes’untegeke! Ubwo wangeze mu mutima, Mwami Yes’untegeke!
Gumana nanjy’ iminsi yose :Mwami Yes’untegeke! Tutari kumwe, naba mfuye :
Mwami Yes’untegeke!
Yesu, ko wankunze ,bigatum’ umfira.None nakwim' iki ? Ndakwihay’ubu, Umutima wanjye n'ibyo mfite byose Non’ ubyiharire : sinkir’uwanjye.
Uhagaz’imbere y'intebe y'ubuntu, Itek’umvugira k’Uwiteka, So. Mwam' ujy’
unshoboza, ntwar’umusaraba.Nkwize n'imbabazi z'Uwanshunguye.
Mwami, ndakwinginga : umpe gusa nawe :Mpa kugushimisha, kand’unyigishe. Nige kugukunda;nige kukumvira, Nshak' abazimiye, mbakugezeho!
Yesu ndagukunda cyane ndakwihaye nzinutsw’ukw’ibyaha byanjye binezeza mucunguzi wanjye yesu nyir’ubuntu bwose ntabwo nigeze ngukund’uko ngukund’ubu.
Ngukunze nkwitur’uko wankunze kera Unyigur’i Gologota ntakwiriye
Ngukundiy’amahwa wanyambariye mu mutwe Ntabwo nigeze ngukund’uko
ngukund’ubu.
Nzahora ngukunda Yes’iteka ryose Ngihumeka njye ndirimb’ishimwe ryawe
Ningera mu rupfu nabwo nzagushima ntya nti ntabwo nigeze ngukund’uko
ngukund’ubu.
Ningera mu rugo rwa so  mwami Yesu nzajya mpaguhamiriz' iteka ryose
nkwikubis’imbere nzagusingiza cyane nti ntabwo nigeze ngukund’uko ngukund’ubu
Kugukorera ni byiza, Mukiza wanjye. Iri turo ntuye, Mwami, Rikunezeze.
Akir' ubugingo bwanjye, N’ ubwawe, Yesu; Kandi kubw’ ubuntu bwawe, Undind’
ibibi.
Mwam’icyo nifuza cyane N' ukwera nkawe : Nta n'ikindi nshaka, Yesu; Nzajya
nkumvira,
Mbe nk’intumwa zawe, Yesu, Njye ngukorera; Ngukurikire, Muvunyi, Nkubehw
iteka.
Singitinya n’amakuba N' ibyago bindi : Uwo nizeye ni Yesu N'agakiza ke.
Twese tujy’imbere hamwe Mu by'inzira ye, Turirimban’indirimbo, Tunesh’iteka.
kugukunda, mwami Yesu ,kuruhukir'i wawe, nkaba mu gituza cyawe,birankwiriye rwose.kwemer'amahoro yawe,kuko waje kunkiza,no kumenya kwera kwawe,bihora binezeza.
Amahirwe yanjye nkunda Ni Wowe, Yesu wanjye! Uhor’ untabar' iteka;Ntugir'
ubw’ uhinduka. Urukundo rwawe rwinshi, Waje muri twe mw isi Ngw abazimiy’
ubashake, Ubatarure bose.
Koko, yitanze kubwanjye No kumeny’aramenya. Yemeye kunshyira ma
nzu,Tukajya dusangjra. Mu ntege nke zanjye zose Arashaka kunkiza: Ni inyangamugay' akunda Kumfasha no kumpira.
Amaraso yawe, Yesu, Ni yo mas’ ashobora Kunkurahw ibyaha byanjye;Ampa
gukiranuka. Mwa kumbwir' ibindi byose:N’Umurokozi wanjye, Kandi yemera no
kumpa Amahoro y'iteka.
Uburyo Yes’ ankunda Burantangaza cyane. Ubuntu yangtriye Ni bwo bubimenyesha. Ya pay’ umunezero N'amabor' aseseka. Mbwirwa n'ibyo ko nd’ uwe Na We yukw ar’ u wanjye.
Ubwiza bw'isanzure N'uburabyo bwo mw isi; Nta wanezezwa na byo, Kerets’
afite Yesu. Ukw inyoni zishima Izina ry'Umuremyi Bimbwira ko nd’ uwawe Nawe
yuku  ur’ uwanjye.
Ker’ ibyantinyishaga None ntibinkangisha. Ibyiza birangota, Mukiza, nkwisegure. Ne kukujijinganya, Ne kugir’ amaganya: Kuko mbizi, nd’ uwawe, Kandi naw’ ur’ uwanjye.
Nd’ uwe wenyin’ iteka: Nta cyadutandukanya. Amahoro mez’ ampa Arut’ ay’isi
cyane. Nubw’ iyi si n’ijuru Byombi bizashiraho,azahor'ar'uwanjye,nanjye ngo
mb'uwe rwose.
Nta rukundo rusa n’urwa Yesu Rutazarangira: Ni rwo ruzagez' abana be Bose mu bwami bwe.
Banguka, winjire Mur’ urwo rukundo Ruhebuje rw’ Umucunguzi Watubabarijwe.
Nta wundi mutima nk’ uwa Yesu Wuzuy’ imbabazi, Kand’ amarira y'abantu be
Arayazi neza.
Nta rindi jwi risa n’irya Yesu Rihamagar’ abe, Ngo tumwitabe, tumwumvire, Tumukurikire.
Nta bihembo bisa n’ibyo Yesu Azah' abantu be, Azabiduh’ abamwizera, Tukamukorera.

Kokw arankunda, ndabizi neza :
Nanjye ndamukunda, ndamushima
Yes’ arush’ abandi bose—Kudukunda; Arush' ukw abavandimw —Bakundana.Nahw izindi nshuti zacu Zaduhararuka zose, Yesu ntabw’ ahemukira—Ab’ akunda.
N'iki gihesh’ ubugingo—Budashira ? S’ ukumenya Yesu wacu—Udukunda
?Twarazimiye nk'intama. Yes' aradushakashaka, Atubony’ atwinjiz' ubwo—Mu rugo rwe
Tumumenye kw ar' inshuti—Yishimira Kuduh' imigisha yose—N'imbabazi.Imitima
yac’ ikunda Kumvir’ iyi Nshuti yacu No kumwizigira cyane—Tudatinya.
Kand’ ibyaha byacu byari—Bikabije: Yes’ aterwa n'urukundo—Kudupfira :Ni byo
bituneshereza; Ni byo biturind' ibibi, Tukayoboka yanzira—Iger’ i We.
Har' umukunzi nka Yesu wacu? Oya ye, nta n'umwe! Nta n'udukiz' ubumuga nka We: Oya ye, nta n'umwe !
Yes' az' ibiturushya byose; Atuber' umuyobora. Har' umukunzi nka Yesu wacu?
Oya ye, nta n'umwe !
Har' und’ utungan' akera nka We? Oya ye, nta n'umwe! Nyamara nta wiyoroshya
nka We:Oya ye, nta n'umwe.
Nta munsi n'umw' adusigirira; Oya ye, na hato !Haba n'ijoro tutaba kumwe, Oya
ye, na hato !
Yes' urankunda, Mukiza mwiza ; Yes' urankunda : sinz' icyakunkundishije !Waje kunkiza, nd' umunyabyaha; Ubwo wanshunguye, nagupfira !
Njye nguhimbaza, Mukiza mwiza ! Njye nguhimbaza, Mucunguzi wanjy' unkunda. N'jye nguhimbaza, Mukiza mwiza:Nzak uririmbir' ibihe byose.
Waje kunkiza, Mukiza mwiza; Waje kunkiza: wabyemejwe n'iki, mbese?Icyo nzi
n'uko wabay' inshungu,Ubwo wamfirag' urupfu rubi.
Nshorera, Yesu, Mukiza mwiza : Nshorera, Yesu; jy'ungez’ ah' ushaka hose,Mu
nzira nziza, cyangwa no mu mbi, Ngcr' ikirenge mu cyawe, Yesu.
Yes' uzampemba, Mukiza mwiza: Yes' uzampemba, ntakwiriy' ubuntu bwawe
Kandi nzareba n'ubwiza bwawe, Nguhimbazanye n'abera bose
Ndabaririmbira—Iby’Uwamfiriye , Wankunze mfit' ibyaha, narararutse Wambonyemw iki, Krisito, Ukaza mwis’ukamfira ?
Yasiz' ingoma ye,—Nukw aramanuka; Baramusuzugura, ntibamwemera.Har’ indi nshuti nka We se Yakund' abayihinyuye ?
Baramushingije,—Bashash'imyambaro Ngo, Hozana; hahirw' Umwami
Krisito!Bukeye, barahinduka,Bati: Nabambwe ! Nabambwe !
Bafash' Umwam’ubwo,—Baramuhemura; Bakiz’umwambuzi, babamba Krisito. Iby'arabyihanganira,Ngw abon' ukw aducungura.
Yavuye mw ijuru,—Aza mur' iyi si, Abur' aho yarambik' umusaya we; Amfira ku
Musaraba,Ngo nanjy' angeze mw ijuru.
Ntabwo nzarambirwa—Kubaririmbira Iby' urukundo rwe n'uko yababajwe. Yanyemeye nk'inshuti ye:Nzavuga hos' izina rye!
Yesu, nguhagaz' imbere, Nibaza binyobeye Icyakunkundishij' utyo,Nd' uwatsinzwe, mpindanye.
Biranyobeye, birantangaje :Nzajya mbitangarira !biranyobeye, birantangaje,
Yuko wankunz' utyo, Yesu !
Wasenze kubwanjy' utya, ngo :Ntibib' uko jye nshaka. N' ibyaha byanjye
byakwishe, Ntabw' ari za nguma nsa !
Birya byuya by'amaraso,Ntangar' iyo mbyibutse: tbyo byabaye kubwanjye Rya
jor' i Getsemane.
Wishyizehw ibyaha byanjye, Bihinduka nk'ibyawe; Wehoho nta cyo wakoze : Ni
jye bakujijije!
Wabambwe mu cyimbo cyanjye, Ng' unkize kurimbuka, Ahubwo nzajye mw ijuru,
Ngushim' ubudasiba
Ni jye, Yesu, witanze Kera ku Musaraba, Mbitewe n'urukundo Ngo ngukiz' ibyaha byawe. Mugenzi, narakwitangiye ; Wanyituy' iki wo we ?
Narets' ubwiza bwanjye Nari mfite mw ijuru, Nsig' umucyo kwa Data, Nza mu
mwijima w'iyi si,Naretse byose nkurengera : Wants' iki kubwaruye ?
Banyish' urupfu rubi, Birut' uko byavugwa; Navushijw' amaraso Ng' utazapfa
nabi nawe Nakwihanganiy' ibyo byose : Wanyihanganiy' iki?
Navuy' i Wanjy' i bwami, Nger' ah' uri mw isi mbi, Nkuzanir' agakiza N'ubugingo
budashira.Ko nakugabiy' impan' ubwo, Wigeze kuntur' iki ?
Mukiz' umpe kumenya ,Naho kab' agace, K'urukundo rw'igitangaza Rwatumy' udupfira.
Umenyeshe, Mukiza, Uko wababajwe, Ubw' Uwera wang' ibyaha pe
Wishyiragahw ibyanjye.
Umenyesh' ibyo, Yesu, Kuko bikomeye, Bikarut'uko byashobora Kumenywa
n'umuntu.
Mbes' imbereri, Yesu, ni zo zakubambye ? Oya si zo, ni za mbabazi Wangiriy'
ubwanjye.
Ntangajwe na rwa rupfu Wamfiriye, Yesu, Ko rwashoboye kunshungura Ngo
nkire, Mundane,
Ni rwo runkiz' ibyaha Bose bambonaho; Si byo byonyine: runkuramlo N'ibinyihishemo,
Mukiza, nshenjagura; Men' ibinangiwe! Unyemeze yuk' unesheje : Unyimemo,
Mwami.
Umvir' ijwi rya Yesu, Ni we Mukiza wawe. Umv’arakubaz’ ati: Munyabyah' urankunda ?
Umugore yabasha  Kwibagirw' umwana we?  Nahw ibyo byashoboka,  Jyeho
nzajya nkwibuka.
Ni jye wakubohoye, Nkuvur’ibikomere;Ni jye waguhabuye;  Ni jyemucy'ukwakira.
Kand’urukundo rwanjye Ntirubasha gushira; Rurut' urandi rwose, Kuko
rutarangira.
Mu gihe gikwiriye, Nzakujyana raw ijuru; Uzabon' ibyishimo : Mbes' urankunda cyane ?
Mwami, birambabaje K' urukundo ngukunda AH ruke hanyuma Y'urwo rukundo
rwawe.
Ndagukunda buhoro, Nubwo bidahebuje. Nuk' umpe kurushaho Kugukunda,
Mukiza.
Jye nahoze ndengerwa N'inyanja y'urupfu , Ntwawe n'ibicumuro, Mpotorwa n'ibyaha; Maze ndabukwa Yesu,Ndamutakambira; Aransingir' aramfat’ankuramo.
Nakijijwe n'ubuntu bwe Nta wundi wandokoye, atari We.
Nawe, munt' urengerwa. Ubur’amas' ubu ! Reb' uwo Murokozi:Aragukuramo !
Imiraba ntibura Kumvira Nyira yo: Arashaka kugukiz' umwemere !
Haz’ibyago noneho, Cyangw' imibabaro, Nzi ko ntazazikama: Yes'
azankuramo.Azamaramw ubwoba, Amp’ibinkwiriye. Ni kw azakugirira, n'umwemera.
Mbeg' urukundo rwaw’umfitiye ! Sinarumenya: rurahebuje.Mukiza wanjy' umpishurire, Rumpumurize no kunyobora,Ni nteshuka.
Urwo rukundo narugera nte? Ruransumba ; sinarurondora. Njyendwerekana
gus’umfashije, Njye mvug' uko rukiz’abangizi B'abihebe.
Urwo rukundo naruvuga nte, Ko ntabon’amagamb' akwiriye ? Nyamar' akanwa
kanjye kifuza Guhora nshimish’Umurokozi Unkund’atyo.
Urwo rukundo narushimira nte IMukiza wanjye, ne guceceka  Ndirimb' imbabazi
wangiriye, jy' umunyabyaha wakugomeye, Ukankiza !
Nta cyo nabasha kugushimisha; Mukiza wanjye, nd’umukene pe.
Niringiy’urukund’umfitiye:Mbes' Uwankunz' akanyitangira,yanyim'iki?
Ndashaka, Yesu, kukugumaho, Ur' isoko y'amaz' ahoraho,Njye mpore nkunywah'
ubudasiba, Umar' inyota n'umubabaro, Sinkuveho!
Mukiz' ubwo nzagera mw I juru, Amaso yanjy’akakwirebera, Ni h’ urukundo
rwawe nzabona Uko ndumeny’ uko ndusingiza
Mbwir’amagambo ya Yesu; Mbwir’ibyo yankoreye.
Ndirimbira n'indirimbo Irut' izindi zose:
Ya yindi y'abamarayika Ba bungeri bumvise
Bat' Uwiteka yubahwe, Kand' amahor' abe mwisi.
Mbwir' amagambo ya Yesu; Mbwir' ibyo yankoreye. Ndirimbira n'indirimbo Irut' izindi zose.
Mbwir’iby'iminsi yamaze Ashukwa n'Umwanzi we,
N'uko Satani yatsinzweN'ljambo ry'Uwiteka.
Mbwira n'ibyiza yakoze N'iby'imibabaro ye
N'uko yahinyuwe n'abe N'uko yasuzugurwaga.
Mbwir' iby'urupfu rwa Yesu N'iby'Umusaraba we
N'uko yahambw' akazuka:Non' ariho, ntagipfa.
Mbwir' urukundo rwe rwinshi Rwatumy' anshungur’atyo.
Ayi we ! bintey' agahinda:Yes'ibyo yambabarijwe!
Nganirir’ibya Yesu N'iby'urukundo rwe
N'uko yavuye mw ijuru,Ngwaz’ aducungure.
Ni yo magamb' ankwiriye, Nd'indushyi,mpindanye.
Yamviriy’ amaraso ye Ngw’anshungure, mb' uwe.
Nganirir' ibya Yesu ( x 3) N’iby’urukundo rwe.
Twagereranya n'iki Ibyo yababajwe  Ntiyanze kutubambirwa Ngwadukiz’ibyaha.
Bisubiremo witonze, Ne kubyibagirwa, Ngo men’ icyo yankoreye n'uko yanshunguye.
Onger' unyibuts' ibye,Mbimeny’uko biri. Bivug' uburyo bworoshye Nk'ubwiriz'
umwana.N'umbonan' umubabaro, Ujy'umber' inshuti, Umbwir' iby'ubwo buntu bwe Ngo bimpumurize.
Hor' ubimbwir' iteka :Ntibizandambira. Umva, ni jye munyabyaha Yesu yaj'
ashaka! Erega, n'igitangaza : Mbyamamaze hose, Uwer' utagir' inenge Kumfira ndi mubi!
Uzonger'ubimbwire Iteka n' ubona Yuko gukund’iby'iyi si Binyaz' umugisha.
Unyibuts' iby'isi yindi Irut' iyi cyane, Ngo mbon' Umwami w'iyo si, Antunganye, nyurwe.
Uhereye kera kose, Yesu yahoze mw ijuru, Ar' i buryo bw'Uwiteka, Ni yo Man' isumba byose.
Maz' urukundo rwe rwinshi Rwamuzanye mur'iyi si, Avuka nk'abandi bantu,
Ashir' ubwan' arakura.
Atangira no kwigisha Ibyiza by'Uwiteka, Se; Kand' abarwayi bizeye Yakundaga
kubakiza.
Ijambo rye ryakizaga Impumyi n'abaremaye; Yakoraga ku babembe Bamwizeye, bagakira.
Kandi n'abari bapfuye, Yabashaga kubazura; Nta bwo Yesu yananiwe Gukiz'
umunt' umwizeye.
Kand' ikirut' ibyo byose, Yabwirizag' abakene Iby' urukundo rw'Imana
N'iby'agakiza k'iteka.
Maz' abantu babi cyane Batemey' ibyo yavuze Batewe n'ishyari ryinshi  Kumwic'
urupfu rubi pe.
Yabambishijw' imbereri Kubwacu, ku Musaraba; Batoboy' ibiganza bye ;
Byakirishag' imbabazi.
Dor' uko yadupfiriye, Azir' ibyaha bya twese; Yapfuye mu cyimbo cyacu Kubw'
urukundo rwe rwinshi.

Kand' uz' ahw ur'amwizeye; Ntiyabura kumwakira. Yarabisezerany' ati : ,
Sinzamuheza na hato
Yes’ avukir’i  Betelehemu bamuryamishije   mu  muvure
n’umunyambabazi  nyinshi  cyane ,Ng’uko  yaje anshaka
Ng’uko  yaje anshaka (x2)
N’umunyambabazi   nyinshi cyane
nguk’uko yaje anshaka
Yesu  yanshunguriye ku giti kand’ abohor’ umutima wanjye
ntangazwa   cyane n’imbabazi ze ,yaziz’ ibyaha byanjye
yaziz’ ibyaha byanjye(x2)
Ntangazwa cyane n’ imbabazi ze
yaziz’ibyaha byanjye
Yesu ntahwema gukiz ’abantu ntitugasubire   mu ngeso mbi
ngo tuzabane na We mw’ ijuru, Araduhamagara
Araduhamagara (x2)
ngo tuzabane na We mw’ijuru,
araduhamagara
Yes’ azagaruka atujyan’ iwe tugumane na  We iminsi yose
Kuko y abisezeranye natwe azaza  ntazatinda
azaza  ntazatinda (x2)
kuko yabisezeranye  natwe
azaza ntazatinda
Hozana, singizwa, Yesu , Mukiza mwiza : Watumenyesheje Urukundo rw'Uwiteka.
Usingizwe, Mwami :Wavuye mw ijuru, Uzanir' ab'isi Agakiza keza. (X 2)
Hozana, singizwa, Muvunyi w'ubugingo;Imitim' ishime iryo zina ryawe ryiza.
None turirimbe lzi ndirimbo nshya,Ngw abana b'Imana Banezerwe bose. (x 2)
Hozana, singizwa, wowe, Nshuti y'abantu. uwihanganye wese ntabwo wanga
kumwaklra.
wowe, Mwami mwiza, Waje kutwigisha No kutumenyesha ..Uk' ukiranuka. (x 2)
Hozana, singizwa, Yesu, Mukiza wacu; Wemeye kwitanga kubw' ibicumuro byacu,
Wicisha bugufi, Maz' upfira bose, Kugira ngw abawe : Babon' ubugingo. (x 2)

Yesu yaje avuye mu ijuru,
Araza, Araza.
Yabaye igitambo abishaka,
Arapfa, Arapfa.
Maze asubira mu ikuzo
Ry’Imana, Ry’Imana.

Nkubona mu ntebe ya cyami
Uganje, Uganje,
Ntama wabaye ikivume
Ku giti, Ku giti,
Wamamajwe n’Imana ubwayo
Umwami, Umwami.

Kuko vuba tuzakubona
Ku bicu, Ku bicu.
Twifuza Mukiza, Mwigisha
W’ikuzo, W’ikuzo,
Kugukunda, kugukorera
Iteka, Iteka.

Maze uko tugenda mu isi
Bimenywe, Bimenywe
Ko tugukurikiye Yesu,
Mu iyi si, Mu iyi si,
Mu byishimo no mu makuba,
Turwana, Turwana.

Dore umuseke uratambitse,
Ni ukuri, Ni ukuri :
Izuba riritamuruye
Hirya iyo, Hirya iyo,
Mu mpinga murebe igitondo
Kiraje ! Kiraje !
Yesu Ni We Nihishemo Yamberey’ubuhingiro
Nta Cyankuraho Amahoro Yamberey’ Ubuhungiro
Umwami N’igitare Gikomeye Gikomeye, Gikomeye,Umwami N’igitare Gikomeye Yamberey’ Ubuhungiro
Ku Manyw’amber’ Igicucu yamberey’ Ubuhungiro
Amber’itara N’ijoro Yamberey’ Ubuhungiro
Mu Mvur’ambera Ubwugamo Yamberey’ Ubuhungiro
Nta N’ubw’imiv’ Itemba Yamberey’ Ubuhungiro.
Nta Byago  Byanter’ubwoba Yamberey’ubuhungiro
Nta Mwanzi  Wese Wankanga Yamberey’ Ubuhungiro.
Ntabyo Nzav’aho Yes’ari Yamberey’ Ubuhungiro
Na We Ntazampemukira Azamber’ Ubuhungiro
Mbumbatiwe nawe, Yesu , Nta kizampangara, Kand' urukund' umfitiye Ni rwo runduhur' ubu.Numvis' amajwi meza Y'abatugiy' imbere; Bahora baririmba, Bashima Yesu, bati :
Mbumbatiwe nawe,Yesu, Nta kizampangara, Kand' urukund' umfitiye ni rwo
runduhur' ubu.
Mbumbatiwe nawe, Yesu; Ntabwo nkiganyira. Nta cyo Satan' antwar’ ubu N'
amahane ye yose.Kand' amakuba na yo Ntashobora kunsinda. Ibyago by'isi byose Ntibyadutandukanya.
Yesu, Buhungiro bwanjye, Yesu wamfiriye, Wowe, Rutare nshinzweho,
Nzakwiringir' iteka.Nuko, njye nihangana : Dor' iri joro ribi Vuba rigiye gucya,
Mpereko njye mw ijuru !
Mana, Nkuko  Wafashaga Ba Sogukuruza ,
Niko Natweuzadufasha Mu Myak’irimbere.
Umuyaga W’ishuheri Urawuturinda.
Uzatuber’ubuturo Budashir’iteka.
Kera Abakwiringiraga Bari Mu Mahoro.
Tugufite, Ntitwifuza Undi Murengezi.
Imisoz’itararemwa,Is’itarabumbwa,Uhereye Kera Kose,Ur’uko Wahoze.
Imyaka Igihumbi Mana.Ni Myinshi Kuri Twe.
Kuri  Wow’iguhwaniye N’umuns’umwe Gusa.
Imyaka Ijyan’iby’iyi  Si Nk’amaz’ahurura,
Bikibagirana Vuba Nk’inzozi Z’umuntu.
Mana, Wadutabaraga Mu minsi yakera
na non’uzaturengera tugeze kugupfa

title: Utinyuke kuyoborwa Mu nzira nziza y'Imana

lines: Utinyuke kuyoborwa Mu nzira nziza y'Imana.
Kukw ishyikir' ari ryiza, Ugend' ucamw uyoboka.
Ntutinye gut' ibya kera, Byiguhindish' imishitsi
Kuk' umucyo w'Uwiteka Wakir' ah' ugenda hose.
Urwanir' ibyiza byose N’ ubihorw’ uzabipfire.
Ujye wubahish' Imana Ng' uzabe mu cyubahiro.
Amahoro Yesu—Ah' abantu be Ntagir' akagero,—Ntarondoreka;
Ajy'ahumuriza—Abayafite; N' utayata, ntabwo—Wayakurwaho.
Wiringir' Imana :—Uyiringira  Ntabur' amahoro—Mez' adashira
Abo Yes' arindish’—Amaboko ye Nta mubish' ubasha—Kubageraho;
Nta magany' abasha—Guhagarika Imitim' irindwa—N'Umucunguzi.
Ibyishimo byose—N'ibyago byacu Biva mu rukundo—Rw'Umwam' Imana
We gushidikanya;—Jy'uyiringira; Ntiyahemukira—Uyizer' atyo.
Mwemere kw Iman' ibaha umurokozi , witeguye kubakiza, ubakwiriye.mu ijuru  no mw isi yose, ni We nyir'ububasha;kand' ubony' uwo Mukiza Aranezerwa.
azatuma muba beza, Mumere nka We; umukurikira wese  Ntabw' azaneshwa. Mu rugamba, ntabahana;Ahor' abarwanira; Kand' ubwe yemeye rwose Kubarengera.
Mukiz' ubwaw' ubabwira Iby'amahoro, Yuk' unyuz' inshuti zawe Mu nzira nziza.
Kand' ubwaw' urabarinda Kugira ngo be kugwa,Bave mu makuba yose Bayanesheje.
Mwam' ibyago ni bitera Cyangw' amakuba, Utwongerer' imbaraga,Tukwiringire.
Maze twizigiy' ibyawe,Dutumbire mw ijuru; Twishimire kuzabona Wa munsi mwiza.
Imana ni yo mwungeri Undagiz' urukundo; Niringiye yuko ntazakena, Kuko nd' intama ya Yesu.
Andyamisha mu cyanya cye Cy'ubwatsi bwiza cyane,Anjyan' i ruhande rw'
imigezi, Itemba nez' idasuma.
Ansubizamw intege nshya, Zinkomez' umutima,Anyobor' inzir' igororotse Kubwa rya zina rye ryera.
Nubwo naca mu gikombe Cy'umwijima w'urupfu, Sinagir' ikibi ntinya cyose, Kuko turi kumw' iteka.
Kand' ujy'undindish' inkoni Yawe n'inshyimbo, Mana, Nukw ibyo bizampumuririza No mu gicucu cy'urupfu.
Untunganiriz' ameza Mu maso y'abanyanga, Unsize n'amavuta mu mutwe, Ump'
igikombe cyuzuye.
N'ukur' imbabazi zawe Zizanyomahw iteka;Nanjye nzaba mu nzu y'Uwiteka
Ibihe byose, nishima.
Jy'uba maso, wowe muntu wizeye :Mu gitondo, jya wisung’ Imana, Kuk' Umwanzi yoshy' abataba maso Ngw abagushe kukw abanga.
Jy'uba maso : wicogora  Jy'uba maso : senga
Jy'uba maso, no ku manyva y'ihangu, Iby'isi byibagij' iby'ijuru; Weho, gir'
umwanya wo kwiherera, Ng’ useng' Umukiza wawe.
Jy'uba maso n'imunsi na n'ijoro, Wibuk' ibyiza by'inshuti Yesu; Ujy'umushakish'
umutima wawe : Mubwir' ibikubabaje.
Jy'uba maso, hose mu gihe cyose : Satan' akubikiriye hose, Ashak' uburyo
yaguseseramo, Ngo yimur' Umwami Yesu
Mwunger’ udukunda,—Jy' uturagira, N'uduhora hafi,—Twatiny' iki se? Tugukurikire,Iy' ujya hose,
Naho haba habi—Cyangwa se heza.
Mwunger' udukunda,—Tuz' ijwi ryawe, Uduhamagaye,—Turanezerwa Kand' iy’
uduhannye,Turabyemera. Tur' intama zawe :—Utwiharire.
Wavuy' amaraso,—Mwungeri mwiza, Kugira ngw intama—Uducungiire. Washyize kuri twe Ikimenyetso,Ni cyo Mwuka Wera,—Udutuyemo.
Mwunger' uturinde,—Uturengere Amasega mabi—Ye  kutwegera. Nta cy'
azadutwara,Kuk' ukomeye. Turikumwe, byose—Biranesheka.
We kwumvir' Umubi ujy' agushuka. Umwumviye wese ab' acumuye: Wamutsinda none kubw' Umukiza, Byagufash' ubundi kujy' umunesha.
Saba Yes' agufashe, Agukize mu moshya; Azahor' akurinda, Akuneshereze.
Wirind' ubucuti bw'abantu babi; : Bakunda kukoshya gukor' ibibi. Ntukavug'
ijambo ritey' isoni, Wubahe n'izina ry'Jmana yera.
Ujy' ugira neza, ufash' abandi; Wirinde kubeshya, ahubw' ujy' uba
Inyangamugayo, kukw iby' ari byo Bikundwa na Yesu ujy' agufasha.
Unesha Satani byamwandikiwe Kw azahabw' ikamba n'Umwami Yesu.Tugir'
intege nke, nyamara Yesu Ni we Mutabazi, udushoboza.
Mwen' Imana yizerwa ,Waterwa n'ubwoba ? Mbega, ntiwatorewe Umwam' ugukunda ? Ng' umeny' Uwagutoye,Uce mu nzira ye, Unyuz' ikirenge mu cye Kukw ari we Shobuja.
N’ ubabara, wibwire Kw akubabarira; Niihagir' ugutuka, Umubabarire; Wizigir'
ugukunda :Shikama kigabo,Ng' uzatsind' abanzi bawe, Uberek' urukundo.
N' ubon' ibiruhanya,Ukumva k’ utsinzwe, We kugir' agahinda, Meny' ibigufasha;
Ngibi : senga, wizere;Komeza gusenga; Maz' ureb' Umusaraba W'Umwana
w'Uwiteka.
iyutewe n'amakub' akomeye, ukiheb' ubonye ko bicitse pe, jyubar' imigisha yaw' ukw ingana ! erega ni myinshi yo gutangaza !
Bar' iyo migisha nonaha, ly' Jmana yakugabiye. Uyibare Ntusige n'umwe  Erega
ni myinshi yo gutangata .
Nturemerewe, se, no kwiganyira ? ugira ngo ntibicyihanganirwa ?  Bara ya migish' Iman' ijy'iguha, Umutitn' ushyike munda, wishime !
Har' abakurushij' amajyambere, Arikw aya Yesu ni y’ ahebuje ! Ereg' ubutunz'
ufite mw ijuru, Bwo nta wabugura ! Nuko, humura !
Amakuba naho yaba mensh' ate. We kwiheb' Iman' irayategeka. Wibuk'
imigisha yakugabiye ! Byos' izabitungany'ikuyobore!
ly' urushye, iy'uremerewe, Bibwire Yesu, bibwire Yesu ! ly' ukumbuy' abakunzi bawe, Byos' ubimuganyire !
Bibwire Yesu, bibwire Yesu ! Ni We nshut' ihebuje, Nta n'indi wabon imeze nka
We; Byos' ubimuganyire
Ibyo byago, ndetse n'amarira, Bibwire Yesu, bibwire Yesu ! Bya byaha bihishwe bikunesha,Byos' ubimuganyire !
Ubw' utiny' indwara no gupfusha. Bibwire Yesu, bibwire Yesu  Ubwo wibaz'
iby'umunsi w'ejo Byos' ubimuganyire!
Mbes' ugir' ubwoba bwo kuzapfa ? Bibwire Yesu, bibwire Yesu  Ntuzi yuk'
Umwami Yes' azaza ? Byos' ubimuganyire!
Impara yaguy' umwuma Nkukw ishak' amazi, Mana ni ko njya nkwifuza Ng' umpemburish' ubuntu.
Ni Wowe Man' ihorabo, Maz' amar' inyota; Ni ryari nzakwirebera, Mu maso,
Mucunguzi ?
Mutima wanjy' uhagaze Ubabajwe n'iki ? Wiringir' Itazabura Gukiz'
uwihanganye.
Uwifuz' Imana wese Imuhaz' ibyiza, Nuko nizere, nishime, Nshim' imbabazi
zayo.
Mwa nshuti za Yesu mwe , Nimuze, twamamaze Hos' umunezero wacu, Nukw indirimbo z'ishimwe Zizamuke ziger' i bwami mw ijuru.
Turajy' i Siyoni, Ku murwa mwiza w'Imana, Tunyur' inzir' ijya mw ijuru: Ku
murwa w'Imana yacu.
Utaz' Imana yacu Yaziririmb’ ate se ? N'abana b'Umwami basa Bashobora
gusingiza Uwabacunguye, nkuko bikwiriye.
Umurwa w'i Siyoni Wuzuy' ibyiza byinshi, Kandi mu nzir' iganayo . Tutaragera
mw ijuru, Twahaw’ ingwate yabyo ngo tunezerwe.
Muhumure noneho ! Nimuze, twishimane. Tugende turirimbana, . Duca mu bwatsi bwa Yesu; Tugiye mw is’ irut' iyi, ni mw ijuru.
Mur'iyo nzir' iruhije , Mbese, muragana he ? Turagana mu gihugu Iman' itunganije. Mu bikombe n'imisozi.Ni ho duca tujy' i bwami, Ni ho duca tujy' i bwami: Nshuti, muze, tujyane!
Mur' icyo gihugu gishya, Ariko mwizey' iki? Izaduh' imyenda yera N'amakamb'
adashira Na ya mazi y'ubugingo,Tubane n'Iman' iteka, Tubane n'Iman' iteka :
Nshuti, muze, tujyane !
Mugend’ uko muri kose, Nta n'ibyago mutinya ?  Uwitek' azaturinda, Umwuk'
udukomeze . Uwitek' adutabare, Yesu, na W' atujy’ imbere, Yesu na W' atujy'
imbere : Nshuti, muze, tujyane !
Natwe twaza, mwaturinda, Ngo tujyan' aho mujya ? Nuko, tubikunze
cyane,Twishimye bhebuje. Nimuze, tutabasiga : Yes' aradutegereza; Yes'
aradutegereza  Nshuti, muze, tujyane !

title: Tugiy' i wacu mw ijuru :Muze, mwisigara !

lines: Tugiy' i wacu mw ijuru :Muze, mwisigara !
Gusingiz' Umucunguzi: Muze, mwisigara !
Abagezeyo baragwiriye;
Baranezererw' Umwana w'lntama.
Abandi ban mu nzira :
Muze, mwisigara.
Hazab' umucyo mw ijuru :Muze, mwisigara
Muve mu mwijima mubi :Muze, mwisigara !
Har' ikamba Yes' azatwambika;
Tuzanezeranwa n'abakijijwe,
Ibyiza tubisangiye :
Muze, mwisigara !
N' ushaka ko tujyanayo, ihane ! Ihane !
Mwiringir' agukiz' ubu ;Ihane ! Ihane !
Kand' uwo mutwaro wikoreye,
Mwemerer' awuguture uruhuke,
Ngo tuzabane mwijuru :
Ihane ! Ihane !

title: Dor' inzir' ijya mw ijuru n' imwe

lines: Dor' inzir' ijya mw ijuru n' imwe : N’ iya Yesu n'Umusaraba we. Ni mpush' inzira y'Uwambambiwe.Sinzahabona n'Umucy' ubayo.nta yindi nziratuzabona : Nta yiriho, haba n'imwe,n'ukur' inzir' ijya mw ijuru N' iy'Umusaraba.
Nuhaka kwinjir' Ahera cyane, jy' imbere y'Imana yera, mu nzira twaciriwe nshya;
y'amaraso y'Umwami Yesu.
Nsezeye ku nzira z'isi zose : sinzazinyuramw uhereiy' ubu.data arampamagar’ ati: Ngwino ! nzakugez' aho wateguriwe
Genda mu mucyo wa Yesu, Aguhishurire Ubury' Umwuk' afatanya Abana b'umucyo.
