N' ugendera mu mucyo we, Uraba wuzuye N'lyera yang' umwijima, Ituye mu
mucyo,
N' ugendera mu mucyo we, Ibyaha byakwishe Birozwa n'amaraso ye, Nuk'
uhumanuke.
N' ugendera mu mucyo we, Azagutinyura Imva n'urupfu, wibuke Ko yabinesheje.
Ugendere mu mucyo we, Umwijim' ushire, Uvirw’ iteka n'umucyo Wiman' ihoraho.
Kugendera mu mucyo we N’ inzir' iboneye N'iy'amahoro n'ineza, Yes'
agushorera.
Jy'ugendera mu mucyo we, Uhung' umwijima : Ni hw amaras’ akweza de, Ng'
uhor' utunganye.
Kandi mu mucyo wa Yesu, Dusangamw abandi Baz' Umurokozi na bo,
Tukamusangira.

title: Mw Isi Yacu No Mw Ijuru Nta Zina Nk’irya Yesu

lines: Mw Isi Yacu  No Mw Ijuru Nta Zina Nk’irya Yesu
Nta Rindi Ryampumuriza Nk’iry‘Uwatubambiwe
Iryo Zina Ndarikunda Ry’umucunguzi Wanjye Iryo Zina Rihebuje Ni Ryo Rinyingiza.
Nihagir’umunt’ushimwa W’umunyacyubahiro Naho Yakirush’abandi Yesu
Aramuhebuza.
Iryo Zina Ryiza Cyane Ni Ryo Ngab’inkingira Irya Myambi Ya Satani Ntabwo
Yarishobora.
Ereg’iryo Zina Ryiza Sinz’uko Naryogeza Nzajya Mw’ijuru Kubwaryo Mpore
Nsingiza Yesu.
Ni Ryo Rimpesh’ubutware Bwo Kunesh’ibyi’iyi Si Rikamvana Mu Buretwa
Rikamp’umudendezo.
Nzajya Nkwikubit’imbere Ni Nkubona Mw’ijuru Wow’ Umwami Utwar’abami
Nyiringir’usingizwe
Ngwino, Mwami wacu Yesu, Ngwin' ugume muri jye : Mpatwe n'urukund' iteka Kujya ngukurikira.
Umutima wanjye wose Wuzur' ijambo ryawe, Mbone kunesha Satani N'imigambiye yose.
Amahoro yawe, Mwami, Ajy'aguma muri jye, Anyifurishe gufasha Abanyabyago
bose.
Urukundo rwawe rwinshi Rusandare muri jye. Naho natukwa, nkagawa,
Ruzabineshereza.
No mu ntambara njya ndwana, Nkubitana n'Umwanzi, Nzanesha, ntumbira Yesu
Wamunesheje kera.
Ubwiza bwawe, Mukiza, Bungot' impande zose, Bikureba jyew' ahubwo Barebe
wowe musa.
Ndashaka gusa nawe,Yesu, Mucunguzi : Nta wigeze kukumva Uvug' urakaye. Ndashaka gusa niwe :Wasengaga kenshi, Wihereranye na So Kuri wa musozi.
Ndashaka gusa nawe :Nubwo bakwangaga, Ntiwiturag' inabi Wagiriwe yose.
Ndashaka gusa nawe:Wafashag' abantu; Ump' urukundo rwawe, Ruzabankundisha.
Ndashaka gusa nawe :Wahamagaraga Abana bato bose, Maz' ukabigisha.
Nyamara, sinsa nawe:Bose barabizi; Mukiza mwiz' umfashe, Nse nawe byukuri.
Mugenz' uragana mw ijuru? Ujy'utumbira Yesu !
Azakuyobor' amahoro : Ujy'umuhang' amaso.
Ujy'umuhang' amaso Ujy'umuhang' amaso  Ajy'arind' umutumbiriye Ku manywa
na n'ijoro.
ly' ushutswe ng' uyob' inzira, Ujy'utumbira Yesu !
Ukomez' inzir' ifunganye:Ntumukurehw amaso !
Iy' inzir' itagaragara,Hakaba mu kabwibwi,
Yes' ati : Jye ndi kumwe nawe :Ujy'umuhang' amaso !
Urupfu ni rushak' uwarwo, Ujy'utumbira Yesu !
Ni bw' azakugeza mw ijuru,Usohor' amahoro
Iyo turi hamwe n'Umukiza wacu,  Atuyobor' inzira nziza. abamwiringira, bakamwitondaho Ni bo banyamahoro basa.
jy'umwizera, Kandi jy'umwumvira ! Ng' ujy'unyurwa na Yesu Mu kubaho kwawe.
ntihakingirizwa, nta gicu gikuba : Byeyurwa no kuboneka kwe. nta shavu, nta
bwoba, bona n'igishyika, Tumwiringiye, tumwumvira.
iy'inzar' iteye n'ubukene buje, Aduhembur' ibihe byose Ntabwo n'amakuba
yadukomerera, Tumwiringiye, tumwumvira.
Ntitwakwiyungura kugir' ibyishimo, Tutazinutsw' ibyaha byose, Kukw imbabazi
ze n'imigish' afite Bigir' umwizer' amwumvira.
Tuzajya twishima, turi kumwe na We,Tuzagendana na W' iteka, Tumugandukiye,
ngw adutume hose, Tumwiringiye, tumwumvira.
Nunguk' ubuntu bwa Yesu, Menye n'imbabaz' afite, Nunguk' ubwenge bw'ukuri, Meny' urukundo yankunze! Nunguk' ibya Yesu !
Nunguk' ibya Yesu  Nunguk' ubwenge bw'ukuri, ' Meny' urukundo yankunze.
Nshishikarir' ibya Yesu, Meny' iby' anshakaho byose. Mwuka Wer' umfuturire :
Mbwir' uko Yesu yankunze.
Nunguk' ijambo rya Yesu, Mbane n'Umwam' antoneshe; Numvire byos' antegeka, Mpuze na We, muyoboke.
Meny’ iby'ubwami bwa Yesu, Menye n'ubwiza bwe bwose, Meny' ukw azim'
ingoma ye, Ari We Mwami w'abami.
Mwam'ujy' imbere mu nzira yacu. Tur' abana baw' uduhe Kugukurikir' iteka, Utuyobore, tujye kwa Data.
Mu ngeso zacu no mu mirimo, Iby' ushaka ko dukora Mu rugendo rw'i Siyoni,
Utubashishe kubisohoza.
Ni haz' igiter' uturengere ! Ni tubon' iminsi mibi, Tube twihanganye cyane, Mu
nzira yawe, ni ko bigenda.
Ni tubabazwa n'ibidutera,Udukomeze, tubashe Kubabarir' abatwanga;
Tukwiringiye, bizanesheka.
Naho habaho ikintu cyose Kidukurahw amahoro Ngo duterwe n'ubukonje
Tuzacyihana, tuger' i wawe.
Duhishurire ibyo mw ijuru, Amasezerano yawe Ab' impamba y'ubugingo; Maze
hanyuma, tuger' i Wawe.
Uru rugendo urutunganye ! Kand' uduh' Umwuka Wera Ngw'ab' impamba
y'ubugingo, Utugezeyo, twishim' iteka.
Udushorere hose tugenda; Ni tunanirwa mu nzira, Uduhembure, Mukiza, Ubwo
tuzapfa, tuzajy’ i Wawe.
Kor' ugifit' uburyo ; Jy'ukora n'umwete. Tangira mu gitondo; Wirind' ubute ! Kora n'umucy' ubonetse;Menya ntucogore : igihe kirakuze; Kora n'ubwira !
Kor' izuba rirashe; Ntugahweme rwose. Imirimo n' ishira,Uzaruhurwa. Kand'
ugifit' imbaraga, Meny' ukore neza !Komez' uwo muhati : Mar' imirimo.
Kora bugiye kwira :Umuns' urakuze. Wiyongeremw umwete :Kora n'ingoga ! Ni ku kirengareng' ubu;Amajwi yatuje. Mwen' Iman' ujy'ukora ; Dore, burije.

title: Mana nduburira amaso yanjye ku misozi

lines: Mana nduburira amaso yanjye ku misozi
Mbe gutabarwa kwanjye kuzava he? Mubimbwire
K’Uwiteka niho guturuka
Ku Mana yaremy’ijuru n’isi
Ntizemera k’ibirenge byawe biteguza
Ikurinda ntabw’ihunikira ntisinzira
Imana irind’Abisirayeri
Ihor’iri maso  ntisinzira
Imana ni Yo Murinzi wawe wo kwizerwa
Niyo gicucu cy’iburyo bwawe gihoraho
Ku manyw’izuba ntirizakwica
N’ijoro ukwezi ntuzagutinya
Imana niyo ikurind’ibibi byose iteka
Imana niy’irind’ubugingo bwawe neza
Izakurind’amajya n’amaza
None no mu bihe bidashira
Yesu yatwis'amatabaza ye Yo kumurikir' abo mu mwijima.
Tubamurikishiriz' umucyo we, Tubamurikishiriz' ingeso.
Tur’ amatabaza ya Kristo, Yifuza kureb' uko tumurika;
Kand' iyo tuzimy' ababara cyane :Noneho, bagenzi, tumurike !
Arashaka kw abandi bareba Kumurika kwacu, bakayoboka.
Tumurikir' ab'i wacu n'ahandi,Dushimishe Databuja, Yesu,
Ni dushaka kumurika dutyo, Twizer' Umukiza wadupfiriye,
Tumusab’ Umwuka Wer' atunganye Imitima yacu : tumurike !

title: Ni Yes' ufit' urufunguzo Rw' ibizaba

lines: Ni Yesu ufite urufunguzo
rw' ibizaba.
Ni byo bihora binnezeza;
nta wundi wo kurundindira,
keretse We, keretse We.
Sintinya ibyago bizanzaho :
Ndamwizeye,
Kuko andi imbere abitunganya;
ni na we umenya ibinkwiriye :
Ko ari byiza ! Ko ari byiza !
Ndi impumyi njyewe, sinamenya
Ibyamfasha.
Ntabwo nzamwaka urufunguzo ;
Ahubwo mfashe ukuboko kwe,
Mwiringiye,mwiringiye !
Ntabwo namenya imigambi ye;
Nzi kimwe cyo!
Nzi yuko ankunda ubudasiba,
Nzi yuko ambera ubuhungiro,
Nkiri mu isi, nkiri mu isi.
Yewe, ibyo birampagije :
Nguwe neza !
Sindeba koko ibizambaho,
Bizwi na Yesu wamfiriye.
Natinya iki ? Natinya iki ?
Uwishinze ku byasezeranijwe N'Umukiza wac' abon' amahoro, Kand' aririmbishwa n'umunezero Kuko yizey' ibihoraho.
Twiringiye Ibyasezeranijwe na Yesu wacu; Nta bwo, nta bwo Yashobora
guhemukir'abe.
ibyasezeranijwe n'Uwiteka Ntibikuk' iyo Satan' aduteye Ntidushidikanya,
ntadutinyisha, Kuko twizey' ibihoraho.
ibyasezeranijwe n'Uwiteka Byerekana kw amaraso ye yoza. Ni y' ankiz' ibyaha,
ntibinyanduze, Kuko nizey' Uwanshunguye,
Ibyasezeranijwe n'Uwiteka Bitum' urukundo rwe runkomeza; Inkota y'Umwuka
ndayirwanisha;Ni y' itum' Umwanz' anesheka.
Uwishinze ku byasezeranijwe Ni w' uhora yumvir' Umwuka Wera, Satani
ntashobora kumutsinda, Kuko yizigiy' Uhoraho.
Umwami wacu, Yesu, Ni we Tangiriro Ry'itorero yaremye Mu mazi n'ljambo. Yazanywe mw isi yacu No kudukiz' ibyaha,Ngo tub' Itorero rye Yaguz' amaraso.
Itorero ni rimwe Mu mok' atar' amwe; Umwami waryo n'umwe Riramusanganira. ifunguro ni rimwe. Ritung' abaryo bose;Rishim' izina rimwe. N' iry'Umucunguzi.
Yewe, kintu cyazanye Ibice muri ryo, Bikarisuzuguza Abataririmo ! Nyamar'
abera baryo Bahora bari maso,Babwir' Umwam' ibyaryo Ngw az' arirengere.
Mu byago biritera, Rijya riruhurwa No guteg' amahoro Mu bihe bizaza. Ryifuza
kuzabona Ibyiza byo mw ijuru,Ni riva ku rugamba, Rinesheje rwose.
Kandi, rikiri mw isi, Rifitany' ubumwe Na Dat' Imana yacu  N'abe bo mw Ijuru.
Abo, bakiri mw isi, Bafatanyaga na We.Nanjy' umpe kuba nka bo, Mbasange mw
ijuru.
Ni nd' uzarwanana n'Umwami wacu ?
Ni nd' uzamamaza ubutumwa bwe ?
Ni nd' uzarorera kwifuz' iby'isi,
Nubwo yarenganywa n'abanga Yesu ?
Mbese, tur' aba nde ? Tur' aba Yesu . Twar' aba Satani, turamwimura.
Dor' icyubahiro tumaranira S' icy' iyi s' ahubwo n' icy'Umukiza. Yaradupfiriye :
urukundo rwe Ruduhata kwemer' ubuhake bwe.
Yesu yaducunguj' amaraso ye Y'igiciro cyinshi : tur' imbata ze. Tuzagaya dute
ubwo buntu bwe ? Byose tubisige kubw' izina rye.
Nubw' aba Satani bagir' umwete Wo kurwana cyane, twe kubatinya. Ingabo z
'Imana nta wazitsinda, Kuk' ukuri kwayo kuzineshesha.
Twandikiwe kera kub' ingabo ze : None, dutabare : twe gucogora ! Twihangan'
ahubwo, tugir' umwete, Kuko turwanana n'Umucunguzi.
Umwam'agaby'ingabo ze Kurwana n'ibyaha.
Umugaba n' Umwana we : intwari ye ni nde?
Wikorer' umusaraba,Ugendane na We. Mufatany' imibabaro, Nuk' ub' intwari ye!
Sitefano yakubiswe Kubw' uwo Mwami we, Yasabirag' abanzi be, Ubwo
bamwicaga.
Ubwo yar' agihagaze,Yabay' intwari ye; Bamwicishij' amabuye, Areba mw ijuru.
Batwikwaga mu muriro, Baranabambwaga. Dukurikiz' urugero Rwiza baduhaye!
Bajugunyirwag' intare, Zikabatanyura. Babicishaga n'inkota : N' intwari za Yesu.
Non' izo ntwari za Yesu Zageze mw ijuru ! Dore zigos' intebe ye; Ziramusingiza!
Zaciye mu mibabaro, Zizamukirayo. Mwam'udufashe natwe ngo Duc'aho baciye.
Bayoboke, mubyuke.
Mwe, ntore z'Umwami,
dufate mu maboko
lntwaro za Yesu.
Mu nzira yo kunesha
tuyoborwa na Yesu,
tujyane na W' iteka,
Aturwanirire.
Impanda ziravuze
Uti Nimuze, mwitabe
Ikamba ry'ubugingo
N’ ingabire yanyu.
Ni mwangwa n'ababisha
Mukomere,murwane,
Mugir' umwete mwinshi,
Mutsinde Satani.
Mubyuke, mutabare,
Mudashidikanya
Ntihagir' usigara;
Mutumbire Yesu.
Kandi mujye mutwara
Intwaro zo kwizera
Zizatuma munesha,
Mugir' ibyishimo.
Mubyuke vuba vuba,
Murwane mwihwema.
Mwizer’izina ryera;
Ni iryo muneshesha.
Ni muva ku rugamba
Mutahanye na Yesu,
Muzabon’ amahoro
Y'iteka mw’ ijuru.
Tur’ abasirikare ba Kristo Yesu; Ni W ukiz’ abamwiringira. Kandi twasezeranye kurwana cyane Na Satani n'isi n'umubiri.
Turi bene Data umwe, bagenzi banjye, Kandi dusangiye kwizera; Iyo badututse, baduhora Yesu, Twibuke yuko yadupfiriye.
Mwibatizwa twashyizwehwikimenyetso Cy'umusaraba yabambweho, tujye
turwana munsi y'iyo bendera, Twambay' intwaro duhabwa na We.
Tube maso, twirinde, nta wakwikiza; twizigir'izo ntwaro nziza Satani
n'ashimagiza, ye kutwoshya; twe kumutinya n’ az’ arakaye.
Twih’ Umwuka Wera, kugira ngo yime Mu mitima yac' adutware; Nukw
azatubatur' ububata bubi Bwo kwifuza kose k'umubiri.
Bene Data, duhumurizanye, kuko tur’ ingabo z'Uwanesheje  twe gutiny’ ababisha,
twe gucogora. tube maso, dusenge, turwane.
Nubw’ intambar' idasiba, twagabiwe Intwaro zituneshereza, Mw’ ijuru
tuzaruhukan’ ibyishimo, twambay’ ikamba ritangirika.
Mwa ngabo z'Umwami mwe, muze,dutabare! dor'Umwami wacu yatugiy'imbere.yahuye n'abanzi be, abanesha bose. dor'ibender'iragiye.tuyikurikire.
Muze ngabo zose za Yesu, Muze dutabare umugaba wacu Yatugiy’ imbere.
Maz’ izina rya Yesu Turivuge hose. Nuko tujy' imbere, Rituneshereze Indirimbo
z'ishimwe . Zirater’ubwoba  Ingabo za satani mbi, Nuko turirimbe.
Nubw’ingabo zo mw’isi zigenda zitsindwa, Ubwami bwa Yesu Ni nde wabunesha?
We yasezeranije : Yukw’ Itorero rye Ridatsindwa na Satani N'iby’ afite byose.
Dor' ibendera ya Yesu Iramanitswe !Nguy’ araj' ahuruy’ atyo, ngwatabare abe.
Ati: Yemwe, ndaje, ndaje ! Nimukomere ! Ko ndi hamwe namwe ni nde
Wabashobora ?
Kokw ingabo za Satani Zirakomeye.Tudafit’ Umwami Yesu, Zaduhindura.
Nshuti mwe, dukurikire Umucunguzi, Tumutumbire twizere Ubutwari bwe!
Nubw’intambar'iturushya,twe gucogora ! Umv’ impundu ziravuze ; Aranesheje !
Urwan’ intambara nziza !
Kristo n'imbaraga zawe :
Fat’ ubugingo aguhaye,
Ngo buguhesh’ ibyishimo.
Usiganirw’ aho Yesu
Yicay’ agutegereje
Ni We nzira kandi ni We
Bihembo byo kurushanwa.
Wabujijwe kwiganyira,
Wizere gus’ ubuntu bwe,
Uzabon’ urukundo rwe
Kw ari rwo rukubeshahto.
Ntutinye, we gucogora;
Ntahinduk’ aragukunda,
Yesu ni byos'umufite,
Nta cyo wabasha gukena
Har’ uwitwa Danyeli:yar’ intwari pe !
Ntiyakangwaga n’abanz' asenga  Imana ye.
Tinyuka, mugenzi ba nka Danyeli! Itange ku Mwami wawe, ntumwihakane.
Ub' intwari ya Yesu niy'ukuri kwe. Bakubare no mu mutwe wa Danyel’uwo !
Bamwe bo mu ntore ze baraneshejwe. Kuko batihaze rwose nka Danyel'uwo !
Dor’ Umwanzi Satan’ agaby’ ingabo ze! Ziraneshwa zihuye na ba Danyel’ uwo !
Nuko rer'ushikame kand' utambuke ! Umv' impundu ziravuza ba Danyel’uwo
Uwab’atinyutse  lbyago byose
Naz’akurikire—Umwami Yesu !
Nta cyamurekesha—lyo migambi ye
Yo guca mu nzira —ijya mw’ ijuru !
Ntabw’ azacogozwa N 'inshamugongo.
Abazimubwira—Nibo bazagwa !
Abanzi be bose—Nti bamugarura
munzir’ ahisemo— Ijya mw ijuru.
Mwam’ ujy'undindisha—Umwuka wawe,
mbone kuzaragwa Kubahw iteka.
Have wa bwoba we—Nimunyihorere!
Namaramaje pe— Kujya mw’ ijuru.
Imana n’ ubuhingiro:Ni Yo ngab’ idukingira.Ayo turi mu makuba, Ni Y’ ibasha kudukiza. Uk’ Umwanzi wacu Yishakiy’ uburyo Bwo kudatsinda, Ntatubasha na gato, Kukw’ Iman’iturengera.
Ni twirwanaho twenyine,tubura imbaraga rwose.ariko dufit'intwari ijy'iturwanira
iteka.iyo ntwari ni nde? ni wowe,Mukiza.Mugaba wacu,tuzi yuko,mu byago ,ari wowe uturengera.
Iy' abagome bahuje Guter' itorero ryawe, Urarirengera, Mana, Ntibabashe
kuritsinda. Nubw’ Umugambanyi;Ashaka kutwica, Ntadushyikira Kukw’ aneshwa
n’ijambo Ry'Imana, Nyir'imbaraga.
Hishur’ijambo rinesha, Ridufasha dushobewe. Imbabazi zawe nyinshi Zize,
zituzeho twese.Twakwamburw' ibyacu, . Ndetse, tukabohwa, Ntitwabyitaho :
Byose tuzabinesha; Tuzaragwa, n’ubwami bwawe !
Yemw’ abari kuri Yesu, Dukanguke, tube maso, Kuko wa Mwanzi, Satani,: Ajy’ atureba ku jisho.
Satani ntiyigendera, Afit’ icy’ ahagazeho; Nuk ube maso, wiriride, Witwaz’ inkota y’Umwuka.
K'uhishira Satani se, Kandi witirirwa Yesu ? None witind’ umwiyake : Afit’ igihe
kigufi.
Yaciriw’ iteka ribi, Ashak’ abo yisasira. Bitum' ashishikarira Koshy’ abakunzi ba
Yesu.
Ibya Yesu twabikijwe Twihute tubimenyeshe , ab'isi yose,bihane, bave mu
byaha,bakizwe.
Nimuze, ngabo za Yesu, Tujye mu ntambara! Mwarobanu we n’Um wami: Mwese, mwiyereke  araje :Impanda bazivugije : Nimuze, mwitabe!
Dor’ umugab’ uzigabye Ni Yesu Krisito.yanesheje wa mwanzi we kubw’Umusaraba. Ndetse,n'intwaro ze Yarazimwambuye. Twashobora kuneshwa se, Yes’ aturwanira ?
Mwiyumanganye mu byago mugiye kubona.Murind’ imitima yanyu, Itagwa mu gico. Intwari y'Umwami Ntiyita ku by’isi.Ni kw ijy'imera ngw ibona Kunesha Satani.
Mutwar’ intwaro Ni zo zimukwiriye Inkot’ ityay’ iboneye N' ijambo ry'Imana.
Muryemere mwese; Ni ryo ribakiza.Muryizere mu mitima, Ni ho muzatsinda.
Harihw indi si nziza cyane Twasezeranijwe n'Imana;
Tuyitegereje twizeye Kuko Dat’ ayidufitiye.
Aheza....mu ijuru...tuzahurirayo bagenzi:(X2)
Tuzaririmbira mw’ijuru Indirimbo z’abakijijwe.
Ntituzongera kubabara:Tuzashir’agahinda rwose.
Data tuzamusingiza Ubwo buntu yatugiriye
N'urukundo rwe n'imbabazi N'imigish’ ajy'atwungukira.
b.
Ni mw’ ijuru ku Mana —Abizeye Bazateranirizwa— Mu mahirwe. Kubw’Umwuka w’ Umwami Bateraniyeyo.Bazerura ngo, Shimwa—Shimwa,Mwami!
Umwana w’iman’ubwe,—yavuyeyo Ngw ajy'atunyuza neza— Mu nzira ye. Tujye
twibuk'iteka Kw’ ari W' utwigisha;Tuvuge tuti: Shimwa Shimwa,Mwami!Mwami!
Twebwe twes’ ab'iyi si,—Tumushake Na bene wacu bose—Tubijyane. Tunezerwe, twizere, Twebw' ababunguwe,Twerure tuti: Shimwa —Shimwa!Mwami!
Harihw indi s’irut’ iyi cyane :
Ni nziza, ni nziza  Ntiyagerwaho, n’ ikibi cyose :
Ni nziza, ni nziza !
Ni ho tuzajya kubw’ Umukiza! Baduherey’inanga nziza nshya,Ducurangane n’abamarayika: lyo si ni nziza .
Kandi nta mwijim’uriyo rwose: lyo si ni nziza !Nta mubabaro, nta muborogo: lyo sini nziza !Banywa ku mugezi w'ubugingo, Kandi bareb'uwabapfiriye, Bakishimir’ ubwiza bwe bwinshi : lyo si ni nziza !
Nubw' ibyaha byacu bikabije Kandi bigwiriye, Umukiza yaradupfiriye Ngo
tubikurweho.Nukw abizey' Umukiza twese, Tuzatunganywa n'urwo rupfu rwe, Kandi nyuma tuzImana na We iyo si ni nziza!
Har’ umurwa mwiza—W'abera b'lmana: Nta gihumanya,—Nta gihumanya Kizajya muri wo.
Mwana w’uwiteka,—Mukiz’ubundaje:Nyoz’ untunganye,—Nyoz’ untunganye! Nkiz’ibyaha byose!
Mpindur’ ubu, Mwami, Ngo Mb’ umwana wawe; Unkomereshe,—Unkomereshe
Amaboko yawe!
Nuk’ uzansohoze—Mu bera b'i Wawe, Ntafit’ inenge,—Ntafit’ inenge, Mur’iyo si
nziza
Tujye duhimbaz’ iteka Ururembo rw'i wacu, Twarwubakiwe na Yesu Mw ijuru ry'Uwiteka.
iyaba mfit’ amababa Nk’ abamarayika, mba ngurutse, nkagerayo, Nkab’ i Siyon’iteka.
Kand’ amazu yaho yose Ararabagirana, Kand’ aruta cyane rwose Ay’ abantu
bubaka.
Yes’ ariyo, ni We Mwami Utwar’ abaho bose, Kand’ abamalayika bajya
Bamuhimbaz’ iteka.
Munsi y'intebe y'ubwami .ni hw isok’ikomoka ivamo ya mazi meza ubugingo
bw’iteka.
Kand’aho ni ho hamera Igiti cy'ubugingo: lbibabi byacyo byiza Ni byo bikiz’
abantu.
Duhimbaz' urwo rurembo Rwo mw ijuru ly'Imana: Ni rwo Yesu Kristo wacu
Yadutunganirije,
Yes' utungany' imitima Y'abakwizeye twese, Tuiye dukor’ iby’ ushima, Tuzabane
mw’ ijuru.
(indirimbo y'Abagande bishwe babahora izina rya Yesu)
Singishak’ubutunzi Bwo mur'iyi si mbi; Ndifuz’ubwo mw ijuru No kuzagerayo. Mu gitabo cy'ubwami Cyanditswemw abera, Mbese, Yesu Mukiza, Jye wanyanditsemo ?
Mu gitabo Cyawe, harimw iryanjye se ? , Mu gitabo cyubwami, Mbese,
nanditmemo ?
Mfit’ ibyaha bingana N'umuseny’ ubwinshi. Ngwino, Yesu ubirohe Mu maraso
yawe. Wadusezeranije Yukw ibyaha byacu, Nahw ari nk'umuhemba, Ng’ uzabyeza dede.
Har' umurwa mw ijuru Urimw inzu nyinshi; Nta n'ikibi kibayo.N' ah’abacunguwe.
Ubwo nogejw’ibyaha Mu maraso yawe, Nzi ko wandits' iryanjye  Mu gitabo cyawe.
Mu gitabo Cyawe,iryanjye ririmo: Mu gitabo cy'ubwami, Mbese, nanditmemo ?
Mw’ isi nd’ umushyitsi;—Si ho nzab'iteka;Nzayivamo, ntahe—Mw ijuru kwa Data.
Kandi nzamusanga—Kuntebe y'ubwiza. Na W azanyakira. Amp' u buntu bwinshi
Maze, mban' iteka—Na We, nta gahinda.Sinzaruh’ ukundiHariy' amahoro.
Mpore muhimbaza,—Nikubit’ imbere Y'uwo Mutabazi—Wankuye mu rupfu.
None, mfit’ ubwuzu—Bwo kuzahagera, Ngo mve mur’iyi si  Njye mu mucyo wawe.

title: kubana na Yesu iteka mu ijuru

lines: kubana na Yesu
iteka mu ijuru
Bidutera umunezero,
Bikatwishimisha. ;
Mu isi ndi umushyitsi :
Sinzayihoramo;
Ahubwo ndi mu rugendo
Runjyana mu ijuru.
Urugo rw'Imana
Ajya arunyereka,
Ndurora runyegereye,
Arumpishuriye;
Bituma nifuza
Cyane kugerayo :
Ni ho mwandu w'ab'Imana,
Yerusalenu nshya.
Paulo yaravuze,
Ati : Tuzabana
Iteka ryose n'Imana;
Ni ko tubisoma.
Iryo sezerano,
Urinsohoreze,
Tubane no muri iyi si,
Uhore undengera.
Nugenza utyo, Mwami,
Umwuka nuhera,
Urupfu ruzanyinjiza
Aho batagipfa :
Ni ho nzakumenya,
Nkuko unzi,Mukiza,
Niratire imbere yawe
Ko tuzahorana.

title: Ubwo nzamar’ imirimo ngo nsezere kw'isi,

lines: Ubwo nzamar’ imirimo ngo nsezere kw'isi,
Umugezi witw' Urupfunywambutse,
Ni ho nzagera mw Ijuru,nsang' Uwamfiriye :
Azanyakiran’ ubuntu n’ineza.
Nzamumenya, nzamumenya  Nzaba mpagaz' imbere Ye, nyuzwe, Nzamumenya, nzamumenya ;Mbony’ inkovu zo mu biganza bye.
Nzanezerwa ni mbon’ubwiza bwo mumaso he,
Kandi sinzasiba kumushimira
Urukundo n'imbabazi n'ubuntu byatumye
Nanjy' amboner’ ikibanza mw ijuru.
Abo nkunda bagezeyo mbafitiy’ ubwuzu:
Wa Mugezi ni wo wadutanije.
Ariko sinavug' ubwuzu bwinshi mfitiye
Umukiza wanjye wanyitangiye.
Azanshisha mw iremb’ansohoze mu rugo i We.
Azanyambikish’ umwenda wera de.
Nzaririmb’ iya Mose n’iy,Umwana,w’intama !
Yewe, nzanyurwa nirebeye Yesu !
Ubwo nzabon’ Umukiza Ntumbira mu maso he, Nzanyurwa mmwitegereje, Ari We wamfiriye.
Nzamubona, Yes' Umwami, Turi kumwe mw ijuru : Nzamwirebera mu maso,
Njye mmusingiz' iteka!
Nkiri mw isi mu mubiri, Mbur' uko mwirebera. Urya muns' urenda kuza, Mbon'
ubwiza bwe bwinshi !
Amakub' azab' ashize, Nta byaha, nta mwijima : Ibigande biganduwe, Tuzishim'
imbere ye !
Ni mwirebera mu maso, Nzicwa n'umunezero. Nzamumeny' Uwo wankunze, Akaz'akanshungura
Bana, mw ijur' abiringiy' Umucunguzi Tuzaherway' ibintu byinshi.
Azaduh' amakamba y'ubwiza bwinshi, Kand' atwambik' imyenda yera.
Bana, tuzahabwa, tuzahabwa byinshi, Tuzagabirwa byinshi mw ijuru
Tuzahoran' ishimwe, tunezerewe, Ni twizer' Umukiza Yesu.
Tuzagendagenda mu muhanda wakozwe Mw izahabu n' ifeza nyinshi; Kandi Yesu ni We zuba ryaho ryiza : Nta n'ijoro riba mw ijuru.
Twe n'abera bose tuzacurang' inanga, Turirimbir' Umwami Yesu; Tuhanywere
n'amazi y'Ur'uzi rwiza, Dusiz' urupfu n'amakuba.
Muze mwese, tujyan' iyi nzir' ifunganye, Mumuhay' imitima yanyu. Nimuyoboke
mwes' Uwabapfiriye, Abagezey' abanezeze.
Mbese, tuzahurirayo, Kuri wa mugezi mwiza Uca mw ijuru hagati, Uv' i bwami ku Mana yacu ?
Koko tuzahurirayo, Tubonane n'abera ku mugezi, Ku mugez' utunganye w'lmana Uv' i bwami ku Mana yacu.
Tuzagendana ku nkombe Y'umugezi w'ubugingo. Tuzasengan' Uwiteka, Tuyisingiz'iteka ryose.
Nuko, tutarabagera, Duturw' imitwaro yose, Dukizwe n'ubuntu bwayo :
Izatwambik' imyenda yera.
Tuzahurira n'abera Ku mugez' ubonerana; Nta kizadutandukanya Kuk' urupfu
rutagerayo.
Nuko, tuzagera vuba Kur' uwo mugezi mwiza, Turirimbane n'abaho Indirimbo
zishimishije.
Rya Joro Ryatowe
Rubanda Ruryamye
Mariya Na Yozefu Basa
Bari Maso Barera Akana
Kaje Kava Mw’ijuru (X2)
Rya Joro Ryatowe
Intumwa Z’Imana
Zamenyesheje Ba Bungeri
Icyabonetse Mw’isi Yacu
Y’uko Yesu Yavutse (X2)
Rya Joro Ryatowe
Umucyo W’ukuri
Twese Waratumurikiye
Ng’udukure Mu Byaha Byacu
Kuko Yesu Yavutse (X2)
Rya Joro Ryatowe
Rituma Twishima
Dufatanye N’abo Mw’ijuru
Kuririmbir’akana Yesu Tuti:
Shimwa,Mukiza. (X2)
Wasiz' ubwiza war'ufite mw ijuru, Ubwo wazaga mw isi, Yesu;
No mw ivuka ryawe nta hantu hariho Hagutunganiye, Mwami.
Ngwin' uze mu mutima wanjye, Umbemo, ndabikwemereye. Ngwin' utahe mu
mutima wanjye, Wiboneremw aho kuba.
Mbes' abamalayika ntibagushingije, Ubwo wimikwaga, Krisito ?
Ariko, Mwami, wicishije bugufi, Utuvukir'utyo mw isi !
Dor' inyoni yos' igir' aho yarika, Na y' ingunzu ntibur' intaho.
Ariko Wowe, Mwami Yesu, wabuze Ah' urambik' umusaya.
Waj' uzany' Ijambo rizima, Krisito, Ryo kubatur' abantu bawe.
Bakwitura kwang'urukundo rwaw'ubwo, Bakumanika ku giti.
Ngwin' ube mu mutima wanjye : Nizigiy' urwo rupfu rwawe  Ngwin' utahe mu
mutima wanjye : Nizigiy' Umusaraba
Abari mw ijuru bazagusingiza, N' uza kwima ya ngoma yawe.
Nzumv' umbwir' uti: Mfit'aho nkugeneye, Ngwino, wimane nanjy' ubu !
Bizanezeza cyane, Yesu, Ubwo nzumv' ijwi ryawe ryiza ! Bizanezeza cyane,
Mukiza; Nzagusingiza, ntahwema!
Mw ivuka ryawe, Yesu , bakuryamishije Mu kiraro kigawa, mu muvure w'inka. Wasasiwe, Mukiza, ahadakwiriye. Nubw' ur' Uwaturemye, ni ko wagiriwe!
Nimuze, yemwe bana, tUmuhimbarize Ko yaryamishijw' atyo, mu muvure w'inka
DuShim' Umwami Yesu, tumukundir' ibyo Ko yabay' umukene kubwabanya byaha.
Umfashe, Mwami Yesu, kuguhora hafi. Ngo ngukunde, tuban' iminsi yanjye yose,
Kandi n'abndi bana,na b' ubiyereke Bagukunde, dushiman' urukundo rwawe.
Mukiza wacu Yesu,tukwakire dute? tukwakire twishimye: ngwin'utwiberemo. wez'imitima yacu ,kand'utumenyeshe ingeso nziz'ukunda n'ibikunezeza.
Wasiz' ibyawe byose,Uza mur'iyi si, Uraduhumuriza Kuko tubabaye. Nta
watunyag’ ubwami Bwawe bw'amahoro : Uhor' udutabara, Ukaturokora.
wasanze tur' imbohe,Uratubohora, Twar’ ibisenzegeri, Uraducungura, Ngo tub’
iritore zawe,Duhoran' iteka, Tubone n'ubugingo Butazarangira.
Mbe n'iki cyaguteye Kuv’ahw’ Iman’ iri? Nta kindi, n' urukundo N'imbabazi zawe.Ntushak' abanyabyaha Ko bazarimbuka; Byatumy’udutabara,Turababarirwa.
Ku rurembo rwa Dawid' Umwami,
Kera harih’ uruhongore;
Umwan' ahabikirwa na nyina
Mu muvure w’inka warimo.
Uwo mwana ni we Yesu, Kandi nyina yitwaga Mariya.
Yaje mw is’ asig'i We mw’ ijuru,
Bamuraza mu ruhongore;
Kand'uburiri bwar'umuvure,
Nubwo yar’ Umwami wa bose
Umukiza wacu wera
Yabanye n'aboroheje nkatwe.
Kand’ akir’ umwana, yubahaga
Ababyey ‘akabakorera;
Yabagandukiye muri byose;
Yabakundaga bihebuje,
Natwe, nubwo tur’ abana,
Tumere nka Yes’ uko yar’ari.
Yatubereye nk'uworoheje,
Kand' ari we Nyir'imbaraga !
Yarakuraga nk'abandi bana :
N' icyitegererezo cyacu.
We yababaranye natwe;
Bituma tunezeranwa na We.
Uwo Mwana mwiza wo gukundwa
None ni W' utegeka byose !
Azagaruka, twe tumubone,
Yes’ Umwami n'Umucunguzi.
Kand' ashorera tw’ abana
Ngw’ atugeze mw ijuru, tubane.
Azaboneker' abamukunda,
Atakiri mu ruhongore;
Azab’ ari mw’ ijuru ku ngoma,
I buryo bw'Iman' ihoraho :
Tuzamwikubit’ imbere,
Tumusingizany’ iteka ryose.
Bahungu, bakobwa,—Nimuze mwese I Betelehemu—Mu ruhongore; Tureb' ibyo Data—Uri mw ijuru Yaduhaye twese— Mur'iri joro !
Hamwe n'abashumba,—Dushim’umwami Uryamye mu byatsi—Nk'uworoheje.
Dusang’ ababyeyi—Banezerewe; Duhuzen'Intumwa—Kumusingiza.
Nimupfukamire—Umwami mwiza Uduh’ ubugingo,—Mumuhimbaze ! Muvuze
n'impundu—Hamwe n'Intumwa; Mubwire n'abandi—Ibyo mwabonye.
Twese tumushime,—Wa Mwami mwiza t Tumuhimbarize—Kukw adukunda.
Dufatanye twese,—Tuvuz’ impundu, Ngw abatamumenye—Baze gukizwa.
Abungeri barindaga Intama n'ijoro , marayik' abiyereka  Mu cyubahiro. cye.
Babony' icyo cyubahiro, Baterwa n'ubwoba, Marayik’ arababwira Ati: Muhumure !
Nimwumv’ ubu, mbazaniye Inkuru y’byiza :Mu rurembo rwa Dawidi, Havuts' Umukiza.
Ndabah’ iki kimenyetso;Nuko, murabona : Baryamish’ uruhinja Mu muvure w'inka.
Amaze kubivug’ atyo, Habonek’ umutwe w’abamarayika benshi, Bahimbaza bati:
Nukw’ icyubahiro kibe Ku Mana mw’ ijuru,Kand’ ab’ ikunda bo mw’ isi Bahabw'
amahoro.
Umv' intumwa zo mw’ ijuru Ziririmbira Yesu. Ziti Iman’ ishimwe cyane : Amahor’ a be mw’ isi: Kuk’ Umwana way’ avutse Uzakiz' abanyabyaha; Yesu n' Umukiza wacu : Yaje kuducungura.
Umv’intumwa zo mw ijuru Ziririmbira Yesu:
Nubwo mu kiraro cy'inka,Arimo wavukiye, Ur’ Iman’ isumba byose: Twese
tugusingize.  Tugushime cyane,Yesu : Ur’ Iman’ uri n'umuntu .Ur’ Imanuweli wacu : Imana turi kumwe.
Ur' izuba rituvira,Ur' amahoro yacu; Wemeye kuva mw ijuru.ub' umuntu wo
gupfa. Watuzaniy’ ubugingo,Ngo tukwizere, tubeho. Tunezererw’ uyu munsi Ko
duhaw’ Umukiza,
Nuko amoko yos’ ashime Krist' Uwera w'Imana. Hose hose bumvikane  Indirimbo
z'ishimwe Amahoro nabe mw isi, Kuk’ Umwami Yes’ avutse. Yesu ni We Nshuti yacu, N’ Umuvunyi duhawe
Umwana yavukiye  Mu murwa wa Dawidi Ni we Yes' Uwiteka Yadusezeranije.
Duhimbaz' uwo munsi Yesu yatuvukiye; Tubyamamaze hose Yuko haj’ umukiza
Habayehw’abungeri,    Babona marayika, Baratinya; na w’ ati : Noneho, mutinyuke!
Ati : Krist’ Umukiza Yaje mu gihugu cye; Umuremyi wa byose Yavukiye mw’
icumbi !
Mwana wera, w'lmana, Turagupfukamiye, Tugushimira cyane Yuk’ utujemo, Yesu !
Munezero, Munezero,Birori bishimisha ! Mu ndirimbo zo mw ijuru, Dushyiremo n'izacu Yesu yaje kudukiza,Tumuhawe n'Uwiteka : Munezero, Munezero, Birori bishimisha !
Munezero, Munezero,Imitim’ inezerwe ! Tumwitabe, tumwitabe,Yes’aduhamagara Dukunze kw’ aturokora,Tureke kubirazika : Munezero, Munezero, Imitim’inezerwe!
Munezero, Munezero,Jyan’ ishimwe ku mana! Amahoro n'amahoro Ni ko
Intumwa zivuga. Yesu ni w' uhira bose :twese tumuririmbire : Munezero,Munezero, Jyan’ ishimwe ku Mana !
Yemwe bungeri ba kera, Mutubwir' ibya Yesu,
Ibyo mwabonye rya joro, Igihe yavukaga.
Shimwa Rurema !Shimwa Rurema,  Shimwa,, Rurema, shimwa ! Wow’ usumba
byose.
Shimwa Rurema !Shimwa, Rurema!  Shirmwa, Rurema, shimwa!Amahor’a be
mw isi !
Twar’ aho turaririye Umukumbi n'ijoro. Maze, tugubwa gitumo N'urangurur' aty'
ati:
Marayik' aratubwira, At' i Betelehemu Habavukiy’ Umukiza : Ni We Mwami
Krisito!
Uwo mwanya, haz' umutwe W'ingabo zo mw ijuru, Zigoswe n'umucyo mwinshi;
Zirasingiza ziti:
Natwe turahaguruka,Tujy’ i Betelehemu, Dusangayo rwa Ruhinja, Ni ko
kurushima, ngo :
Bungeri turabashimye; Byose turabyumyise. Tujye kumusanga natwe,
Tumusingize  tuti :
Inkuru nziza yavuye mw ijuru Yazanywe no kuduhumuriza; Igaragazwa n'Umwami w'urukundo Wavukiy’ abanyabyaha bose
Uwo wa muhanuzi yahanuye,Akamubwiririz’ amahoro, N’ Umwami Yesu watuvukiye twese : Tumuririmbire n'iri joro !
Ajy'adutera kwiringira rwose,Adusezeranir' amahoro, N'abafit' imtim, ihagaz'
iganya, Abibuka ngw abah’ ubugingo.
Dushinie twes'Umucunguzi wacu Kw atadutinye tw' abanyabyaha! Kand’ubuntu
bwe budukomeza mw isi. Tumwitabish’ imitim' ikunze;
Bakristo, nimuze, munezerwe mwese, Nimuze, tugeran' i Betelehemu. Muze kureb' Umwami wahavukiye!
Nimuze, tumusenge ( x 3) Ni Kristo Yesu.
Imana Rurema, nubw’ isumba byose, Ntiyanze kubyarwa n'uwo woroheje.
ryaturemye, dor’ uko yamanutse !
Muririmbe cyane, bamalayika mwese, Mut’ Isumba byos’ ihabw’ icyubahiro, Kand’amahor’ abe mu bo yishimira !
Tuje kukuramya, Mwami Yes’ uvutse, Tuje kugusingiza, Mukiza Yesu, Nubw’ ur’
Imana, none turaturanye.
Umukiza wac' ubwo yavukaga, Nta cumbi yabonye, keretse mu nka. Nubwo bamuhej' i Betelehemu, Twe kumwim' icumbi: twe, tumwakire!
Marayika yaj' asang' abungeri; Izo nkuru nziz' azibabariye, Bagend' uwo mwanya kumusingiza. Natwe twe gutinda, tumusingize.
Na ba banyabweng’ aho baboneye Ya nyenyer' irang' Umwami Krisito. Bamusanze vuba, ihayobora, Bamutur' ibyiza bamuzaniye.
Ko nd' umwana muto, namutur' iki ?Simfit' izahabu nk'abanyabwenge, Nta
n'intama mfite, nka ba bungeri. Mfite kimwe gusa : muh' umutima!
Tur' abami bayobotse, Tuje ngo turabukire Uyu Mwam' usumba byose, Dukurikiy' inyenyeri.
Ye... we. . Wa nyenyeri nziza we, Komez' utuyobore, Tujy' imbere; gumy'
ugende, Tuger' ahw Umwami' ari!
Nje gutur' Umwami Yesu, Nzany' izi zahabu nziza. Ni We nyir'isi n'ijuru, N'
Umwami w'abami bose.
Nje gutur' Umwami Yesu, Nzany' iyi mibavu myiza : Byerekana yukw atwumva,
iyo tumusenze hose.
Nje gutur' Umwami Yesu, Nzany' ishangi rihumura : Byerekana yukw azapfa Mu
cyimbo cy'abanyabyaha.
Tuje kugushengerera :Ur' Umwami n'Umukiza. Akir' amaturo yacu, Mucunguzi,
Nyirigira.

title: Kera har' abungeri mu gihugu cyera

lines: Kera har' abungeri mu gihugu cyera, Bumv' inkuru y'ibyiza ko Yes' avutse. ku musozi n'ijoro,bumv' amajwi menshi Y'ingabo zo mw ijuru, zishima, ziti :
Noel! Noel! Noel ! Noel! Havuts' Umwami w'lsirayeli !
Mu gihugu cya kure, har' abanyabwenge. Bahishurirw' ikintu cyabatangaje.
Babony' ikimenyetso cy'inyenyeri nini, Kibarangir'aho Yesu yavukiye.
Nukw Iman' iberetse k' Umukiza yaje, Bajy' ahw ar' uwo mwanya ngo
bamusenge. Baramupfukamira,bamutur' ibyiza : By'izahabu n'icyome n'ishangi na yo.
Natwe tumusang' ubu; n' Umukiza wacu; Yaj' aciye bugufi kubwac' ababi. Nyuma, ku Musaraba, yaradupfiriye, Aduhongerera ngo tutarimbuka.
Nuko, umushimire ko yatuvukiye, Tumutur' imitima yac' imenetse. Uyu munsi wa
none, yonger' avukire Mu mitima ya benshi, bamushimishe.

title: Nkuko ba banyabwenge Barebye ya nyenyeri

lines: Nkuko ba banyabwenge Barebye ya nyenyeri, Bakayikurikira N'umunezero mwinshi, Natwe twifuze dutyo Kureb' Umwami Yesu.
bo batebutse vuba gushak'urwo ruhinja; bararupfukamira,ni rwo Mwami
w'ijuru;natwe dushake Yesu twiboner'Umukiza
Bah' Umwan' amaturo Y'igiciro kinini; Baramurabukira, Urut'ab'isi bose : Natwe
tugire dutyo, Duhe Yes' imitima.
Yes' Uwera w'Imana, Uturindir' iteka Mu nzira yaw' ifunganye; Hanyum'
uzatujyane Mu bwami bwo mw ijuru, Ah' umwijim' utaba.
Abo mw ijuru bose, Nta tabaza bifuza : Ni Wowe mucyo waho N'izuba ritarenga.
Yes' uzatujyaneyo, Tuguhimbaz' iteka.
Wa mwanya mu Getsemani
Sinawibagirwa, Ubwo wabirag' ibyuya Bisa n'amaraso.
Sinibagirw' amakuba Wabonye kubwanjye. Wunamye n'umubabaro Ur' i
Getsemani.
Wari mu biti n'ijoro Kubw’ibyaha byanjye Byaragushenjaguye pe : N’urubanza
rwaniye.
Intumwa zagusizeyo, S’arakuzinukwa. Natwe nta bwo twashobora Kubigereranya.
N’ubona ko mbyibagiwe,Yes’uzanyibutse Bya byuya byawe wabize Kubwanjye,
kubwanjye !
Mbes’uriy’ubabaye,  Wambay’ibitabutse Birihw amaraso ye, Mutubwir’uw' ari we. Dor’ukunt'ananiwe N’igiti yikoreye ! Ko yaboshywe nabi se, Ninde kand’aziz’iki ?
Uwo munt' ubay’atyo Niwe Nyir'ubugingo. Ibicumuro byawe Ni byo bamujijije.
We kujarajar’utyo:Sang’Uwagupfiriye; Pfukam’i Gologota, Wihan' ubabarirwe.
Dor’amahw' asongoye Ni yo kamba yam bitswe, Kand’intebe y'ubwami Yabay’
Umusaraba.Mbes’Umwam' ugizw’atyo, Namumenyeshwa n’iki ? Soma ’icyo kirego, ngo Yesu w'i Nazareti.
Umva Yes’avug' ati: Nshuti yanjy’umenye ko Icyankuye mw ijuru
ar’ukukubeshaho.Ni wowe mbabarizwa, Bakanshinyagurira. Emera nkurokore,
Nkuzuze n’Iman’ubu.
Ndakwihaye, Krisito, Byos’ubimbabarire, Umpumur’umenyeshe Imibabaro
yawe.Non’ inzir’undangira Niyo nzajya nyuramo, Nger’i Wawe mw ijuru, Nzahore
ngusingiza !
Mwana w'Imana, mbega wakoz’iki,Cyatumy’ucirw’iteka iy’ababi ? Impamvu n'iki yaguteye gupfa ?Uyitubwire, turakwinginze.
Wapfuy' urupfu rw'abagome, Mwami Uhemurwa, ushinyagurirwa. Ntangajwe
n'uko.wemeye kubambwa, Upfa nab’utyo ku Musaraba.
Ayo makuba wayatewe n'iki ? N’ibyaha byanjye bakujijije ! Ni jye wapfiriye,
nd’umunyabyaha : Sinkwiriy’izo mbabazi zawe!
Nta cyaha wigcze gukora, Yesu :Ubuntu bwawe burantangaza  Ibyaha byanjye
bitagir’ingano Warabyikorey’ urandokora.
Reka ngushimir' ubwo buntu bwinshi !Nariha nte kubabara kwawe? Akir’ubwenge
bwanjye n'ubugingo. Sinkir’uwanjye: waranshunguye
Umunyamibabaro
ni izina rintangaza
Ry’Umwana w’Uwiteka:
Tumushime, n’ Umukiza!
Yemeye guhemurwa
No gushinyagurirwa,
Apfir’ abanyabyaha:
Tumushime,n’Umukiza!
Twatsinzwe n'urubanza :
We nta kibi yakoze ?
Yatuberey’inshungu :
Tumushime,n’Umukiza
Abambwe, yarangije
Ibyo kuducungura,
Ati: Birarangiye!
Tumushime, ni Umukiza!
Avuye mu gituro,
Ajya mw' ijur' ariho,
Yicaranye n'Imana
Tumushime, ni Umukiza!
Kandi ubwo azagaruka
Ngw' atujyane mw' ijuru
Tuzaririmba tuti
Tumushime, ni Umukiza!
Har' umusozi wa kure Hafi y'ururembo, Ah’ Umukiza yabambwe Watubabarijwe.
Ntabwo twabasha kumenya Uko yababajwe! Twizeye gusa kw’ar’ twe Twatumy’apfa nabi.
Ni cyo cyatumy’ ibyaha byacu Byos’ uko bingana Bikurwaho n’Uwiteka, Tukazaban’i We,
Nta wundi wabasha kuba Inshungu y'lbyaha; Ni we watwugururiye irembo ry'ijuru
Nuk’ubwo yadukiinz’ atyo,Natwe tumukunde, Twiringir’amaraso ye, tumwumvire
rwose.
lyo nibwiye mu mutima Igit’ Umwami yatangiyeho,Nzinukw' ibyo niratanaga; Mbireba nk'ibitariho rwose.
Sinkirat’ikindi, Mukiza, Keretse ko wankunz’ ukamfira;Ndeke n'ibyo nishimiraga,
Ngushimir' uko wanyitangiye.
Ishavu n'ibambe bivanze Byavuye mu mutima wa Yesu;Mbese, har’ undi Mwami nka we Wateg’ ikamba nk'iryo ry'amahwa ?
Mwam’ lyo mba mfit’ isi yose, Nkemera kuyitanga h' ubwishyu,Nta bwo yarangiza
na hato Kwishyur' umwenda wanjy’ ukomeye.
Urwo rukundo wankunz' utyo Rukwiriye kuntangisha byose,Ibyanjye n'umutima
wanjye, Bikab' ibyaw’ ukabitegeka.
I Gologota, ku Giti,
Ni ho Yesu yabambwe;
Yabambiwe kugira
Ngo tubone kudapfa.
Yes’ amaze kunesha,
Avug’ ijwi rirenga,
Abivuga yeruye,
Ati: Birarangiye !
Amaze kuvug’ atyo,
Aherakw arunama,
Yunamishwa n’ibyaha
Byanjye nanze kwihana.
None ansabye imbabazi,
nihane,mukureyo,
mumanure ku giti,
aruhuke umutima.
Aabantu batihana
bongeye kumubamba,
n'umuruho munini,
umubabaza iteka.
twari twararuhijwe,
twiganyira,twihebye,
none turaruhutse:
Yesu ni uburuhukiro
nuko abishwe n'ibyaha,
ni muhunge,mukire.
muze,mubikurwemo:
Yesu ni uburuhukiro
Mukiza,ndakwihaye.
ni wowe wantaruye.
uko nzaba ndi kose,
Yesu,nzagusingiza.
unyigishe Mukiza,Iby’Umusaraba N'icyatumy’ uza mw isi,Ukatubambirwa Umenyeshe umumaro W'umunyabyah’ umwe, Umbwire n'igiciro Wanshungurishije !
Unyigishe n'impamvu  Y'isok’ itukura Yo mu rubavu rwawe,Urwo bacumise, Ari
jye gusa mw isi: Wacumuy’ Imana,Uba warayavuye Ngw’amber’ impongano.
unyerek'urukundo rutarondoreka rwamanutse i kuzimu ku bwacu abihebe.uyu
mutim'ukonje wuzuy'inarijye ,uwatsemwo urukundo ruva i Gologota
Unyigishe,Mukiza:ndi umunyabyaha pe icyantabara,mwami ni ubuntu bwonyine
Yesu ni jy'ugukennye:mu bo wapfiriye b'abanyabyaha babi,ni jyewe ukabije
Mukiza wanjye,Yesu ni wowe nizeye maze ubwo umpamagaye,ndakwiyeguriye none ubwo unyakiriye,njye nshima imbabazi na rwa rukundo unkunda,mbivuge ndinde mfa.
Hafi y'Umusaraba,aho ntura iteka,niho mperwa ku buntu amazi y'ubugingo.
nirata umusaraba kugeza ubwo nzaba mbonye uburuhukiro hakurya y'uruzi
nahageze nshobewe,nsinzwe n'urubanza,Yesu arambabarira,angotesha urukundo.
mwami Yesu unyibutse uwo musaraba.kugira ngo ngendere mu gicucu cyawo.
Ni w’utuma nemera Kwang' iby'isi rwose, Kukw ari w’unkundisha Yesu wamfiriye.
Hafi y'Umusaraba, Ni ho ntur’iteka, Ntegerej’ igihe cyo Kwambuka rwa Ruzi.
Nitegerej’Umusaraba Wo Yesu yadupfiriyeho, Nywubonye, ndamutakambira Ngw ambabarire.
Yes’umwami ahimbazwe izina rye ryogezwe  Yanyogesheje amoroso ye: Yes’ahimbazwe.
Iman’ ishimwe kukw inkiza Imbaraga z'ibyaha zose. Bituma Yes’ambamo neza,
Akantunganya.
Ya soko nziza yoz' ibyaha, Nejejwe n'uko nayinjiyemo; Ni yo Yes’ahor’ankirisha;
Ni y’ anyejesha.
Ngwino kw isoko ngari nziza ! Ca bugufi, wa mutindi we! Jya ku birenge
by'Umukiza,Ngw agutunganye.
Shimwa,Mwami Yesu,—Ko wamviriye Amaraso yawe—Ku Musaraba.
Mur' ayo maraso,—Ni mo mbonera I neza n'ubuntu—No gusugira.
Umugezi wayo—Ni w' uboncza Abawibiramo,—Ntibarimbuke.
Ibuk' ay'Aberi—Ko yatakiye I mana ngw ihore—Uyavushije.
Nyamar' aya Yesu—Ajy' ansabira Uwitek’Imana—Kumbabarira.
Iy’aminjagiwe—K’uwacumuye, Satan’ aratinya,—Agahamuka !
Non’abari mw isi—Tuyasingize ! Namwe mwikirize,—Bamarayika !
Ab’Imana twese—Turangurure, Dushim’ amaraso— Yaducunguye !
Munsi y’Umusaraba
W’Umukiza Yesu
Ni ho nifuza rwose
Guhora mpagaze
N’ibuye ry’igitare
Rimber’ igicucu
Rinkiz’ impagarara
Mu rugendo rwanjye
Uwo Musaraba we
Wabay’ ihuriro
Ry’ukuri n’urukundo
By’Iman’ ihoraho
Unyibutsa za nzozi
Yakobo yarose
Umbereye nk’urwego
Rugenza mw’ ijuru
Hirya y’Umusaraba
Mbonay’ umworera
N’umunwa w’i kuzimu
Wakamw’ umuriro
Nyamar’ imbere yawo
Har’ Umusaraba
Uteze nk’amaboko
Ng’unkize, ntagwayo
Kur’ uwo musaraba
Ndasa n’ushobora
Kureba yesu abambwe
Ari jy’ apfiriye
Ndatangaye Mukiza
Ntiwar’ ukwiriye
Kungirir’ iryo bambe
Jye waguhemuye!
Munsi y’Umusaraba
Nzagumay’ iteka,
Naho nabur’ ibyanjye
Nywubonamw’ inyungu
Nta soni mfit’ uretse
Iz’ ibyaha byanjye
Nzajya nirata gusa
Uwo Musaraba!
Yes' Umucunguzi—Yashyizwe mu mva; Yategerezaga—Igihe cye.
Ku wa gatatu arazuka, Az' atsinz' urupfu n'Umubi: Ava mu mwijima yabinesheje. Yimanye mw ijuru n'abacunguwe.Yarazutse ! Yarazutse ! Tumushime ! Ariho !
Barindiy' ubusa—Umwami wacu; Bakingiy' ubusa—Cya gituro.
Ingoyi z'urupfu—Yaraziciye, Ntizarnuheranye :—Yavuyemo !
b.
Haleluya ! Haleluya ! Haleluya !
Hashimw' Uwatuzukiye ! Kukw avuye mu gituro;Duhuze hamwe,—Twishime tuti: Haleluya !
Yesu, waradupfiriye,ub' Umwam' ubahw iteka. Uradukunda;—Uradushaka :
Haleluya !
Uri mu bwiza bw'ijuru, Uhadutegerereje.Udushakisha—Ubuntu bwawe :Haleluya!
Tuguh' imitima yacu, Uyitware, Mwami Yesu,Ikwishimire—Iminsi yose : Haleluya!
Nimureb’igitangaza: wa munyamubabaro yanesheje wa mugome;tumukomer’ amashyi:Haleluya,Haleluya
Tumwimike, n ‘umwami
Tumuh' ikamba ry'ubwiza,Ngo tumushengerere. Tumuh' Intebe y'ubwami.Twese
tuvuz' Impundu :Haleluya, Haleluya  ni we Nyir'imbaraga
Mwambur' Ikamba ry'amahwa Bamwambitse baseka. Mwambik' Ikamba
ry'Ubwami,Mwemere kw ar' Umwami.Haleluya, Haleluya  Tegeka,Nyir'ingabo
Vuz’ Impundu, rangurura : Yanesheje Satani. Ari mu twicarabami, Tumukurir'
ubwatsi. Haleluya,Haleluya ni We Mwami w'abami.
Yesu Kristo yarazutse : Twese tumushime : Haleluya Uyu munsi, tunezerwe,Twese tumushime : Haleluya
Kera ku Musaraba, Ni ho Yesu yatubabarijwe, Ngw ab' impongano y'ibyaha byacu : Haleluya, reka tumuhimbaze
Yes’ Umwami wo mw’ Ijuru, Twese tumushime:Haleluya  Kukw ar’ umukiza w’abo mw’isi,Yarabambw’arahambwa Ajya n’i kuzimu mu bapfuye.Maz’arabinesh’ava mu rupfu Haleluya, reka tumuhimbaze
Ibyo yababajwe byose, Umukiza wac' abishimirwe Ni byo byonyine byatumye
Tugir' ubugingo budashira.None, yimye mw ijuru, Ahw abamarayika baririmba,
Tumusingizanye na bo, tuti : Haleluya, reka tumuhimbaze.
Yesu Krist' arazutse: None ntidutiny' urupfu,Kuko yarunesheje, Nta butware rugifite. Haleluya
Non' urupfu n' irembo Ry'ubugingo budashira.ibyo bidutinyure, Ni tujya
kurinyuramo.Haleluya
Yesu wadupfiriye Ariho : natwe tubeho Tumushimish' ingeso. Ni We Databuj'
iteka.Haleluya.
Ariho : nta cyabasha Kudutandukanya na We.Aturindira hose, Akagez' iteka
ryose.Haleluya
Turi mu ma boko ye : Koko, nta wamutunyaga Naho yaba Satani, Cyangw' ibyago,cyangw' urupfu.Haleluya
Ariho : ni We Mwami W'ijuru n'isi wenyine;Tuzajy' aho yagiye, Duhorane na W'
iteka.Haleluya
Shimwa, Mukiza—Utuzukiye
Tuguhimbarize—Ko wanesheje  Imana yashatse,—Mu gihe
cyayo,Gutsindish'urupfu—Umucunguzi.
Shimwa, Mukiza—Utuzukiye Tuguhimbarize—Ko wanesheje
Nimumurebe :—Ni We, ni Yesu Mwe gushidikanya :—Ni We Shobuja  Munezerwe
mwese,—Bantu b'Umwami, Nimuvuge, muti :—Yatuzukiye
Nta cyo ngitinya :—Yesu ntagipfa Ni Wempora nshima:—N' uw'amahoro.
Aramfash' iteka;—Arankomeza. Mu kubaho kwanjye,—Nta cyo ngitinya.
Umwami yazutse inkuru yasakaye.Mw ijuru no mw isi, Bashim' Umukiza. Yaganduye byose,Kuko yadupfiriye. Turatunganiwe : Umwami yazutse.
Ntugir’ icyutinya: Umucunguz’ arihoWizer’ ukomeje:Arakurengera.Utowe na
Yesu:witiny’ aragushaka;Yarakwishyuriye Umwami yazutse
Twebw’ abacunguwe Tuzava mu bituro; Azadukangura, Aduh' ubugingo. Kandi
harmve na We Tuzicara kwa Data Mu bwiza bw'iteka. Umwami yazutse
Ubu tunezerwe Kuk' umubabaro n'ibyaha bishize. Umukiza wacu N'ukuri, ni muzim'ubu  Yarazutse.
Kuko ntabw' imva ye Yaherany' umurambo we None twiringiye Ko Yes'uwo
Yazutse Yazutse Yazutse Yazutse  N'ukuri, ni muzima.
Umunt' iy’ apfuye, Aruhuk' umubir' igihe gitoya;Arindir' umunsi Abapfa bose
bazava mu bituro.
Urupfu n'ubwoba,Yesu yarabineshej' arabihamba. Yes' aradukunda : Abana
natwe, turiho no mu rupfu.
Kuri wa munsi tuzazukaho, Yes' azaduh' imibiri mishya;Kurira no kuboroga Ntabwo bizaba bikiriho.
Ubu bugingo n'uyu mubiri Ntabwo byabura gutandukana.None, mubiri, sinzira,
Urindir' uwo munsi mwiza.
Uyu mubiri waruhanyaga Ni wo turambitse mu butaka;Nuk' ubugingo bwonyine
Bwazamutse, bujya mw ijuru.
Ubu bugingo n'uyu mubiri iherezo, bizasubirana, Bihabw' ishusho ya Yesu;
Ntibizatandukan' ukundi.
Mbeg' umunezero mwinshi cyane i Koko, mw izuka, tuzishima pe Ni hw imva zose zo mw isi Zizashiramw abapfu bazo.
Maz' ababyeyi n'abana babo N’ abavandimwe batandukanye N’abishwe
n’urukumbuzi Bazabonanira mw ijuru.
Bazabanayo mubwami bwawe;Bazababatagitandukanira.Kubw’umusaraba
wawe,Uzadusohozeyo natwe.
Bene data mwe mwese ,ni muze dufatanye ibi byago tubonye tubisangire
Kubakunzi b’ Imana ,Amahoro n’ibyago birafatanya Kuzana ibyiza
iyi nshuti ya twese None yadukuwemo. Yadufashaga cyane :Ni y' ituriza.
Twibuk' imihati ye N'uko yakiranutse No kwitanga kwe kose No gutinyuka.
Twese yatugiriye Umumaro w'ukuri, Kandi yatuyoboye Mu byo gukizwa.
Twagira ngw azab' ino imyaka myinshi cyane, Ariko kuva mw isi Kwari kugeze.
imigambi y'Imana Si nk'ibyo twibwiraga. Non' ubw' ibitegetse, Turabyemeye
Umva gusaba kwanjye, Mwuka w'imbaraga  Shyir' ububasha bwawe Mu mutima wanjye. Mwuka Wera,
hishuraibyaha bindimo; Mpesh' ubugingo bushya, ibyaha bimvemo.
Za mu mutima wanjye Mbese, nabaho nte, Ntagufite ng' umbemo?Najya nizera nte ? Mwuka, nyobora neza :Nzajya nkwemerera; Ump' ubugingo bushya N'umutima mwiza.
Ne kongera gutinya iby'Umwanzi mubi, Kuk' ukunda kumfasha,Ukampa kunesha.
Mwuka, nyemez' ibyawe Mu mutima wanjye; Uwuzuz' ubugingo No kunesha byose
Mwuka Wer' udukunda Ni Wow' ujy'utwigisha Kwifuz’ impan' imwe nsa irut' izindi.
iyo mpan' ihebuje N' urukundo rwa Yesu. Kand' umunt' uyibuze, Nta cy' ab'amaze.
Urukundo ni rwiza; Rujya rugira neza; Nta n'ishyari rugira; Ntirwirarira.
Mwuka Wera wo mw ijuru, Mugabyi w'ubugingo we. Manuka, turakwinginze, Sang' imitim' ikwifuza.
Utwerek' uko tur' uku, Ko twishwe n'ibicumuro; Utwereke na Krisito, Ukw ari
n'ukw arokora.
Dore, turakwiragije, Kuk' uz' ibidukwiriye; Tumaremw ibyaha byacu, Utwerek'
Umucunguzi.
Twikish' umuriro wawe imyand' ubonye muri twe, Nk'ishyari, nko kwihimbaza,
N'ibindi byangwa na Yesu.
Uduh' ubuntu bwa Yesu, N'ineza n'amahoro bye, Uduhe n'urukundo rwe. No
kumuyobok' iteka.
Rwanga n'iby'isoni nke; Ntirwishakir' ibyarwo; Rwemera gufashanya;
Ntirurakara.
Kand' ibyaha by'abandi. Ntabwo rubyishimira, Kuko runezererwa ibitunganye.
Rwihanganira byose; Rwizigira n'abandi; Nta n'ikibi rukeka Ku muntu wese.
Kwizera, kwiringira, Cyane cyan' urukundo, Ni zo mpano z'iteka, Ukw ar'eshatu.
Ni zo mpano nifuza, Mwuka Wera w'lmana; Ariko kurutaho, Ump' urukundo.

title: Ubwo Yesu yar'agiye Gusig' abantu be

lines: Ubwo Yesu yar'agiye Gusig' abantu be,
Ngw azamuk' ajye mw ijuru Ku Mana, Se,
Yasezeranye kubaba Umwuka we Wera,
Ngw ahumuriz' ayobore Aba Yesu.
Yiturira mu mutima Wumuntu wihannye; Asukamw urukundo rwe N'amahoro.
ijwi rye ryongorerera imbere muri twe, Rikaduhendahenda ngo Dutinyuke.
ibyiza dukora byose Ni W' ubidutera : Ni W' udutekereresha ibya Yesu.Mwuk'
ureban' imbabazi intege nke zacu, Udutungany' imitima, Uyibemo.
Man' ubwami bwawe—Buze mur'iyi si i Tsind' Umurimbuzi,—Wic' ubutware bwe.
Mwami, dukumbuye —iyo ngo ma yawe.Usimbuz' ineza—inzangano z'isi.
Turagukumbuye i—Ngwin' uc' intambara.Uce n'ingeso mbi,— Zos' uzimareho.
Zana n’imbaraga;_Uz’uduhembure.Turakurindira;_Amas’ahezeyo.
Dor' ukw amasega—Amarahw intama, Kandi hagwiriye—Abatakwitaho.
Amahanga yose—Ari mu mwijima; Yesu, wa zuba we.—Non' uz' uyavire
imitim' ikomezwa No kwiringira cyane
Ko Yes' azagaruka.Azaza vuba, ntazatinda. Tuzagir’ ibyishimo. Yes'ubw' uzagaru.
Kand' abo twakundaga, iyo tubapfushije, Tukababara cyane,iryo ni ryo
ritwiringiza  Turorere kurira : N’aza, tuzabonana
Ni tugir' amakuba, N'ibyo kutunaniza, Twe gukuk' imitima Mw isi s' i wacu :
duhumure  N'ibyo kwihanganirwa Kugez' ahw azazira.
Tugeze ku meza ye,Dusangir' urwibutso Rw'umutsima na vino; Bisur' ameza yo
mw ijuru : Ni ko tuzasangira Na W' ubw' azagaruka.
Ubw' Umwami Yes' azaza
Kwend' abo yatoye, Ab' akunda b'abatoni, Bamuyobotse.
Bazaka nk'inyenyeri Zitatse kw ikamba rye; Bazatangaza cyane, Bakize rwose.
Ubw' azaz' akorany' abo Yatoye ba hose, Bera baboneye rwose, B'abatoni be.
Yemwe bantu, yemwe bantu,bakund' Umukiza, Ni mw' akunda. ni mw' akunda
Nk'abatoni be.
Yesu n' az' umwijim' uzahunga. Kand’urupfu na rwo ruzashira; Nta n'uzac' ukundi mu gicucu Cya cya Gikombe kibi.
Dukumbuye Yesu cyane i icyaduh' akaza vuba Tuzishima twese, Yesu n aza
gukorany' intore ze
Yesu n' az' azac' umuborogo; Azamara mw is' umubabaro; Azahanagur' amarir'
ubwo Kuri tw' abakunzi be.
Yesu n' az' impundu zizavuga, Aje kudukorany' intore ze. Azatwakiran'
umunezero, Tuban' akaramata
Uwadupfiriye kera Azaz' ava mw ijuru; Umwam' azamanukanaN'aber' inzovu nyinshi.Haleluya, Haleluya i Umukiz' azagaruka
Azaboneker' abantu Bos' afit' ubwiza bwe. Kand' abamusuzuguye, Bakamubamba kera, Bazaboroga bamenye Yukw ari Kristo w'ukuri.
Kand' inkovu z'imbereri Azaza zikiriho, Kand' abacunguwe bose
Bazazinezererwa. Mwam' ubwo tuzazireba, ibyishimo bizatwica.
Nuko twese tugusenge, Yes' ushyizwe hejuru  End' icyubahiro cyose, im' ingoma,
n' iyawe i Haleluya, Haleluya i Ni Wowe Mwami wenyine.
Noneho, nimuze : Twih' Umukiza wacu Dukundane nka We, Tub' abera nka We.
Ubwo turi mw isi,Tumwigane, tubeho, Turindir' ijuru. Umwami yazutse

title: Ubw' impanda z'Uwiteka zizavuzwa mw ijuru

lines: Ubw' impanda z'Uwiteka zizavuzwa mw ijuru , Habay’urya munsi mwiz' uhebuje, Abakijijwe bo mwisi bose bazamwitaba,Abakoranirije mw ijuru rye.
Ubw' aza... z' ahamaga.. .ra, Amazi.. .na y'abe bo.. .se, Mu Gita.. .bo cy'ubugi..
.ngo, Nzi ko nzumv' izina ryanjye, nkitaba.
Uwo munsi, hazazurw' abapfiriye muri We, Bave mu bituro nk'Umucunguzi.
Bazahurira mw ijuru n'abazaba bariho.Nzaba mpari nanjye—sinzaburayo
Yesu. Databuja, nzamukorera, ntacogora:Nkwiz' ubuntu n'urukund'
amfitiye.Maz' imirimo yo mw is' ajy'ampa,ni nyirangiza.Azampamagar’ angeze mw ijuru.
Umwami ageze ku irembo, Wabambwe ku Musaraba;
Yaje kudukoranya abe,Tubane mu ijuru.
Ku irembo Ku irembo ! Ubu ari ku irembo!
Nuko araje, nuko araje, Kandi ageze ku irembo.
Ibyerekana kuza kwe Birihuta kuboneka :
Agiye kutugabira Kubaho kw'iteka.
Ntihazabura intambara; Ntabwo amahoro azahora.
Keretse Yesu atsembyeho Urupfu n'ibyaha.
Maze, mu isi yagizwe nshya, Tuzahaba, dusugire,
Kudapfa kwakuye gupfa,Tutakibabara.
Dukanguke, dukanguke ! Dukor' imirimo cyane, Twitange, tub' igitambo Cyo guhimbaz' Uwiteka.
Kera twagirag' ubute; None, reka tubwihane, Dukorer' Imana yacu, Dufit'
umwet' ukwiriye.
Ahar' uyu muns' urupfu Rwaza, rukadutungura. Cyangwa Yesu yagaruka. Bisange dukiranutse.
Twang' uburiganya bwose, Twibuke yuk' Uwiteka Areb' ibyo mu mitima Kand'
atagir' icy' ahishwa.
Nkukw Imana yaduhaye izuba ryo kutuvira, Tumurikir' abafite Umwijima mu
mitima.
Dukanguke, tuyishime, Turirimban' indirimbo N'abayishimir' iteka Mw ijuru no
mw isi yose.
Mukiza, turakangutse i Utwuzuz' Umwuka wawe. Dushimish' Imana yacu
Amagambo n'imirimo.
Mukiza, tuguhaye Uyu munsi, n' uwawe : Ntituz' ibiribube:Ni cyo kidushakisha Yuko waturengera Muri byose,Krisito.
Niba turibubone Amahoro yonyine, Utuber' ibyishimo Birut' ibindi byose.
Haz'ibyag'uduheshe Kukwizera muri byo.
icyo tugushakaho Kirut' ibindi byose N'uko watuboneza, Twirirwe dutunganye,
Twirind' iby' udashima, Yesu, tugushimishe.
Tuz' intege nke zacu igice gusa, Mwami. Nyamara. Mucunguzi, Wowe
ntutuyoberwa : Uz' akaga turimo, Nuk' ujy'uturengera.
Turashaka kwemera Rwos' ibyanditwe byera no kujya twingingira,ubuntu
bwawe,Yesu,no kub'imbata zawe,tugukorera gusa
Mwam'utwumvir'uduhe impano twingingira Tugir' umutim' umwe Utishakir' ikindi
Keretse gukor’ ibyo Udushakaho, Yesu.
iri joro, Mana yanjye, Ndagushimir' umugisha Wampay' uyu munsi wose; Non' umpishe mu mababa.
Kubwa Yesu, mbabarira ibyaha nakoze none,Ngo mbe nuzuye na bose,
Ntaragondwa n'ibitotsi.
Unyigish' ingeso nziza, Ngo mpore nzigir’ iteka. Ne kuzatinya no gupfa, Nkuko
ntatiny' ibitotsi.
Umpe gusinzira neza, Niringira yuk' undinda; Binsubizemw imbaraga; Maz' ejo
nzagukorera.
Ni mbur’ ibitotsi, Mwami, Untekereresh' ibyiza, inzozi zo kumbabaza, Satani ye
kunshogoza
Mana, Nyir'ibyiza byose, Ushimwe n'abantu bose, Ushimwe n'abo mw ijuru, We
Man' imwe mu Butatu.
Data ngiye gusinzira :Ngwin' undind' iri joro, Umbundikiz' amababa, ibibi bitanzaho. (x 2)
Umbabarir' ibi byaha Nagukoreye none, Kand' Umwuka wawe wera Untere
kukumvira. (x 2)
Kand' uryamish' amahoro Bene wacu n'inshuti Bato na bakuru bose, Ubarind'
ubiteho. (x 2)
ineza yaw’ iboneke Mu bababaye bose, Kand' ukenur' abakene, Abarway' ubakize. ( x 2)
Mwami, ndangije gusenga, Nsinzire nkwiseguye, Marw' ubwoba no kumenya K'
undindish’ urukundo. (x 2)
Mwam' ubugingo bwacu ni nk'umunsi: Ni buke rwose ntiburama cyane; Kand' ibyishimo byabwo birashira:Mwam' udahinduka, tugumane.
Gumana nanjye, kuk' umuns' ukuze, Dore burije, Mwami, ndagushaka; Ni mbur'abandi bose bo kumfasha,Tugumane,  Mwami, tugumane
Iminsi yose mba ngushaka, Mwami, Iyo Satan' antey' andwanya cyane, Nta wundi mfit' ubasha kuntabara;Tugumane, Mwami, tugumane.
Singir’ umwanzi n'umwe turi kumwe, Kand' amakuba ntambabaza cyane; Intorezo y'urupfu yaracitse;Byose ni byiza, ni tugumana.
Amaso n' aremb' uzambonekere, Nzabon' ubwiza bwawe bwo mw ijuru, Nzasiga
vub' umwijirna wo mw isi,No mw ipfa ryanjye, tuzagumane !
Mukiza, ni Wowe zuba ryanjye Nta joro ngir’ iyo turi kumwe. Iby'isi bye kub’ igicu Kinkingiriz' umucyo wawe !
Kand' iyo mbony' ibitotsi byiza, Bikanduhur' umubir' urushye,Nibuke yuko mw
ijuru,Nzahora nkwiseguye, Yesu.
Tujye tuguman’ umunsi wire, Kuko ntabaho tutari kumwe;Tugumane na
n'ijoro;Tutabanye, natinya gupfa.
Niba hagiz' uwasuzuguye Ijwi ry'Imana kur'uyu munsi,Tangira none,
Mukiza,Kumuyobor' inzira nziza.
Mwam' abarwayi, mubane maso, Uh' abaken' imigisha myinshi,Kand' abapfushije
na bo,Mwam’ ubasinzirize neza.
Kandi, Yesu, tuzakangukane, Dukor' imirimo, turi kumwe,Nyuma tuzajye mw ijuru
Tugoswe n'urukundo rwawe.
Dor' umuns' urakuze :Reb' aho rirengeye !Reb' ukwezi n'inyenyeri : Dore, biragaragaye, Bitwakira.
Data wera, wera, Mwani Imana, Wuzuy' isi n'ijuru; Twese tugusingize,
Nyir'ingabo !
Rurema, Nyirigira, Ngwino, turakwifuza.Twes' utwuzuz' urukundo, Utugir'
ubwoko bwawe, Tukuramye.
Ni hacur' umwijirna. Utugotesh' umucyo !Weyur' ibikingiriza Imitima yacu
twese, Tukubone.
Duhe kukwiringira : Ni dupfa, Mucunguzi,Tuzabon' umucyo mwinshi, Nukw’ ijoro
rye kubaho, Tugushime!
Imins' irahita vuba, Irahita yihuta. Ukw ihita, benshi bapfa Batameny’ Umukiza. Hari twakora :Tugikoran' umwete : Dutabar' ubu vuba, Imins' itarashira.
Irashira, irashira ! Dor' iminsi irashira!  Dutabar' ubu twese, Twe gukererwa
dutyo!
None, bib' imbuto nziza mu mitima y'abantu; hagura n'amarira y
'abanyamibabaro.
Renger' abapfakazi,Kand' ubyuts' abaguye, Uhumure n'impumyi,Ibiseb' ubivure.
Iby' uzabishobor' ute ? Ntibizakunanira, ib' ufit' Umwuka Wera N'urukundo
rw'Imana:
ibiduh' itimanye,Tubishatse byukuri. Tuyisengan' umwete, Dukor'
iby'imbabazi.
Icy' Umwami Yes' ashaka N' ukugendana natwe, Ngo yikiriz' abarushye
Bamutey' umugongo. Kandi yaravuz' ati:Uzanyizera wese Azabwir' irimisozi Ngo nitabwe mu nyanja.
We gutiny' ibir' imbere : Yes' azagushoboza. Umuh' umutima wawe, Awutegeke rwose ! Isi yubahe Yesu ! Yadutsindiy' urupfu N'abadayimoni bose. Ubu ni We dufite.
Sigaho kwizera guke :Na wa wundi yakizwa ! Wibuke ko Paulo na we Yar'
umwanzi w'ibyiza; Yamufash' atunguwe,Yemera gukizw' ubwo, Ab' intumwa ya
Yesu, Yamamaz' ubuntu bwe.
Tyo n'ubu, mugende mwese, Muri kumwe na Yesu; Mubamwerek; abakize, Bos'
abazabyemera.  Kandi mwe  gucogora Cyangwa se kunanirwa, Mutarabasohoza Ku Mukiz' ubifuza.
Ngiy' inkuru twumvise;N'uko Yes' akiza! Vuga hos' iyo nkuru Yuko Yes' akiza ! Menyesh' abarimbuka,Abo mu birorero N'abo mu midugudu, Yuko Yes' akiza !
Menyesh' abananiwe Yuko Yes' akiza Menyesh' abashobewe Yuko Yes’ akiza!
Yavuy' amaraso ye Kera ku Musaraba,Ngw abakize, be gupfa:  Ni ko Yes’ akiza!
I Rukig' ubabwire Yuko Yes' akiza ! Umvish' i Bugesera Yuko Yes' akiza ! Vug' i
Bunyambiriri N'i Ndorwa n'i Bumbogo,Bwira n'i Bufumbira Yuko Yes' akiza !
Banyarwanda, mumenye Yuko Yes' akiza ! Nimwihane, mwemere Yuko Yes' akiza ! Umvish' abacuruzi, No mu nkik' ubivuge,N’i buzungu n'i bwami, Yuko Yes' akiza !

title: A bantu benshi cyane bataye uwiteka

lines: A bantu benshi cyane Batay' Uwiteka, Bazimiye nk'intama Zahabiye kure, Zihagaze ku manga, Zikicwa n'imbeho,impyisi zikazirya : Ni kw abo bameze!
Nimuze,tubashake Twe tubatarure  Bizatunezeza cyane, Tuzany' intam' imwe,
Hemeye nde kugenda Gushak' inzimizi, Ntiyite ku makuba No kubiruhanya, Ngwagir' ure umwete mwinshi  Nk' ushak' itungo rye, Agend’ ashak' intama Yesu yapfiriye
Nubw' uri mu mahoro, Mbese, wumv' ufite Ishyaka rikujyana Gushak' iza Yesu? Nahw ar’ aboroheje Cyangw’ abagayitse N' abantu b'igiciro Mu maso ya Yesu.
No kw irembo ry'urugo.Yes’ arahagaze, Ahamagar’ intama, Azugururiye.Abuz'
abazicyura :Ni wow’ abwir' ati: Ushak' intama zanjye, Izo napfiriye
Byab' ari byiza Yesu Bwakwira tukaza Tukakubwira tuti :N'ukuri twiriwe
Dushak' intama zawe Izi zazimiye.Ngizi, turazicyuye : Zishyire mu rugo !
N' ijwi ry'umwungeri twumva; Ari mw ishyamb' ashak' ize, Zose zagiye intatane, Zavuye mu ruhongore.
Tarura, tarura Izo ntama ze zazimiye;Tarura, tarura Izo ntama uzimushyire.
Ni nde wafash' Umwungeri Kujya gushak' inzimizi Zicwa n'imvura
n'imbeho,Akajya kiratarura ?
Abantu bazimiye Bageze kure mu byaha. Yesu ngo, Gend' ubazane, Baz' ababere umwungeri.
Har 'intama  urwenda n'icyenda Zari hamwe mu rwuri; Arikw imwe yar' izimiye,Ivuye ku Mwungeri,Mu bihanamang'izerera,itaye umwungeri wayo mwiza.
izo ufit' urwenda n'icyenda, mbese, ntizihagije? ;uwomwunger' ati: Sigaho !  na
yo n' iyanjye !naho yab' igeze kure he, ngiye  gushak' iyo ntama yanjye.
mu bacunguwe nta wamenya imigezi yambutse no  kuzerera mu mwijima,ashak' iyo ntama ye ! yumva intam' ihondobereye, asanga  ivunitse, yenda gupfa.
iyi nkora mbona n' iy'iki, Kw irimw amaraso se ?ati:ntuzi ko nanyuze aho,nshaka
intama izimiye? ibiganza byishwe n'iki se? byishwe n'amahwa muri iri joro.
umva,ngiry'ijwi rirangira ry'uwo mwungeri mwiza,ati mbony'iyo najimije,ni
munezerwe mwese!nuko abamarayika bose bavuz'impundu,banezerewe!
Kiz' abarimbuka; renger' abapfa; Bakiz' ibyaha n'urupfu rubi! Shak' abazimiye; byuts' abaguye; Menyesha bose ko Yes' akiza.
Kiz' abarimbuka, renger' abapfa, Bageze kwa Yesu, ngw’ abakize !
Abamushungera, na bo ntabanga;Ategerej' abihana neza. Bahate bihane, bizere Yesu. Ujy'ubasabira ngo bakizwe.
Toz' abazimiye, be kuzuyaza, Barek' irari ridakwiriye : Non' ubakangure,
bisubiremo, Bagarukir' Uwabacunguye.
Kiz' abarimbuka : yaragutumye,Kand' akubashish' uwo murimo. Bos' ubayobore
mu nzira ntoya! menyesh' indushyi ko zaruhuwe !
Biba mu gitondo imbuto z'ineza; Jy'ubiba ku manywa n'ikigoroba Rindira ko zera, .baze basarure,Tuzatund' imiba, tunezerewe.
Tuzanezerwa! Tuzanezerwa! Ni dutund'imiba, tuzanezerwa.
Bib' izuba riva; biba mu kibunda :Ntugatiny' ibihu n'imbeho nyinshi. Amasarura
n'imirimo bishize, Tuzatund' imiba, tunezerewe.
Tugende turira, tubibir’ Umwami. Niba
tubabazwa n’abarimbuka Tuzahozwa n’aza, dushir’agahinda: Ni dutund’ imiba,
tuzanezerwa
Yes' azaganz' ibihugu byose ,Iyo biva bikagera. Ndetse n'iyi si yos' izab' ubwami bwe, Ari we Mwami w' abami.
Bazamusenga badacogora;Bazamusingiz' iteka. Izina rye  rizababer' impumuro,
Ikwire mw is' isandare.
Twihute, twamamaz' ibye hose,Mu moko yose yo mw isi, Ngw indimi zose zizavug’ ishimwe rye, Zemere yukw ar' Umwami.
Ku ngoma ye, n' amahirwe masa: Imboh' arazibobora, Kand' abakene na b'
akabakenura, Indushy' akaziruhumu.
Nimuze mwese, mwa byaremwe mwe Mwubah' Umwami w'abami; Nam we
bamarayika, turirimbane, Tut' Urakaz' uhimbazwe
Urukundo rwa Yesu Nzi ko rwatugezeho. Rudukuraho rwose Urubanza rwo gupfa.
Yes' arankunda, (x3) Kuko yamfiriye.
Abatari bahabwa Ubugingo bw'iteka, Twihute tubabwire Urukundo rwa Yesu.
Nkuko yadukunz' atyo, Akadupfira twese, Natwe dukunde dutyo Abakiri mu
byaha.
Nuk' ubw' azagaruka, Aje kwim' ingoma ye, Tuzumv' ijwi ry'Umwami, Ati:
Mwakoze neza.
Igitabo cy'lmana, Ndagikunda, n'icyanjye : Ni cyo kimbwir' ukuri, Yuko nd' umunyabyaha.
Kinyigish' urukundo Rw'Umucunguzi wanjye : Iyo nyoby' inzira ye, Vub
kirantarura.
iyo ntewe n'ibyago, Kimar' umubabaro; Nigishwa na cyo yuko Nd' umusuhuke mwisi.
Igitabo cy' Imana Kimbwira yuk' umuntu Azanesha n'urupfu, Yizey' Umucunguzi.
Kimbwira k' utihana, Agapfan' ibyaha bye, Azarimbuka koko, Ntabane n'Uwiteka.
Kandi nigishwa na cyo Kw’ abakunzi ba Yesu Bazahabw' ibyishimo Bitazashir’
iteka.
Igitabo cy'lmana Gihora kinyigisha Amagamb' ahebuje : Ndagikundir' ukuri.
Ijambo ryaw' urimfungurire , Nkuko wahagije bya bihumbi, Yes' ubasaturiy' umutsima, Nonub' umpaze nanjy' undengere.
Ni Wowe mutsima w'ubugingo; Nkizwa n'ijambo ryawe ry'ukuri. Rimber' ifunguro ry'umutima, Nkunde n'ukuri kwaw’ unyeretse.
Yes' ump' Umwuka waw' andengere, Ankore no ku maso, mpumuke. Mbon'
ibihishwe by'ijambo ryawe, Nawe, nkubonemo, Mucunguzi !
Icyo gitab' ukimpishurire, Kinshinj' ibyaha byanjye, nkwizere, Niho nabaturwa,
nkabohorwa,Ni hw amahoro yawe yanzaho !
Nubwo nd' umwana muto bwose, Jye nd' agatama ka Yesu; Mbasha no kwinjira mw irembo Rijya mu Bwami bw'Imana.
Njye nshyira neza, (X 2) Murokozi, Kwizera kwanjye ( x 2) Muri Wowe.
Nubwo nd' umwana muto bwose, Yesu, war' umeze nkanjye; Umwuka wawe n'
ump' ubwenge, Ni bwo nzasa nawe rwose.
Nubwo nd' umwana muto bwose, Nsa n'urum' iyo hakeye; Yesu ni we
munyabubasha, Anshorez' ukuboko kwe.
Jye ndi muto; ndacyari mw isi, Mfit' ubugingo bugufi : Mukiz' ubwawe n'
ubw'iteka; Muri bwo mbone kurama.
tugiye gutaha: ntitwibagirwe amagambo yera batwigishije
ii.Uyu munsi mwiza—Twumvir' Umwami N’ umunsi w'izuka—Ry'Umucunguzi.
Twubahir' Imana—Ahantu hose, Twumvir' ijwi ryayo—Rituyobora.
Iman' itwigishe—Kubar' iminsi, Twibuke kw ari Yo—Itubeshaho.
Tuyiririmbire,—Tuyishimire, Kuko yaduhaye—Umwami mwiza.
Uko njya mbona mw 'ijuru
Njya mbwir' Umwami, nti
Ndakwinging' unyigishe Kuguh' umutima.
Iteka mu gitondo,Njya mbwir' Umwami, nti :
Nyiriz' imbere yawe, Mana yanjye nkunda.
Kenshi cyane mu munsi, Njya mbwir' Umwami, nti : Ni Wowe turi kumwe: Uhor'
ushimishwa.
Kand' iy' ijoro rije, Njya mbwir' Umwami, nti : Mukiz' ureba hose, Mpa ku byiza
byawe !
Kugez' igihe nzapfa,Nzabwir’ Umwami, nti: Ni kuri Wowe, Data, Njya mperw'
umugisha.
Har'ubw' abagore Bazany' abana babo , Abigishwa ntibemera Ko barushya Yesu. Nyamara Yes' abony’ibyo,Arabahamagar'
ati :Mwemerer' abana ngo baz' aho ndi !
Ati : Ndabakira, Mbashyire ku bibero; Ntimuzi ko nd' Umwungeri W'abana bato,
se? Ni banyisunga bitanze,Nzabaha kujya mw ijuru : Mwemerer'   abana ngo baz'aho ndi !
icyaduh’abana bo mumahanga yose ! kumv’inkuru za Yesu, bakaza kuriwe
abayeruriy’ umwijima , abakiran’ imbabazi twemerer’abana ngo baz’ahwari!
Mumushime, bana bato mwese:N' Umukunzi wanyu. Twese, twese, tujye tumushima : Adukunda twese.
Mumusenge, bana bato mwese:N’ Umukunzi wanyu. Twese, twese, tujye
tumushima : Adukunda twese.
Mumukorere..............
Tuzany' amaturo—Yo gushimisha : Yose n' aya Yesu;—tumutur' ubu !.
Tumuture, tumuture,—Tumutur' ubu ! Yose n' aya Yesu—Tumutur' ubu !
Ava mu biganza—Byac’ aba Yesu; Turayamutuye,—Tut' abana be.
Ubu turi bato:—Ni yo dufite. Ubwo tuzakura,—Tuzasumbyaho !
Ibike dufite,— Yes' ubyakire. Ubwacu ukwihe Non' utwemere !
Yesu ntahinduka, Ntahinduka, ntahinduka;Yesu ntahinduka Na hato !
Yesu yanyogeje, Yanyogeje, yanyogeje; Yesu yanyogeje Ibyaha.
Ni We wampagije, Wampagije, wampagije;Ni We wampagije : Ndahaze!
Yes' azanyakira, Anyakire, anyakire;Yes’ azanyakira, Ngez' i We.
Ni We tuzabana, Tuzabana, tuzabana;Ni We tuzabana Mw ijuru.
Mpore musingiza, musingiza, musingiza;Mpore musingiza, Nishimye !
Mbe nk'umurase w'izuba Aho ngera hose, Mbonesh' umucyo wa Yesu Mu mwijima w'isi.
Yesu, Mucyo w'isi, Mbe nk'umurase kubwawe,Ngez’ umucyo wawe Mu mwijima w'iyi si !
Mbe rik'umurase w'izuba  weyur' umiwijima wo mu mitima y'abantu Bataz'
Umukiza.
Mbe nk'umurase w'izuba,  Mfash' ab'i muhira, nkwiz' amahoro ya Yesu  Mu bo
duturanye.
Mbe nk'umurase w'izuba :Mbisezeranye  ntyo. nerekan' ingeso nziza ; Ziva kuri
Yesu.
Amaboko yawe, Yesu Mukiza, Yagirag' ineza n'iby'imbabazi, Kand' abana bat' akabakikira, Agakiz' indembe n'abamugaye.
Arnaboko yanjye ndayaguhaye. Ab' ayawe, Yesu, uyakoreshe ! Umpe kuba nkawe, njye ngukorera, Njye nkoran' umwet' umurimo wawe !
Bana, ntimugire—Icyaha mukora, Ntimutonganishwe—N'uburakari.
Bana, kuko muri—Aba Yesu Kristo, Nukw ingeso zanyu—Zib' ingeso ze.
Yavugag’ iteka—Iby'ukuri byose, Nta by'isoni Yesu —Yigez' akora,
Nta n'umwe yigeze—Kugirira nabi Kuko Yes' iteka—Yangag' ibyaha.
Har' ufit' ubwenge—Bwo kuboshya nabi: N' Umwanzi Satani—Uhora hafi.
Abasezeranye—Kwimura Satani No kurek' ibyaha,—Mwe kumwumvira.
Yes' azabafasha—Kumurwanya cyane, Kuk' ubwe wenyine—Yamunesheje
Mukiza, Mwungeri mwiza, Uturinde tw' abana bawe; Iri jor' utube hafi, Ngo turamuk' amahoro.
Wiriw’ uturinze hose, Uturagiy' intama zawe; Kandi wadutunze neza : Nuko, wumv' ibyo dusaba.
Yesu, Mwunger' udukunda, Tubabarir' ibyaha byacu; Rind' abo dukunda bose;
Nyum' uzatugez' i Wawe!
Yesu, Mwungeri wanjye, Nd' agatam' undagire. Byose ndabitinyuka : Nta wuzakunyambura!
Mwami, waramfiriye Kera ku Musaraba : Mbonye n'ibikomere Mu biganz'
unteruje.
None,njye ngusingiza, Muri byose nkumvire I Urukund' umfitiye, Ni rwo
runyishimisha.
Yesu, Mwungeri mwiza, Non’ unyiyegereze !Mmenyereza noneho, Nzinukwe
kuzimira!
Mwami Yes’ unahorere, nshe mu nzir’ifunganyc; Nta cyo nanz' untegeke : Wow'uz’ ibinkwiriye!
Ngez' ah’ uri mw ijuru, Ibijya binyobera,Ni ho nzabimenyera, Nshim' uko
wandagiye !
Harihw Inshuti y'abana Ihoraho mw ijuru, Ibakund' urukundo Rutagir' iherezo.
Nubw'inshuti zo mw’isi Zaduhararuka,  Inshuti yacu, Yesu, Ntiyaduhemukira.
Kandi mw ijuru ry'Imana, Har' uburuhukiro Bw'abana bamukunda Bakambaz'
Imana, Se Ahw abagenzi bato Bajya basohora;   Baruhukir' iteka Mu mahor’
adashira.
Nyir'urugo rwo mw ijuru N' Uwatubabarijwe. Ahamagar' abana Ngo binjire muri
rwo.N’ urugo rwiza cyane Rw'amahoro masa; Kand' ibyishimo byaho Birut' iby'abo mw isi.
Harihw amakamba yera Y'abana bakijijwe Bazaherwa mw ijuru  Na Yesu
bakoreye. Abamushimishije Bakunz’ izina rye, Azabagororera Ingororano nziza.
Harihw indirimbo nziza  Y'abana bakijijwe  Bazaririmb' iteka,Basohoye mw
ijuru:Ishim’ urukundo Uwabacunguye;Kand' abayiririmba Ntabwo bazacogora
Hariho n'imyenda yera Y'abana bakijijwe  N'impundu z'ibyishimo N'inanga
z'izahabu.Abakunz' Umukiza Bazabigabirwa, Tukiriho dukunde Yes' urukundo
rwinshi.

title: Uwo ni nd' urambitswe Mu muvure

lines: Uwo ni nd' urambitswe Mu muvure w'inka se ?
N’Umukiz' Umwami wacu  n’ igltangaza tubonye. Ngwino, tumwunamire, Tumuramy' atwimemo !
Uriya wasonzeye Mu butayu ni nde se ?
Kand' uriya wigisha Bos' ibyiza ni nde se ?
Ni nde se bazanira Abarwayi n'indushyi ?
Mbese, ni nd' uririra Lazar’ amaze gupfa ?
Ni nde se basingiza, Ahetswe n'indogobe ?
Mbese, ni nd' ushavuye, Aseng' i Getsemane ?
Uhaw' iby' atakoze Ku Musaraba ni nde?
Ni nde watuzukiye Ngw atubohor' ibyaha ?
Ni nd' ugeze mw ijuru, Afit' icyubahiro ?
Twishimir’ umunsi w'Imana, Tubonahw ibyishimo. N' umunsi turuhukiraho,Tuvuye mu mirimo, Imibabaro yac’
ivuyeho No kwiganyira kose. N’ umuns' abakuru n'abato Basingiz' Uwiteka.
Imana yarangije byose Kur' uyu munsi mwiza; Kandi ni ho Kristo yazutse Urupf
‘arunesheje, Ngo dukizw' ibyaha n'ingeso mbi;Maz' atwoherereza Umwuka
w'Iman' ihoraho, Wamanutse mw ijuru.
lyo tugejej' uyu munsi Tubon' ubukiriro, Tuba dusa n'abasohoye Ahitwa
Paradiso. Twari tuguy' umwum' ukabije;None tubony' amazi; Kand' isi
twasezeranijwe Tuba tuyigezemo.
Non' ingoma nyinshi zavuzeGuhamagaz' abayo, Bateranire gufungura Ifunguro
ry'Imana: Ubutumwa buramurikira Bos' a bo mu mwijima, Kandi busa n'amazi meza Ahembur' imitima.
Nuko dusab’ Iman' iduhe Ub' umugisha mushya Kugira ngo tuzasohore Mu bwami bwo mw ijuru. Ni ho tuzajya duhimbarisha Ijwi ry'umunezero Data wa twese
n'Umwana we Kandi n'Umwuka Wera.
Haleluya ! Haj' umunsi Wo kuruhukir' Imana, Uyu munsi ni w' urusha Iyindi yos’ amahoro. Iteka,twumv' ibyishimo Biva ku Mana yacu.
Uburuhukiro bwiza Bubaho mur'uyu munsi. Umucyo w'Imana yera Ub’
uratumurikiye.Ni w' utweza mu mitima Ku munsi w’ Uwiteka.
Mbega, nambar' iki none, Mbone kwizihiz' Imana ? Dor’ umwambaro yampaye N’
ugukiranuka kwayo, Kugira ng’umubi nkanjye Nerekan' ubwiza bwe.
We yamviriy' amaraso, Kuko ngir’ ibicumuro; Gukiranuka kwe ni ko Kwez' uyu
mutima wanjye. Ibyo n' umwambaro wanjye Ukwiriy' icyumweru,
Mwami Yesu, turaje Kumv' amategeko yawe; Ushyire mu mitima Ijambo ryawe riryoha. ibyo mw’ isi tubireke, Dutekerez' iby'ijuru.
Nta cyo twebwe twamenya, Iyi mitim' icyijimye,Itakiwe n'umucyo Uva mu Mwuka
w'Imana. Utwigishe kuyoboka, Ngo tujye dukora neza.
Dore, Mwana w'Imana, Twebwe twese tugusaba Ng’ utweresh' imitima Umwuka
wawe w'ukuri; Tujye twumva, turirimbe :Tunezez' Imana yacu.
Inzu yawe, Mana,—Turayishimira : Ni h' ujy'uhurira—N'abo wakijiije.
Duteraniramo—Guseng' Uwiteka, Tukamwaturira—Ibi tuba baza.
Dufashirizwamo—N' Ijambo ry' Imana: Tukirisomerwa,—Twunguk’ ibya Yesu.
Tubwiririzwamo—Ibidukomeza Mu ntambara nziza,—Bikatunezeza.
Tuharirimbira—Ishimwe rya Yesu, Twagera mw ijuru,—Tukazarushaho.
Mw is' ujy'unkundisha— Kubana n'a bawe; Nzaguhimbazanye—N'abera mw ijuru
Iki gihe twamaranye Tuyobowe n'ibendera; Dutandukany' amahoro, Twifitiy' umunezero.
Mwa nshuti zacu nziza mwe, Dusangiye gucungurwa N'intambara ya Krisito, Ajy'abarind' iyo mujya.
Mwumv' iri jambo dusoma Mu Gitabo cy'Uwiteka : Mutumbir' Umurokozi,
Mwihararuk' inzira ye.
Ahar' amaso yab' aya, Ntitwongere kubonana. Nyamara tw’ abakijijwe Tuzahurir’i Siyoni.
Yes azah' abakijijwe lngororano mw ijuru. Mukomez' ibyo mwahawe Na We,
katanga ka mbere.
Mwa nshuti mwe dukundanye, Twabonany' Umusaraba Mur' iyi minsi twabanye, Mugendane n'Uwiteka.
Ituza riva mw ijuru Ritwuzure tw' aba Yesu, Itorero rye ryo mw isi Rikir'
imitima myinshi.
Twihane gukiranirwa Kw'abatubah’ Uwiteka, Tumenye yuko twe twese
Tuzageran' imbere ye.
Ngaho, murabeho mwese, Bagenzi twafatanije, Tuzaba hamwe mw ijuru,
Duhoraneyo na Yesu
Yemwe, nshuti twabanye Kandi twafatanije,
Tubasezeyeh’ ubu, Murabeho : Ku Mana.
Tugiye gutangira Urugendo runini :
Mujye mudusabira, , Iman' ibane natwe.
Noneho, mwa nshuti mwe, Turashaka kugenda.
Ngo tujyane na Yesu, Hamwe n'Uwiteka, Se.
Ariko ntitwihebye Kubw' inzira ducamo:
Tuzi ko twarushyize Mu maboko y'Imana.
Murabeho, bagenzi, Abo twafatanije.
Mu byago no mu byiza. Yes' agendane namwe.
Har' uburuhukiro Bw'abakijijwe bose
Ni dupfa, tuzabayo Ku Witeka mw ijuru.
Ahar' amaso n' aya Yo kubonana mw isi;
Nyamar’ abakijijwe Tuzabana mw ijuru.
Murabeho, bagenzi Dusubiy' i wac' ubu.
Nimugende mwizeye, Tubaragij' Imana.
Abakund' Imana mwese ,Ni hagir' abapfa muri mwebwe, Cyangwa se natwe tugapfa, Tuzahurir' i Siyoni twese.
Turashima lyatumye Tumaran’lyi minsi.
Nta mwenda wose duflte : Twiteguye gufashwa n'lmana No kwamamaz'
Ubutumwa Mu bihugu tugiyemo byose.
Iki gihe tumaranye, Twari dufatanirije hamwe;None natwe turagiye, Namwe
musigarane n'lmana.
Nshuti zacu, twarabanye; Tubasezeranyeh’ urukundo.Dushim’ Imana yatumye
Dufatany' iki gihe tumaze.
None, ngaho, murabeho ! Iman' ibane namwe .
Umukiz' abe hamwe namwe, Ababer' umujyanama, Abaragire nk'intama, Abarinde mu mahoro ye !
Hamwe namwe, ye, hamwe namwe  Kugeza ku mperuka y'isi I Hamwe namwe,
ye, hamwe namwe, Umukiz' abe hamwe namwe.
Mu rugamb' abe hamwe namwe,Ab' ingabo yany' ikinze, Abarinde mu makuba,
Abahishe mu mababa ye !
Mu miruhw abe hamwe namwe, Mubuyerezwa n'ibyago, Mu bukene no mu
ndwara, Abaramiz' amaboko ye.
Mu mahor' abe hamwe namwe,No mu gihe cy'urushyana,  No mu mvura no ku
mucyo, Mub’ iteka mu mahoro ye.
No mu ntambara yo hanyuma,Ha’ urupf’ imbere yanyu, Mwenda kwambuka rwa
ruzi, Azab' ari hamwe namw' ubwo.

title: Gukundana kw'aba Yesu Ni ko kudukoranije

lines: Gukundana kw'aba Yesu Ni ko kudukoranije, Ariko murunga w'abana'Imana Yabanje gukund' abayo.
Duhore dusabirana Ngw iduh' imitim' ihuje, Ngw imare muri twe ibyaha
n'ubwoba, Iduh’ umugisha wayo.
Twabon’ umukristo wese Watay' iyi nzira yayo, Tuzinging' Imana ngw imwibuts'
ibyayo Ngo yonger' are be Yesu.
Kand' iyo dutandukanye, Tujyanye n'Umwami wacu, Uhor' uturindish' ubuntu
n'ihirwe, Dukomej' ubumwe bwacu.
Imana yakoze neza Ibidutangaza, Abantu bo mur' iyi si Batari babona.
Muhimbaz’ lyateguye Inzira ducamo. Ni Y' itubonanij’ ubu Tutishwe n'ibyaha.
Twaherukanaga kera,Nyamara noneho Dusubiye kubonana, Dufit' ibyishimo.
Yemwe bagenzi dukunda,Nta kibi twibuka Mu byo twafatanyemo; Turabashimiye.
Ku Mana, bene Data mwe,Mw isi, ni ko biba. Abifuza Siyoni nshya, Tuzaban' iteka.
Non' umugisha w'Imana Uhorane namwe. Ibah' ibibanezeza Mu nzira mucamo.
Man' itang' itimana, Twese tuguhimbaze :
Kokw imbabazi zawe Ntabwo zizarangira !
Tugushimiy' izuba Waturemeye, Mana ;
Waduhaye n'ukwezi Kutwakira n'ijoro :
Tugushimiy' imvura Imez' ibyo tubiba :
Kand' imirima yacu Wayihay’ umugisha :
Mana, waduhesheje Ibigega byuzuye:
No mu mitima yacu, Wez' imbuto wateye :
tugukuriy'ubwatsi ku byo twejeje byose:
Mukiza, wadutoreye Kuba nk'umubir' umwe ; Urashaka yuko twera, Twihanganira byose.Ntushaka n'ibitatanya Abo waje
guhlra; Urukundo rwawe, Mwami,Ruduhuz' imitima.
Yemw' abakundwa na Yesu,Na none nimwongere. Muvuge mwes' imbere ye Ibyo mwasezeranye. Kandi ni mwongera kumva K' urukundo rwatubye, Mumwingingish' imitima, Yemere kubuzuza.
Bana b'Imana Rurema,Ntimutinye kwitanga ; Mu kubaho kwanyu
kose,Mukundane. mwihwema ! Umukiza wacu Yesu Ni kw ajy' atugirira, Ngo
haboneke muri twe Ubuntu bw'Uwiteka
Mwami Yesu, wakomeje Isezerano ryacu; Kand' utwigishe kubana Mu rukundo
nyakuri. Mwam' ujy' uruduh' iteka,Rudacogora rwose; Ni bwo bose bazamenya
Yuko watwitoreye.
Hose habera heza Inshuti zibana : Zirakundana neza, Zibanye na Yesu.
Nkukw iy' imvur’ iguye, Ihembur' imyaka, Ni kw Iman' ibigenza, Yez' abakundana.
Kubana kwabo kwiza,Barahugurana, Ngo be kugwa mu cyaha, Babon' amahoro.
Umwuk' uhamagara Abo mw isi yose, Ngo bazab' ishyo rimwe, Umwunger'
ab'umwe.
Aho, mwumvis' ijwi ry'Umwami ? Ati, Basore, mubyuke ! Turi hano, tugandukire Rwos’ amategeko yawe.
Tuguhay ubusore bwacu N’urukundo rwacu, Mwami: Mu ntege nke zacu twuzure Tujye duhoran' iteka.
Twifuza cyan' umucyo wawe N'urukundo n'amahoro; Twishiman' ibendera yawe, Tuyuyane mw isi yose.
Dufatish' ukuboko kwawe, Ujy' udushorer' iteka. Nubwo duterwa n'ibitwosbya,
Ujy' ubidukiza byose.
Duh' umwete nk'lntumwa zawe, Duhore dukora nka zo; Duhwane na zo mu
kwizera No kugupfir' ubishatse.
Mwa bagore mwe b'i Rwanda. Muze, mwitabe Yesu I Dor' imirimo ni myinshi:Tujye kumukorera. Dutabare bene wacu :Ubu bararimbuka.Mwa bagore mwe b'i Rwanda. Yes' arabashoboza.
Mwa bagore mwe b’I Rwanda,None nimutebuke! Imibabaro n'indwara Biragwiriye mw isi. Nimulongur' imitima, Umukiz' ageremo. Mwa bagore mwe b'i Rwanda, Mureke gupfapfana !
Mwa bagore mwe b'i Rwanda, Mw isi har' umwijima. Nimujyan’
amatabaza,Mwakire bene wanyu. Abagore n'abakobwa Baheze mu mwijima. Mwa bagore mwe b'i Rwanda, Mubamurikir' ubu !
Mana Data wo mw ijuru , Washyingiriye Adamu Na Haw' i Paradiso, Umaze kubateranya, Ubaha n'umugish'
uti: Mub' amahoro masa. Muzabyare,—Muzaheke, Muzagwire,—Mwuzuz' isi,
Muyitegeke n'ibyayo.
Mujye mwitegeka neza, Mufashanye, mukundane,Murengerane mwembi. Mw
ihlrwe no mu makuba Mu bworo no mu bukire,Muzahimbaz' Imana. Mana Data,— Ubarinde, Ngo bagume—Kuri Wowe, Mwami, jy'ubiyegereza.
Wa mukwe n'umugeni mwe, Nimugir'umutim'umwe,Mubane mu mahoro. Nuk'
Umucunguzi wanyu Azabakomez' iteka,Arind' urugo rwanyu, Abageze—Mw ijur' i
We, Ngo mutahe—Na bwa bukwe Bw'Umwana w'intama, Yesu.
Aba bombi, Mana Data , Bashyingiranyw’ amahoro, Ujy'ubarinda neza. Mugwaneza w'ubutunzi, Ubatere kwizigira,Kubw' imbabazi zawe. Bakwizere,—Bagusenge, Wowe, Data,—Kuk' ukunda No kubikiriz' iteka.
Bahimbaz' izina ryawe; Rinda guterana kwabo Kubw' urukundo rwawe. Kand'
amahoro yaw' abe i wabo none n'iteka hamwe n'ubuntu bwawe. Amen ! Amen !—Ubemeze. Ubafashe,—Ubarinde Mu kubaho kwabo kwose.
Mana Data wa twese ,Muremyi wa byose, Kera wateranije Adamu na Eva, Non' aba bana bawe Ubah' umugisha Uva mu buntu bwawe, Baterane neza.
Yesu, Mukiza wacu,Wejeje bwa bukwe Bw'i Kana kera, n'ubu Ubah' umugisha.
Butah' ubwawe, weze Inzu y'aba bantu, Amahor' adashira Ajy' abamw iteka.
Mwuka w'Imana mwiza, Non' ubahumure, Bareb' u bwiza bwawe N'urukundo
rwawe Ubarind' amahane Yic' imibanire, Ahubw' ubakoreshe Iby' ushima gusa.
Ab' ari Wowe, Data, Ububakir' inzu, Kugira ngw ibyishimoByabo bidashira. Wez'
urukundo rwabo,Ruhorehw iteka, Babane muri Wowe. Bahuj' umutima.
Mana Dat' ukiranuka, Ababatizwa none, Ubah' umugisha wawe, Kand' ubarind' iteka; Bahame mu bawe rwose,Bagushimishe, Mwami, Kandi babe mw Itorero, Bitez' ubwami bwawe.
Mwam' isezerano ryabo,Ngo baryibuk' iteka, Ubakomeze mu byawe Kuko
wabapflriye; Babeho mu byawe byiza,Bagukunde mu kuri, Kuko waje kubakiza, Be mere gucungurwa.
Mwam' ubah' Umwuka wawe,Bakuyoboke rwose, Ntibazatanire mw isi.Bakundane na bose ; Babone no kwamamaza Ibyiza byawe byose. Niho twese tuzahabwa Ikamba ry'ubugingo.
Ababatijwe none,Ubarinde, Mwami, Ub' umubyeyi wabo,Kukw ar' abangizi. Bajya mw ijuru bate ?Ntabwo bakwijyana, Keretse bakwizeye, Wowe, Mucunguzi.
Bashakish' urukundo,Ujy' ubaramira. Bakwiringire, Mwami,Bahunge Satani;
Muvunyi Yesu, ngwino,Ubakiz' ibibi. Twese tuguhimbazc, Ng' udukiz' iteka.
Mwam' ubwawe wenyine, Ubabatirishe Umwuka wawe wera,Bajye bakwizera;
Twese tuzafatanye,Tuzab' umwe rwose, Duhore dukundana Nkuko wadukunze.
Utuzanye hano gusangira Igaburo ryera , Mwami Yesu; Nuk' uyu munsi mwiza, Ngwin' utwibutse yuko Watubabarijwe, udupfira.
Ur'umutsima wera umanyurwa N'iyi vin' isukwa bitwibutsako mu mukumbi wawe
Ababigira nkana Uzabibahora : bazacibwa.
Nukw iri Gaburo ritwibutsa Yuko wapfiriye kudukiza !Dukiranuke twese,
Tuguhimbaze rwose : Turakwihereje : utwimemo.
Ni byiza kureb' ab'Imana Baterana bakundanye; Mwuka Wera naw' ubakunda.Ubazenguruts' umucyo. Gusenga n'indirimbo byabo   Bitumbagira mw ijuru.
Iyo bagez' imbere yawe, Baje gusangira nawe, Urukundo ruva mw ijuru
Rurabanezeza cyane; Imitima yabo yizeye Ijy' igusingiz' iteka.
Ubwo bugingo bubeshaho Abacunguwe ba hose, Imitima yab' inezezwa N'ukw
ihor'ibon' ibyiza. Itorero ryawe ritunze Ubuntu bwawe busaga.
Mana y'urukund' utwigishe Gukundana neza rwose, Ngo duhabw' Ibyokurya
Byera,Tweger' Uruhimbi rwawe. Irari ry'imitima yacu rib'iryo guhazwa cyane
Yes’ ur' Umukiza wanjye: Kuv' ubu, jye mb' uwawe. Nuhagiwe n'amaraso Yawe, Mwana w'imama.
Tugusingize, Muklza, Yesu, Mwana w'intama. Nuhagiwe n'amaraso : Ngushime, Murokozi
Kera nararushye cyane Ngo nihesh' amahoro. Nonubu, namaramaje Kwirangiriza Yesu.
Nzajya mbwir' abantu bose Agakiza ka Yesu, Gashyitse, kalar' igice N'ubugingo bw'ubuntu
Nzajya namamaza Yesu, Nshiz' amanga, nta soni : Uko yambohoy' ingoyi No
kunkiz' akankiza.
Mpimbaz' Uwanshunguy' atyo,Ankirish' imbabazi ! Ajy' andind' amp' amahoro :
Nukw asingizw' iteka !
Nezerwa cyane, wa si we;
Araje Shobuja !
Mwa bayibamo mwese mwe,
Musangwe mwinonosoye,
Ni mu mukingurire,
Mu mwakir' abiharire;
Kand' ibyaremwe byose bimuhimbaze !
Nezerwa cyane, wa si we,
Ko yimy' ingoma ye !
Mwa bantu mwe, twishimane,
Tunezerwe bihebuje.
Namwe, bamarayika,
Turirimban' ishimwe rye.
Namwe misozi mwese, nimurangire !
Non' ibitovu n'amahwa
Nimubirimbure !
Twanizwe n'ibicumuro
N'intimba byatumezemo.
Yes' araturengera
Ngw abirandure muri twe,
Wa muvum'awusimbuz' umugisha we.
Yazanywe no kuganz' isi,
Ngo twes' atwereke
Ishimwe n'icyubahiro
Bituruka mu kwera kwe
No mu rukund' afite,
Urw' akund' abacumuye.
Tumuhimbaze : n' Umukiz' utangaje
Wowe, Man' ikiranuka, Turashim' izina ryawe Kuk' uduhay' udukiza. Ujy'utuyobor' i Wawe.
Waduhay' Umwami Yesu, Aza kutwigisha neza Ibir' i Wawe mw ijuru. Ngo
tukuyoboke neza.
Wow' udusabir' iteka, Ube mu mitima yacu; Natwe tujye tugukunda, Kuk' ur'
Umuvunyi wacu.
Uhimbazwe, Mwami Yesu : Twibuka k' uzagaruka Kudushaka, twe n'abacu, Ng'
uduh' ubugingo bushya.
Hoziyana ! Twese dushim' Uwaje
Mw izina ry'Umwami.
Hoziyana mw ijuru !
Ubwo yaje mw izina ry'Umwami, (x2)
Hoziyana ! Hoziyana ! Hoziyana mw ijuru !( x2)

title: Turirimbe na none Ubuntu bw' Umwami;

lines: Turirimbe na none Ubuntu bw' Umwami; Umunezero rawmshi Ubemu mitima.
Agakiza kacu Kavuye mw yuru : Dufit' Umukiza. (x 2)
Imana ntirakara :N' amahirwe yacu. Ibabarir' umubi Wayisuzuguye. Umukiza
wacu Yikorey' ibyaha Byatwicaga rwose. (x 2)
Ni dushakan' umwete Ijambo ry'Imana, Tuzagirirwa neza N'Umukiza Yesu. Ni
We ntwari yacu : Araturwanira, Agahor' atsinda. (x 2)
Abacunguwe bose Aberek' inzira; Ashyir' umucyo mwiza Mu mitima yabo.
Umwuka we wera Uhor' utwigisha Iby'ukuri byose. (x 2)
Kand' azava mw ijuru, Mu bwiza bw'Imana; Azaba yanesheje; Azaturokora.
Abizeye bose Bazishim' iteka, Bamubony' ukw ari. (x 2)
Nimuze, dusange Yesu : Ni W' udukesh' imitima. Turirimbe, tunezerwe, Kuko tur' intore ze
Data yatumy' Umwana we Ngw ‘atuzanir' ubugingo. Ni W' ubw'
uzatuzamura.Atujyane ku Mana.
Abemey' ayo magambo Bayashima mu mitima, Bameny' Imana Rurema Kandi
bavuz' impundu.
Yesu, kubw' ubuntu bwawe, Uzatwijyanir' i Wawe, Ahw a bat owe n'lmana Bicara
bakishima.
Wa mutima wanjye we, shim' Uwiteka
Mwa bindimo byose mwe, mushime
Njye mpimbaz' izina rye, ne kwibagirwa
Iby'Imana yankoreye byose.
Imbabarir' ibyaha nakoze byose.
Ni Y'inkiz' indwara zamugaje.
Inyambik' imbabazi zayo nk'ikamba,
Ikampaz' ibyiza bidashira.
Ijy' ikor' ibyo gukiranuka gusa.
N'abarenganyw' ikabarengera.
Ic' imanza ziboneye zitabera,
Kand' igir' imbabazi n'ibambe.
Imenyesh' abayubah' inzirazayo
Uwitek' atinda kurakara;
Umujiny' ntiyawuguman' iteka.
Akunda kugirira nez' abe.
Uwiteka ntiyatwituy' ibihwanye
N'ibicumuro twamucumuye,
Kandi nkukw ijuru rye ryitaruy' isi.
Ni kw imbabaz' agira zingana.
Ibuvazuba n'iburengerazuba.
Dor'uko hitaruye kure pe.
Ni ko yajyanye n'ibicumuro byacu
Kure yacu. Tununuhimbaza!
Nkuko se w'aban' abagirir' ibambe,
Ni kw Imana yac' irigirira
Abantu bayubaha,kukw izi neza
Ubukene bwacu n'intege nke.
iz' ubugingo bwacu kobutarama;
Buhwanye n'ubwatsi bushiraho.
Ntibutinda; si nka za mbabazi zayo,
Zo ntizizashir' iteka ryose.
Uwitonder' isezerano ry'Imana,
Ni ryo ryakomejwe n'amaraso
Ayo Yes' Umwana w'Intama yavuye,
Kand' akumvir' ibyo yategetse,
Ni w'ugirirwa neza n'Iman'iteka,
Non' akiri mw isi no mw ijuru,
Iman' izamwerek' imbabazi zayo
N'umurava no gukiranuka.
Umuhanuzi Yesaya Yeretsw' ibyiza kera.
Yerekw' Imana mw ijuru Iri mu rusengero :
Abakerubi n'Abaserafi Bayishyize hagati,
Bajya bayishim' iteka, Bayisingiza bati:
Mwan' Uwer' Uwer' Uwera:Ibyo mw isi n'ijuru
Byuzuyemw ishimwe ryawe, Bose baguhimbaze.
Baracyaririmba batyo,Kand' abantu bo mw isi
Na bo barashim'Imana, Umukiza n'Umwami.
Natwe tuyihimbazanye N' abamaraika bose,
Tuti : Mwami nyir'ingabo, Ni Wow'usumba byose;
Ur' Uwer' Uwer' Uwera :Ibyo mw isi n'ijuru
