Byuzuyemw ishimwe ryawe. Bose baguhimbaze !
Mwuka wera w’Imana, manukir ubu ! Mena ! Mbumba  Nyuzura ! Nkoresha ! Mwuka Wera w'Imana, Manukir' ubu !
Imbabazi z'Umwami wacu Yesu N'urukundo rw'Imana No kubana n'Umwuka Wera Bibe muri twe,twebwe twese : Amen.
Mwami, vuga, nanjye ndumva Ndindiriy' icy' umbwira; Kijya kinezeza cyane, Kimpan' ibicumuro.
Mwami, ngutez' amatwi : Icy' unshakaho n' iki ?
Non' amaganya yawe yose, Ngwin' uyashylr' Umucunguzi ; Ari ku Ntebe y'Imbabazi, Ngwin' ayakuruhure!
Umutima wanjye wizera Kugusaba, Mana Data; Unyumvane za mpuhwe zawe.Jye umwana wakugomeye.
Ni Wowe wenyine nizeye Kw ari Wow' ump' umugisha.
Ndagusanze nguhungiyehoKukw ari Wowe nizeye. Umpe n'Umwuka wawe
wera.
Ump' intege. ninanirwa. Ni mbon' ibyago, nkwizigire K' unyakiran' imbabazi.
Ku manywa mba mu mucyo wawe; N'ijoro nkakwegamira; No mu gitondo, nki
gusenga,
Ujy'untegurir' inzira: No mu maryama, Data mwiza, Undinganiriz' iby'ejo.
Fat' ukuboko kwanjye,—Ungendeshe; Tujyan' ungez' aheza—Ku Witeka. Sinagir' aho ngera,—Ntagufite.Mwam' ah'ushaka ko njya,— Uhanjyane
Ibyago ni bintera.—Mpumuriza; Unturiz' umutima,—Ni mbabara. Naje
nguhungiyeho,—Ngo nduhuke :Sintinya turi kumwe,— Mwami wanjye.
Ubu naho nahishwa—K' untabara, Nizeye k' unzanjyana.—Ukankiza. End'
ukuboko kwanjye,—Unyobore,Tujyan' ungez' aheza—Ku Witeka.
Njye nsindagizwa n'ukuboko kwawe, Jy' umwana waw' ufit' intege nke. Ni Wowe, Mwami, nisunze wenyine, Ni mbana niwe, nta kizanyobya.
Njye ntegekeshw' uko kuboko kwawe,Nezerewe, ndi no mu makuba. Ngukundish' umutima wanjye wose Kugira ngo mb' uwawe. Mukiza.
Njye nkomezwa n'uko kuboko kwawe Mu mutima wanjy' us1hidikanya: Reb'
agahinda n'ishavu njya ngira Umpumurize, Mwami, ntunsige.
Munyabyaha, nturushye se ?
Sanga Krisito ! Umv' iri jambo ryiz' avug' ati : Ruhuka!
Yes' afit' ibimenyetso Bimutwereka ? N'umutwe n'ibiganza bifite Inkovu.
Kw ar' umwami se, nta kamba Yesu yambaye ? Ye. namubonye yambay' ikamba Ry'amahwa !
Ni mpakwa kur'uwo Mwami, Nzagabirw' iki ? N' ugufatanya na W' imiruho
N'intimba !
Nimusaba kunyakira,Ntaribumpeze ? Haba na gato, ntiyabikora ! Witinya !
vi.Nimwiyeguriraho se,Yamp' umugisha? Umv' a bo mw ijuru babihamya. Bati : ye
Muze mwese, muz' aho ndi, Abananiwe! Yesu ni kw 'ahamagara . Abo mw isi.
Si wow' umushak' ahubwo Ni W' ugushaka ! Wi kwirirwa witunganya i Uz' uk' uri.
Dor' ahagaze ku rugi Arakomanga. Ahamaz' iminsi myinshi : Mwinjiz' ubu !
Ngwin' ureb' iby' Umukiza Agukorera ; Aribugukiz' indwara Z'umutima.
Ntutsinzwe se n'urubanza Rw'ibyaha byawe? Rek' akubabarir' ibyo Byaha byose!
Yesu kw ar' umunyebambe.Umwangiy' iki ? Ko byatuma yigirayo, Ababaye ?
Amaganya yawe yoseN'imibabaro,  None byos' abiguture, Uruhuke !
Umv' iryo jwi rikwinginga: N' irya So wo mw ijuru ! Yiriw' aguhamagara : Umwitabe nonaha !
Nonaha ... nonaha ...  Sanga Yesu nonaha
Ko wamaz' imyaka myinshi Uzerer' uzimiye, Mbese, ntiwaz' uyu munsi  Ni byo
bigukwiriye !
Wabuz' amahoro mw isi; Wuzuy' umubabaro : Banguka, wisunge Yesu; Ni We
buruhukiro !
Bwira Yes' ibyaha byawe, Na W' akubabarire. Herek' ugendane na We, Mu nzir'
ijya mw ijuru !
Ngwino, witabe Yesu; Akuri bugufi. Watur' ibyaha byawe, Usang' Umukiza.
Haguruka Haguruka  Arakurindira. Watur ibyaha byawe; wakire n'umugisha!
Awuguher' ubuntu; Nuk' umusingize
Ngwino, witabe Yesu,Uve mu mwijima  Reka gushidikanya : Imins' irahita.
Ngwino, witabe Yesu, Gend' umuganaho ! Dor' atez' amaboko, Ngw 'akubabarire!
Ngwino, witabe Yesu :Mbes' uratiny' iki ? Yapfiriy' abagome : Ngwin'
umwiringire !
Yesu nguriy' ahw ahagaze; Dor' ukw aboshywe n'abanzi be  Umva Pilat' arabaz' ati :Yesu mugirire nte ?
Uramugenza s'ute ?hitamo nonaha ' Naw' utazibaz' ubundi, Uti  Arangenz' ate?
Ibyo na non' ubihitemo ! Wabyemera, wamuhinyura, Cyangwa wamwimika
wishimye.Uramugirir' ute ?
Ubwo Pilato yashakaga Kwirengagiza guhitamo, Byaramunaniye : naw' ibyo
Ntibyagushobokera.
Petero yaramwihakanye; Ni ko guhitamo nabi pe ! Wowe s' ahubwo ntiwakunda
Gupfa bamuguhora ?
Yes' umusubize nez' uti :Nd' uwawe, Mwami, ndakwihaye; Umpe kujy' aho
wanyobora, Nishimiy' iby' ukunda !

title: Mbese, mu mutima wawe, Ntufitiye Yes' ahw aba ?

lines: Mbese, mu mutima wawe, Ntufitiye Yes' ahw aba ?
Dor' ahagaze ku rugi :Munyabyaha, mwinjize
Uh' Umwami Yes' ahw aba : Umvir' Ijwi rye ryinginga ' Kingur' umutima wawe,
Yinjiremo, yimemo
Dor' imirimo n'iby'isi Bikwihariy' umutima : Ntagufitemw ahw atura,Nubwo
yagupfiriye.
Mbes' uracyabuz' uburyo Bwo kwita kur' iryo jwi rye ? we gutind' uyu n'umunsi
Wawe wakirizwaho.
Uhe Yes' ahw aba none, Kukw imins' ihita vuba, Udatungurwa n'urupfu, Rya jwi
rigaceceka !
Reba Yesu ku Musaraba; Reb' uko twatumy' agirirwa : Huguka nonah' umwitabe, Umutumbire !
Umuhang' amas' ubu: Ni h' uzab' usugiye. Nuk' uyahang' Umusaraba
Bamubambyeho.
Ibyaha byarakuboshye pe : We kwanga yukw agukiz' ubu ! Emer' aguh' ubugingo bwe : Umutumbire
Uyamuhange; yarazutse ! Banguk' uburyo bukiriho. Agutangariz' umucyo we:
Umutumbire !
Ni w' uduhuza n'lmana, Se. Azi gukiz' akiraniwe. Akiuy' imber' akuyobore.
Umutumbire !
Yemw’ abaguzwe n'amaraso Ya Yes' Umucunguzi, Nimuze, mumupfukamire :
Musang' Umwami Usumha byose.
Dor' isoko y'amaraso ye Yashyizweho kubwanyu : Mum witabe ngw aboze namwe :
Dor' aya mazi y'ubugingo :Nimuze, muyanyweho, Mumwitab' abamar' inyota :
Kand' intege nke z'umubiri N'imanga y'umutima Bimarwa n'Umusaraba we :
Mwa ndushyi mwe ziremerewe,Nimwemere, mwihane Ni mworoshy' imitima yanyu!
Yemw' abahung' Umukiza,Ni nd' ubirukana se  Ariko ni We Mushumba Udushak' intama ze.
Nkuk' umwunger' ajy' ashakalyazimiye yose, Uko ni ko Yesu yaje Ngw adupfir'
intama ze.
Mudatiny' ibyaha byanyu :Amaraso ya Yesu, Ayamenekeye twese; Ni y' abyeyura byose !
Naho byaba byinshi bite, Bikabaremera, Umukiza wacu Yesu Ntazabyibuk'
ukundi.
Yemw' abifuz' ubugingo Butazashir' iteka, Ntimugir' undi musanga :
Yes'arabiteguye !
Mwi gukund' ibyaha byanyu Kubirutisha Yesu, Kuko byatumy' adupfira, Ngo
tubane mw ijuru.
Muzahabw' ibyiza byose Yadusezeranije, No kudapf iteka ryose : Muze, mwe
gucikanwa
Ni Satani waduhumye :Twabay' ibiretwa bye. Noneho, turamucitse; Twitaby'
Umucunguzi.
Yes' Umwami yatubwiye.At' Abaremerewe N'abarushye, muz' aho ndi,
Mbaruhure byukuri !

Mwami Yesu, sinz' umunsiUzanjyana mw ijuru. Icyo nzi n' ukuba maso, Ng'
unsange niteguye

Ubwo tuza,ger' i Wawe,Tuzanezerwa cyane, Twicaranye niwe, Yesu, Hamwe
n'abakijijwe.

Mwami Yesu, singitinze ; Ubu, dore, nditabye. Nnejejwe n'ubwami bwawe;
Tuzabane mw ijuru !
Muze kureb' i Gologota Yes' ukw ashinyagurirwa, Mure be Yes' ukundwa na Se Amenets' umutima we.
Ni tw' apfira ku Musaraba  Tumwlzere Iwihannye. Bantu b'Umwami. mushlme
Yes' Umucunguzi wanyu
Bamwambits' ikamba ry'amahwa: N' ibibi byacu yazize. Ubuntu n'urukundo
byawe, Mbe, twabirondora dute ?
Ni mwumv' ijwi ry' uko yinginga :Ngo, Dat' ubababarire ! Natwe twes' adusabir'
atyo, Tw' abanyabyaha yazize.
Nimwumve mwes' uko gutaka, Uko yatatse cyan' ati : Mbe, Mana yanjye, Mana
yaruye, N'iki kikundekesheje ?
Nimwongere mwumv' iryo jwi rye,Ngo, Byose birarangiye ! Umwuka we wenda
guhera. Ati : Dat' uz' unyakire !
Dor' uko tugupfukamiye.Turakuramya, Mukiza. Kand' ibyaremwe byose na byo
Bizagusingiza, Yesu.
Dufatany' ubugingo bumwe,Dushim' Uwadupfiriye. No mu bugingo no mu rupfu,
Yesu Mwam' umbwire byose!
Amaraso yose y’intama n'ihene Y 'ibitambo by'Abayuda Nta cy' atumarira.
Ariko wa Mwana W'Intama w'Imana Ni We wenyin' ushobora Kudukiz' ibyaha.
Yabay'igitambo Kiruta bya bindi; Nta yandi maras' ariho Yo kutwoz' ibyaha.
Ndambits' ikiganza Ku mutwe wa Yesu, Mushyizehw’ ibyaha byanjye, Mbyatuye
nihannye.
Umutwaro wanjye Yarawikoreye,Ari ku Git' amanitswe, Ari jyew' azize.
Twizeye, dushima Wa Mwana w'lntama, Kuk' umuvumo twarimo Wavuyeho rwose.
Man' ishobora byose, Umv' uko nkwinginga : Umpishurire Yesu, Meny' ibyo yankoreye.
Yarahemuwe Ku Musaraba: Mpumur' amaso, ndebe Kw ari jye yazize,
Mbony' inkon' akubiswe N'amahwa yambaye; Mbonye na za mbereri N'umutim'
ucumiswe.
Yemeye kwiranguzaIgikombe kibi : Yakinyoye kubwanjye, Maz' amp' ubugingo
bwe.
Reb' uyu Mucunguzi Urupfu yapfuye  Nta n'ikibi yakoze: Nuko sinzarimbuka !
Ni jyewe yabambiwe,Uwamugomeye. Yesu, ndagushimiye : Non' uture muri jye.
Yesu, we kunkundira Ko ngusigirira. Ku Musaraba wawe, Ni ho nkuy' ubugingo.
Mana, ndagushimira K'utimanye Yesu, Ngw amfire nkiraniwe. Yewe, warankunze
pe !
Nejejwe n'uko nacunguwe
N'amaraso ya Yesu;
Yarankijije : Ndamushima cyane.
Haleluya (x 3) ku Mukiza haleluya (x 3) Amen
Kand' iyo ntewe na Satani,Maze ngacik' intege, Ninging' Umwami, Na W'
akandengera.
Umutima wanjy' unejejwe N'uko mbonye Umukiza.Nanyuzwe na We, Mu mutima wanjye.
U rukundo rw' Imana yanjye Runteye kuyikunda :Njya ndwumv' iteka Mu mutima
wanjye.
Munezerwe, mushim' Imana, Yemw' abaz' Umukiza; Mushim' Imana, Mwe,
rubanda mwese .
Batoboy' ibiganza bye, Byabumby' imisozi, byaremye byose, Byarambikwaga ku bana bato,Byakizag'indembe n'impumyi nyinshi.
Batoboy' ibirenge bye, Byatambagiye ku nyenyeri zose, Byagendagenze no mw isi yacu.Bisur' abakene n'abanyabyaha.
Bacumis' umutima we, Wakundag' indushyi n'aboroheje; Uvamw amaraso yoz'
ibyaha, Atemba nk'uruzi kubwac' ababi.
Uwo mutima wa Yesu N'ingingo ze nziza byaziz' iki se ? Ni jye byazize n'ibyaha
byanjye,I Gologota, ku Musaraba we.
Uko ndi, Yes’ unyakire, Ingingo zanjye n'umutima wanjye, Ko wanshunguye,
nakwiyima nte ?Njye nkor' iby’ukunda, mb' imbata yawe!

title: Ubwo nari nshinjirijwe cyane Na Satani

lines: Ubwo nari nshinjirijwe cyane Na Satani n'ibyaha byanjye, Haj' Umwami Yes' arakomanga, Ati : Kanguk'unkingurire !
Ati: Kingura !Kingura ! Nkingurira, nkwinjiremo ! Umutima waw' uranezerwa,
Wemeye yuko nkwinjiramo.
Yarandaritse mu birori bye, Ngo dusangir' ibyiz' afite; Maze, ndanyurwa,
ndamuhimbaza :Sinavug' ibyo yankoreye !
Ku rugamba rwanjye na Satani, Yesu ni We ngab' inkingira. Kuba muri We
byarantinyuye,Ajy'ansubizamw imbaraga.
Ni we Mwungeri mwiz' undagira, Nta cyo nkena, ndi kumwe na We. Nd' ino mw is'itek' aranyobora:Nyuma, nzasugira mu nzu ye.

title: Twemere Yesu Ko yaje mw isi

lines: Twemere Yesu—Ko yaje mw isi
Kutubwir' amahoro ye. Ni We nshuti nziza.—I Gologota,Yahaw' abazimiye.Mpora
nizera,—N'ubu nizeye Yuko Yesu yampfiriye; Ku Musaraba,—Yaranesheje;
Ambohora mwizeye.
Inzira yanjye—Ni Yesu wanjye;Anjyan' aho yangeneye. N' umugiraneza;—Nta
muntu n'umwe Yanga guh' agakiza Mpora nizera,—N'ubu nizeye Yuko Yesu
yamfiriye; Ku Musaraba,—Yaranesheje; Ambohora mmwizeye.
Mwami w'ubuntu,—Uhimbarizwe Kuk' uturarik' iteka. Tukwitabe twese,—
Twumv' ijwi ryaweRihamagara hose.Twizere twese,—Twe guhinyura Ko Yesu
yadupfiriye; Ku Musaraba,—Yaranesheje; Abohor' abizeye

title: lyo ntinye ko kwizera Kwanjy' ari guke

lines: lyo ntinye ko kwizera Kwanjy' ari guke, Kand’ iyo ngiye kuneshwa, Yesu ni W' umfata.
Yes' aramfata, Akankomeza, Kukw ankunda bihebuje : Arankomeza.
Urukundo rwanjye ruke Ntirwamufata. Sinamugundir' ubwanjye : Yesu ni W'
umfata.
Ntiyandeka, kukw ankunda.Nubwo ndi mubi; Anyishimir' ubwo nd' uwe ; itek'
aramfata.
Ntiyakundir' ubugingo Bwanjye kubura; Yabucunguj' igiciro : Itek' aramfata
Rukundo rwinshi,—Buntu butarutwa, Umwami Yesu—Kw agiriwe nabi, Akubitirwa—Ibibi nakoze ngw’anshungure rwose:—Abishimirwe
Ubuntu bwawe—Bumfasha, Mwami.  Busumba cyane—Impano zose. Njya
ntekereza,—Nkir' aha mw isi, Ubwo buntu bwinshi—Bwanshunguye
Kand’ iyo ngoswe—N'umwijima mwinshi Inshuti yanjye—Imfat’ ukuboko;
Singitiny' ubwo,—Ari y' imfashije : Ntumbira mw ijuru,—Yes' antinyuye.
Umusaraba—Wawe ni w' unkiza; Ni W' unduhura—Rwos' imibabaro. N'
ubuhungiro—Bwanjye buhoraho; Umbera n'icyiru—Ku Mucamanza.
Uwo njya nikomezaho, Nta wundi, ni Krisito.
Reka mubashimire, nti :Yesu ni W' umpagije.
Yanyitangiyehw icyiru,Angur' amaraso ye;
Nukw anyuzuza n'lmana : Yesu ni W' umpagije.
Nubw' ab' is’ ar' abatunzi,Yesu ni W’ umpagije.
Bafit’ iby'igihe gito : Arampaza wenyine.
Nta mugish' uri mu by'isi :N’ umuram' utumuka.
Ibya Yesu ntibishira :Arampaza wenyine.
Naho naba mu bukene,Yesu ni W' umpagije.
Naho napfush' ibyo nkunda,Arampaza wenyine.
Nahw imirima yarumba, Singir' icyo nsoroma,
Naho napfush' amatungo, Arampaza wenyine.
Naho naterwa n'Umwanzi, Yesu ni W' umpagije.
Nzajya nesha kubwa Yesu :Arampaza wenyine.
Naho nahanwa n'inshuti, Ni ko bamumereye.
Ni We nshut' irut'izindi : Arampaza wenyine.
Ubwo nzagera mu rupfu. Yes' azab'ampagije.
Azanjyan' i We, nduhuke : Yes'azab'ampagije.
Nzaba nambutse rwa Ruzi,Nzamutse, njya mw ijuru.
Nzamwirebera mu maso : Yes' azab'ampagije.
iyi s’ izashira :Yesu n' uwanjye; Nubwo byese byabura, Yes' uwo n' uwanjye ! Ubu harijimye :ntiturareb' i We.
Tuzanezerwa cyane, Ni tubana na We.
Sinzajya nanirwa :Yesu n’ uwanjye; Nzatsind' amoshya yose, Yes' ubw' ar'
uwanjye. Byose ni bishira, Nta cyo bizantwara : Uzansang’ amahoro. Yes' ubw'u r’ uwanjye.
Hoshi, mwe nzozi mbi !Yesu n’ uwanjye; Naho bwatinda gucya ,Yes' uwo n'
uwanjye ! Umutima wanjye Yarawuhagije; Ubu ndi kumwe na We : Yes’ uwo n'
uwanjye !
Genda, wa rupfu we : Yesu n' uwanjye ! Nzahoranaho na We :Yes' uwo n' uwanjye! Kand' urukundo rwe N'iby' ajy'ankorera, Ni byo binyereka ko Yes' uw' ar’uwanjye.
Jye mpisemo Yesu; murutish' iyi si yose;
Andutir' amafaranga cyangw' izahabu.Jye nkund'Uwabambwe, murutisha n'amatungo. Andutira n'amasambu n'amazu meza.
Uwanyimika, nkab' Umwami w'ishyanga rinini rite, Nd’imbata y'icyaha
cyose,sinabikunda. Ahubwo niragije Yes' Umukunzl wanjye : Sinkyita ku blri mw
Isi: Yes' aranyuze !
Jye mpisemo Yes' Umucunguzi wanjy' unkunda; Andutira no gushimwa n'ab'isi
bose. Umv’ icyo nifuza :sinshaka kumenyekana; Njye nyobok’ Umwami Yesa iminsi yose.
Andyohera cyane : nta buki buryoha nka We; Ni mwiza; n' uw'igikundiro cyinshi
cyane;Ahumura neza kurush' ibirabyo byose : Nabur' iki se, mmufite, kw
andangirije?
Yes' Umwami ndamubonye, Kandi sinkimwimura; Yemeye kunyoz' i by aha Byambuzag' ubugingo.
Nta kirut' Umwami Yesu Mw’ isi cyangwa mw ijuru. Ni We watuguz' amaraso
Kera ku Musaraba.
Amaras' arantangaza : Yarampembuye mpfuye. Ampesh' amahoro menshi No
kubaho kw'iteka.
Ubwo wampinduy' umwana, Non' umpindur' ingeso, Kugira ng’ undeba wese
Aguhimbaze, Yesu.
Ndagushima ko wanshatse Kandi ko wantaruye, Ukanyogesh' amaraso Kubw’
imbabazi zawe.
Mwami Yes' ump' urukundo, Rwo wakunz' a bo mw isi. Umpe kugukunda rwose,
Nkunde n'abawe bose.
Warampfiriye, Mukiza : Noneho, mpfane nawe ! Kand' usohoze muri jye ibyo
kugushimisha.
Mwami, nubwo nd' umunyabyaha, Njya mpora nkwinginga : Mana, wumve gusaba kwanjye, Unze mu mutima.
Narambiwe gukund' ibyaha Bituma nshumura; Ahubw' Umwuka wawe Wera Ab'ari Wo ntunga.
Kera najyaga nshidikanya :Nta cyo byanyunguye; None nshaka ko tuvugana,
Nkureba, nkumvira.
Ndashaka kwaka cyane, Mwami,Murikirwa nAwe ; Umwuka waw' ufash' uwanjye,Nkund' uko wankunze.
N'ukuri, Mwam' ubwo niyobya,Washaka wampana, Kuk' umutima mubi nk'uyu
Utabana nawe.
Kand' amaraso yawe, Mwami,Nzi ko yamviriye. Twuzure rwose, ndabyifuza, Uk' ubinshakira.
Ni byo nsigaye njya nifuza;Mwami, ndakwinginze, Mbeshweho n'ubugingo bwawe,Kubwawe wenyine.
Ngutuy' ubugingo bwanjye, Yesu, Mwana w'lrnana; Ubwakire n'urukundo, Ngo bub' ubwaw' iteka.Nkuzaniy' ibyaha byanjye N'umutim' unangiwe : Mu maraso wamviriye, Unyoze, Mucunguzi.
Uz' uko mpora nirwanya Ngo nkomez' umutima; Uz' uko nari merewe N'ishavu
n'agahinda. Ububasha bwawe. Mwami,Bundokore mu byaha Kand' Umwuka
w'ubugingo Ujy' unkura mu bibi.
Nemeye kwitanga rwose,Nta cyo nishigarije; Mpisemo kujyana nawe No
kukumvira, yesu. Njye nkuyobokan' ishimwe Kukw ari wow' ubimpa; Ujy' unyobor'inzir' ijya Mu bwami bwawe bwiza.
Reb' uyu muhigo mpize Nibwo nzivuguruza. Wukomeresh' amaraso N'urukundo
wankunze. Itek' iyo nirebyeho,Ndiheba, nkazimira; Ariko kuk' ujy'unkunda,
Uzamfasha, Mukiza.
Yesu ndakwitabye,—Ntakwiriye : Imbabazi zawe—Zirantinyuye.Mfit' ibicumuro—Byuzuye muri jye;Niringiye gusa—Ko wampfiriye.
Ibyo nacumuye—Ndabyihannye. Kand' uko ndi kose—Simbiguhishe.Nuk'
unyuhagize—Amaraso yawe,Nyogemo, ntungane,—Ico rimvemo.
Mwami, mbabarira;—Ndakwizeye. Nkwikubis' imbere;—Ndakwiringiye. Amaraso
yawe—Y'Umwana w'intama Anyoz' antembeho,—Anyeze dede !
Nuko, ndanezerwa;—Mb’ amahoro; Njyana n'Uwo nkunda,—Ntaramubona;Itek'
uko ntewe—N'iby'isi n'ibyaha. Negamira Yesu,— Bikanesheka.
Bene Data bizeye Yesu, Umucunguzi wacu mwiza, Mwitange mutagabanije, Nubwo benshi babinaniwe.

Unesh' ibyah' azambikwa Umwambaro wera.
Yes' azavug' izina rye Ku Mana mwijuru.
Dukanguke, dutambuke,Turwan'intambara
Tunesh' abanzi, twizeyo Izina rya Yesu.
Tumeny' ubwami buri mw ijuru, Yesu yadutunganirije. Mur'ubwo bwami, nta buriganya; Abatuyeyo n' ab'ukuri.
Uwirarira n'uw'ibinyoma Ntazagerayo k' Uwiteka. Arik' uwihan' akamwizera,
Umwami Yesu ntamuheza.
Icyamuzanye n' ugutabara Abanyabyaha bamushaka. Ni tub'intore z'Umwami
Yesu, Tuzicar' i We mu mahoro.
Ni heh' abizera bazajya kuba ?
Mur'iyi si nta ho tuzakirira.
Nta hantu hatagerwa n'umubisha :
Ibibi nta hantu twabihungira.
Nta ho, nta ho, mw isi nta ho;
Mw ijuru ni hw i wabo w'abizera.
Tuzimuka mw isi, tuger' i wacu;
N' aheza twubakiwe n'Umukiza.
Ku Mana yacu,har' amazu menshi
Yubakany' isuku tutarabona.
Ni ho, ni ho, ni hw i wacu;
N'ubuturo bwiza tuzahoramo.
Yesu ni W' ugir' amahoro meza;
Urupfu n'ibyago ni W' ubitsinda.
Abashak'ubugingo budashira
Ni mumwizigire azabarengera.
Muze mwese, dushengere;
Mw ijuru, tuzimanan'Umukiza.
Mw isi tubonana n'inshuti, Tugatandukana vuba : Mw ijuru si ko biri.
Tuzabon' ibyishimo, Ibyishim' ibyishimo. Tuzabon' inshuti zacu, Tutakibasha
gutandukana.
Ni hw abakund' Umwami Yesu Bose bazateranira, Batagitandukana.
Kandi tubony' Umucunguzi, Tuzagir' umunezero Urut' iyindi yose.
Kandi tuzajya duhimbaza Yesu. tumuririmbira Mw ijur' iteka ryose.

title: Kwa Data mw ijuru, nta wubabara,Nta wubabara

lines: Kwa Data mw ijuru, nta wubabara,Nta wubabara, nta wubabara.
Kwa Data mw ijuru, nta wubabara :Baranezerwa !
Kwa Data mw ijuru, nta wiganyira,Nta wiganyira, nta wiganyira.
Kwa Data mw'ijuru, nta wiganyira : Ho n' amahoro!
... nta wucumura bera  dedede !
...nta nyot' ibayo Hariy' isoko !
...nta nzar' ibayo Barahagijwe !
...nta ndwar' ibayo Nibazimape!
...nta rukumbuzi Haba n'irungu!
...nta n'abagipfa Babahw iteka !
...ni hw i wanyu se ? Uzatahayo?
...nanjye ndajyayo !Bamp'ikiba nza.
...nzasanga Yesu Nuko, nzanyurwa !
Iyi si turimo—N' iy'ibyago N'iy'umubabaro—N'amakuba; Isi nshya tujyamo, Yo n' iy'igikundiro N'iy'umunezero—N'amahoro.
Kukw ari ho Yesu—Atunganya, Ari hw azajyana—Abantu be.Abo yikurive Mu bise by'urupfu rwe, Abo yikirije,—Bakab' abe.
Yemw' abakijijwe—N'amaraso. Mwaneshej' ibyaha—Kubwa Yesu,Muhore
mukunda Umuremyi w'ijuru, Muhore mwifuza—Kuzabayo.
Nimuze, twibuke—Ababayo : Nta byaha bagira; n' ab'Imana.Natw' abakijijwe
Dukund' Umucunguzi, Tunezerenye ko—Tuzab' i We.
Nimuze, tugire—Umutima Uzinukw' iyi si—y'umwijima, Kukw abari mw isi Bataz'
Umucunguzi, Batandukanijwe—N'Uwiteka.
Twebw' abasiganirwa aho dutegekwa, Twitegey' ururembo Tuza gutahamo.
Urwo rurembo rwera N'ibirimo byose Byubatwse n'izahabu Zirabagirana.
Reka mbaganirire Ibiri muri rwo, Mumeny' ibyiza byarwo, Murwifuze namwe
Urupfu ntirubayo,Nta no kunanirwa, Nta mbeho, nta n'izuba, Nta ndwara, nta
byago.
Udakijijwe wese Ntabw' azatahamo, Kukw azahezwa hanze Hamwe na Satani.
Mbe, mur'izo si zombi, N' iyihe uhisemo? Mbes' iyi s' izashonga Ni y' uzahamamo?
Musig' iby'ino mw isi Bitazahoraho, Mwiyegurire Yesu, Umwami w'ijuru.
Iri  joro, yemwe bakristo  mwese, Turabibuts' Umwana w'Imana, Uko yaje kuducungura twese,Ngw Iman' izadukure mu byaha.Abo mw isi bose banezerewe Iri joro, bibuk' Umukiza. Mupfukame,
mushim’Umucunguzi I Tunezerwe, tunezerwe twese ! (x2)
Kwizigira kwacu, bakristo mwese,Kudutere guhimbaz' Umwami; Inyenyeri y’
iracyaka kw ijuru Ahw abanyabwenge bayibonye. Uwo Mwami yashyizwe mu muvure: Mubimenye, rubanda mwese mwe ! Munezerwe kukw Iman' ibikiza. Munezerwe, mwambaz' uwo Mwami ! (x 2)
Umukiza yabakuye mu kaga No mu buretwa bw'umwanzi mubi. Mwes' abita ben'
Imana Rurema; Abigish' iby'urukundo rwayo.Tumwerurire yuko
tumukunda:Yadupfiriye ku Musaraba. Rubanda mwe, mwishime cyane none !
Tunezerwe, tunezerwe twese ! (x 2)
Ijwi ryumviswe n'abantu Ribatunguye, riti: Shimwa, Mana : kuzwa mw isi. Amahor' abe bose! Mbes' izo ndirimbo twumva Zitangaza n' iza he ?
Bungeri, n' abamalayika Bababwir'Ubutumwa.
Uw’ iyi si yatabaje Kuko yagwij' ibyago, Kuv' igihe yikoreye Umutwaro w'ibyaha,
Umukiza wahanuwe Wadusezeranijwe, Uwiringirwa byukuri Non' aratuvukiye.
Shimwa, Mana ! Kuzwa mw isi !  Amahor' abe hose !Urukundo n'amahoro
Biraduhishuriwe. Hamwe n'Intumwa z'Imana,Twese turangurure, Dushime no
gushimisha Impano y'Umukiza.
Nyenyeri yo mu museke, U bonets' uri kw ijuru,Ur' umucy' utuvira. Tumurikir' imitima, Utweyurir'mwijima Ukunda kuba mw isi.
Mwami, Mwana—w'Uwiteka, Muri Wowe,—har’ umucyo: Jy udushorera, Mukiza.
Ni Wowe, Yesu, wanshatse Mu mwijima wa Satani,Ubwo nari muri wo, Wowe,
Mucunguzi wanjye, Wankuye mu bwenge buke Kubw' urukundo rwawe.
Wiyambuy' icyubahiro, Wigira nk'umugaragu Utagir' agaciro. Uhorw' ibyaha
nakoze, Mpeshw' amahoro n'ubuntu N'urupfu rwawe, Yesu.
Mucunguzi, mbane nawe, Njye nkwizeran’umurava :Uz' intege nke zanjye; Njye
nkor’ iby' ushaka byose. Non' unshunshumurireho Umwuka wawe Wera.
Yesu Krist' agiye kuza:Tubyuke, ben' Imana. Igihe eye kiri hafl: Umwam' azaboneka. ( x 2)
Aje kwimana n'abera No gukiz' Itorero. Ni W' uzaryambik' ikamba Ry'ubwiza
budashira. (x 2)
Ntutinye, mukumbi muto :Ukundwa n'lmana, So; Umusaraba wa Yesu Ni wo
bendera yawe. (X 2)
Abo mw isi ni bakwanga, Biguhesh' umugisha; Urukundo no kwizera Bizaguha
kunesha. (x 2)
Dor' is' ukunt' ikwifuza:
Mukiz' iragukumbura !
Umv' uko bagutakira,
Ngo n'iki kigutindije ?
Uzaza ryari, Mucunguzi,
Wime bwa bwami budashira,
Ngw ibyaremwe byose byishime ?
Icyamp’ ukaz’ udatinze !
Umwami Yes' ubw' azaza, (X 3)
Tuzamureba, tunyurwe !
Azazana n'ingabo ze,
Impanda bazivugije,
Abapfiriye muri We,
Bazuke, bamusang' ubwo !
Natw' abazaba bakiriho
atujyane hamwe na bo,
Tubane na W’iteka ryose.
Icyamp' akaz' adatinze!
Satani n'abadayimoni
Bazahunga mu maso he,
Ab'isi b'abagurano,
Azaza ngwababature !
Kand' amahor' azatwar' isi;
Azac' intambara, zishire,
Ahindur’ ibi byose bishya.
Icyamp' akaz' adatinze !
Bagenzi, tube mas' ubu,
Duhore tumwiteguye.
N'ukuri, Databuj' uwo,
Nta wuz'igih' azazira.
Nyamar' azaza ku ngoma ye,
Aya makub' ayamareho.
Duhumure, dutegereze.
Icyamp’ akaz’ adatinze!
Jyan' umucyo mur'Afurika!
Gend' uyimaremw umwijima !
Bwir' abantu bose barimo
Yuko Yes' akiza,—
Ko yagukijije.
Ni We Mwami;—Ni We Mwami :
Ni We Mana—Ijy'ikiz'
abanyabyaha.
(twebw' abanyabyaha)
Mbese, mur'Afirika hose,
Ko harimw umwijima mwinshi ?
None kugira ng'ushiremo,
Yes' aragutumye—
Kuvug' Ubutumwa.
Wiceceka !—Wiceceka !
Jyan'umucyo—Umurikir' Afirika.
(abo mw Afurika)
Harihw ingororano nziza
Yesu yiteguye gutanga :
Azazih' umuntu witanze
Ngwavug’ Ubutumwa,—
Ngw ajyane n'umucyo.
Reba Rwanda !—Reba Rwanda !
Icyibaza:—
N' ik' i Rwanda ikubaza ?
(Mbe, n' ik' ikubaza?)
Reba Yes’ Umwana w'Imana
Yari mw ijuru hamwe na Se;
Maz' abonye tugiye gupfa,
Ava mu bwiza bwe,—
Aza mur'iyi si,
Ni ko gupfa;—
Ni ko gupfa Urw'isoni—
Rwo ku musaraba mubi.
(ari twebw' azize)
v.Mwami Yesu, nsabye k' umfasha, Ukankiz' ibyaha bindushya, Bigatuma ntabasha
rwose Kuvuga k' ukiza,—Ngo nkuber' intumwa  Itatumwe—Itatumwe
N'abakuru,—Itumwe n'Uwampfiriye.
Umurimo wacu—Ni mwiza cyane : Dushakire Yesu—Abazimiye.Iyo babonetse,—Abo mw ijuru Bajya baririmba,—Bat'Aratsinze.
Uyu murimo ni mwiza; N'Umwami Yesu ntahwema. Dushishikare dukore: Ni W
uduter' imbaraga.
Uwitek' ashimirw'—Umucunguzi Wadutoye twese—Ngo tube benshi. Tur'
ab'intege nke:—Tujye twizera, Twe kugir' ubute—Tumukorera.
Uyu murimo we—Tuwuhoremo : Twibuk' izo mbuto,—Tuzibagare !
Nyir'ibisarurwa—Yaradutumye : Tuzagororerwa—Tuzimuritse.
Mu makuba yose—N'ibibabaza, Naho batugaya,—Tuzakomere. Twibuk'
umurimo,—Tuwukomeze, Tub' ab'urukundo,—Ben' Uwiteka !
abakijijwe mwese,abo dufatanije.muze none twibaze ibyo twakora.
Abakunzi ba Yesu, Nkuko yadukijije, Ni ko bidukwiriye Kwamamaz' ibye.
Igihe kizagera, Iman' itwibarize Ab'iwacu mu rugo N'abaturanyi.
Nuko, tubageremo, Tubabwir' ibya Yesu, Kand' Umwuka w'Imana Adukoreshe.
Dor' abadakijijwe Baragwiriye base : Bazakizwa bate se, Bataburiwe ?
Reka tubasabire, Kandi tubabwirize, Bene wacu bakizwe.Yes' ashimishwe.
Yes' aradubamagara ,Ati : Nimubyuk' ubu :
Ibisarurwa bireze,Unsarurira ni nde ?
Uhamagawe na Yesu:Ni wow' ubwaw' ashaka !
Umwitabish' umutima. Uti : Mwami, nyakira !
Ntuzahere kure cyane Kwamamaz' ibya Yesu :
Abaguye bari  hafi,N'abazimiye na bo.
Umurim' uradutota;Dufit' umwete muke.
N’ ubur' integ' umusange, Uti : Mwami, mfash' ubu !
Nubw' utazi gushyomoka Kuk' utar' umuhanga,
Hamya gusa ko wamenye Ko Yes' ababarira.
Ujy'ubwir' abandi bose Ibyo yagukoreye;
Nuk' umwinging' agufashe, Uti: Mwami, nyigisha !
Hataboneka muri twe Uvuga kw ananiwe !
Udushoboza ni Yesu Gukund’ ibyiza byose.
Dukor’ iyo mirimo ye N'urukundo n'umwete,
Maz’ ishize, tuzavuge, Tuti :Mwam' utwakire !

Yesu, ni Wowe dushima: Watuguz' amaraso yawe Cya gihe wadupfiraga. Imibiri n'imitima N' iyawe kubw'ubuntu bwawe Buduhay' ubukiriro. None tur' abawe—Kuko wadutoye;Tugushime,—Udukere, Mucyo wacu, Twe kuguma mu mwijima.

Twebwe si twe twagushatse : Ni Wow' ubwawe wadukunze Kubw' ubuntu bwawe bwinshi.Twebwe nta ntege dufite : Nta wabasha kugukorera, Utamuhay' imbaraga,Yobor' imitima !—Tujyane kwa Data Mu bwami bwe :—Ab'ukuri babushaka Ntibanga gusuzugurwa.

Garagaz' ubuntu bwawe Ku bataz' ubwami bw'Imana, Bigumiye mu mwijima. Kera kose ntibumvise Ubutumwa butunezeza Bukesh' imitima yacu. None, wategetse—Umucyo w'ukuri Ng'uboneke.—Mwami Yesu, tuyobore, Utwerek' inzira yawe.
Ibisarurwa ni byinshi, Abasaruzi ni bakeya: Tum' abagusarurira ! Duhatwe
n'ubuntu bwawe Guhamagar' abantu benshi, Bahabw' ibyiza by'Imana. Uwemerwa wese—Mu bwami bw'Imana Arahirwa;—Anezezwa n'amahoro Azagir' iteka ryose.
Ai Data wo mw ijuru, Tur' abasaruzi,  Ubakure muri twe Babone kugenda, Bavuge Yesu cyane Ko yaducunguye,Kw ari We Mana yacu Irokor' ab'isi.
Yaguherey' ubuntu;Jy'utangir' ubundi! Ibyo dufite byose Bikomok' ahw iri.
Twemeze cyane rwose, Mucunguzi wacu,Gutumwa nawe hose Mu bo wapfiriye.
Mukiza wacu Yesu, Utwuzuz' Umwuka, Mwami tukwigireho, Nkuko wagendaga.
Twe kub' abanyabute,dushishikarire Gukor' ibyo tubwirwa N'Iman' ihoraho.
Reb' igihugu cyacu, Uko barimbuka ! Ntubabazwa n' i wanyu, Akaga barimo ?
Satan' Umwami wabo Arabazitiye, Ashaka ko babana Mur'urya murimo.
induru ziravuze,Ubatabar' ubu ! N' ucogozwa n'iby'isi,Babwirwa na nde se? Tang'umubiri wawe N'ingingo n'ubwenge,Ubone gutabara Abo yapfiriye.
Urwanane na Yesu :Kweta bihebuje ! We kwitwaz' umufuka N'ibitabo gusa !
Gend' ubyawe n'lmana Ukijijwe rwose, Wuzuy' Umwuka Wera No kwizera na ko.
Ijwi ry'Umwami Yesu Rirakubwira ngo : Jya mu mahanga yose,Uvug' ibya Yesu,
Babyarw' ubwa kabiri.Yes' abarokore, Babatizwe n'amazi N'Umwuka Wera
de.(Rwanda)
Isi yos' iririmbe—lbitangaza Umukiza wa twese—Yadukoreye.Amahang' ukw angana Yos' asingize Yesu !
I burasirazuba,—Bamuhimbaze ! AbaShinwa bashime—Umucunguzi,AbaHindi
bemere Yesu wabapfiriye.
Kandi n'Abisilamu—Bamusingize : N'amahanga barimo—Ayabature.Yes' Umwami, bemere Yuko yabacunguye.
Abatuye mu mbeho,—Aho bagira Ijoro rirerire—Ritinda gucya,Bemer' Umucyo
w'isi, Ngo bave mu mwijima.
N'abo mu Rwanda rwacu,—Bamusingize.Bang' ingeso za. kera,—Bamuyoboka, Bati: Ngwin' utwimemo, Ur' Umwami w'ijuru.
Amahanga yo mw isi—Yose ukw angana Yemer' Umucunguzi,—
Amuyoboke;Abakijijwe bose Bamusingiz' iteka.
Intumwa z'Umwami Yesu
Zababarijwe mw isi;
Zahaw' izina rye ryera, Bazibambish' amahwa.
Twe, twes' abakijijwe, Twitange, tubabwirize Ijambo ry'Umwami Yesu, Maze,
na bo bakizwe !
Twa kwita mu kaga k'isi, Twihute, tubabwire Ijambo ry'Umwami Yesu, Tugarur'
intama ze.
Abataz' Imana yacu,Twihute, tubabwire  Ijambo ry'Umwami Yesu, Barek'
ibyaha rwose.
Dor' intambara n'ibyago Bir' imbere yac' ubu. Abarwanir' ubutumwa, Twihute,
tubukwize.
Peter' ubw' amwihakanye,Yumv' inkoko zibitse; Nukw aricuz' ararira; Maz'
arababarirwa.
Twemere kuvug' ukuri Hagati y'abanzi be; Tubabibemo n'imbuto Yesu
yatubibyemo.
Uwizera yatorewe Kubageza ku Mana, Ngo bave mu byaha byabo: Tyo
nimubabwirize !
Mwizerwa, genda wishima : Uzagera mw ijuru ! Uzambikw' ikamba ryera : Nta
rupfu rugerayo !(Rwanda)
Urutare rw'Imana N' ingab' idukingira. Duce ku Musaraba, Tunesh' Umwanzi wacu.
Tugende mu misozi, Tubabwir' ibya Yesu : Maze, na bo bakizwe. Be kujya mu
muriro,
Isi yacu yuzuye Agahinda n'ibyaha; Satani yagwijije Abo yahumishye.
Bene wacu bo mu ngo Ntabwo bazi Krisito : Baribaz' ukw ameze No gukizw' icy'ari cyo.
Abahisemo Yesu, Nimuze, dutambuke, Twerekan' ubuntu bwe N'amaraso
twozemo.
Kand' abishushanije Ntibazajya mw ijuru, Kerets’ abakijijwe, Buhagijw' amaraso.
Abafit’ idini nsa, Bakayoberwa Yesu, Ni bo batubabaza : Ntibazajya mw ijuru !
Nshuti, warahemutse; Yes’ uramubabaje. Dore, wamuvuyeho, Wibagirw' ubuntu
bwe.
Nanjy’ Iman' inkomeze,Ne kujya mubabaza; Nukw amfash' anyobore, Nite ku
rukundo rwe.

title: Turashim' Imana yuko twavukiye Ku ngoma y'Umwami Yesu

lines: Turashim' Imana yuko twavukiye
Ku ngoma y'Umwami Yesu, Nyir’ imbabazi.
Iyo tuvuka ku ngoma ya Satani, None tuba twihebye,
Yesu, tugukunde cyane (X 3) Kuko watwitangiye !
None baba badutapfunir' itabi,
N'amajosi n'amaboko byuzuy' impigi :
Byos'Umwami Yesu yabidukuyeho, Nukw aduh' amahoro.
Dukunde Yes' udukunda turi bato !
Yaturemeshej’ Ijambo ryayo ryonyine;
Yaduhaye n'ababyeyi badukunda,Batureran' ineza.
Gumy' ushim' ushim' ushim' Ushim' Umukiza !
Ibikomeye biranesheka, Utaretse gushima.
Na Satani ntszagushobora,Utaretse gushima.
Amakuba ntiyakwihebesha,Utaretse gushima.
Uraryoherwa n'ibyo mw ijuru,Utaretse gushima.
Yes’ uramwireber' unezerwe, Utaretse gushima.
Yesu n' Umukiza Ndamwiringiye.x2
Nd' igiti cyatewe ku mugezi: Nd' amahoro pe !
Sinkinyeganyega,Kukw ankomeza.x2
No mu cyi, sinuma,Ntewemuri We.x2
Iyo ngiye kugwa, Arandamira.x2
Iyo mbony' ibyago,Arandengera.x2
Satan' iy' anteye,—Ntabw' anshobora.x2
Wa gatabaza kanjye we, Yesu ngo.
Murika !
Murika !Murika ! Murika !
Satan' ampuh' anzimye ? 'Shwi ! ,Yesu ngo, Murika !
Ntwikirwe mu gitebo ? 'Shwi Yesu ngo, Murika !
Murikir' a bo mu Rwanda !Yesu ngo, Murika !
N'az' azansange murika !Yesu, ngo Murika !
Har' Umwami wa kera;Yar’ umugwaneza.
Hari kuri Noweli, Areb' umutindi;
Yaratoraguraga Udukwi ku kwezi.
Imbeho yari nyinshi; Yendaga no kumwica.
Nukw abaz' umwambari W'umuhungu muto,
At’ Uriya mutindi,Uz' i wabo, mbese?
Und’ aramusubiza,Ati: Ye, ndahazi :
Aba mu kirorero Cyo hirya y'umusozi.
Ati : Ngwino, mwambari,Tumugemurire.
Nzanir' amafunguro N’ibyo kunywa n'inkwi.
Barahagurukana,Badatiny' imbeho,
Kandi bihanganira Umuyaga w'icyago.
Nyum' umwan' ariheba,Atakir' Umwami,
At' Imbeh’ iranyishe :Biramera bite ?
Nukw aramubwir' ati :Jy'ushing' aho mvuye :
Ubunyinya bw'imbeho Ntabwo buribukwice!
Umwan' abigenz' atyo,Ager' ikirenge
Mu cy'Umwami, shebuja, Maz' ashir' imbeho.
Umwami n'umwambari Baca mu rubura,
Bajy’ ah' umutind' ari,Baramugemurira.
Natw' inshuti za Yesu.Twa kwimeny' ubwacu.
Nkuko twababariwe,Tubabarirane.
Abajvana na Yesu Gutabar' abandi
Na bo bazagabana Umugisha w'Imana
Habay’ umuntu twizeho; Izina rye ni Yosefu—kera.
Yar'afit’ abavandimwe, Nyamara barahemutse—cyane.
Bamujugunye mu bushya, Basig’ umwend' amaraso—menshi.
Hanyuma, bamucuruza N'abantu b'lshimayeli—bamwe.
Babeshya se, bavuga ko Yariwe n'inyamaswa mbi—si byo.
Mw Egiputa, yarafunzwe; Iherez' arafungurwa—neza.
Abon’ ukw arotorera Umwami waho, Farawo—koko.
Bamufunguy' ahinduka Igisonga cya Farawo—cyiza.
Hatey' inzara, bene se Bamanuka kwihahira—i we.
Yanga kubirondorera,Ngo bemer' ibyo bakoze—bibi.
Iherezo, barihana,Nukw arabababarira— rwose.
Abakiran' imbabazi,No kwimuka, barimuka—bose.
Baraza, bav' i Kanani, Bazana na se, Yakobo—ubwe.
Uko ni ko Yosefu uwo Yakijije bene wabo—bose.
Bisa n'ubuntu bwa Yesu Yagiriy' ababisha be—ni twe !
Nguhaye, Data wera,Uyu mwaka wose,
Ngo mbone kub' uwa we Mu bibaho byose.
Sinasaba kw ibyago Mbikurwaho byose;
Icyo ngusabye n'uko Nzajya ngushimisha.
Mbe, ni nde wah' umwana Byos' ibyo yifuza ?
Nyamara se ntamwima Ibyiza by'ukuri.
Nawe, Man' iby' uduha Biradukwiriye :
Birut' ibyo twibwira N'ibyo twisabira.
Ahar' ubuntu bwawe Buzanyemerera
Kubon' ihirwe ryinshi Ntari nsanzwe mfite;
Byamera bityo, Mwami,Nzajya ngushimira,
Ngo nkuz' izina ryawe Mu bataryemeye.
Nib’ uzashaka yuko Mbon' imibabaro
N'ibyago n'amakuba,Ngo mfush' ibyo nkunda;
Nabw' uzamfashe, Mana,Ngo nibuke Yesu,
Uburyo yihanganye, Ubwo yampfiraga.
Nuko, mu byago byose.Nzajya ngusingiza,
Menye kw iby' umpa byose,Biva mu rukundo.
Nuk' uyu mwaka wose Ub' uwawe, Mana;
Mu byiza no mu byago, Mbiguhimbarishe
Yesu yageze mu Rwanda, N'i Burund' agerayo;
Yigerey' i Tanganyika N'i Bugande n'i Kongo.
Yadukuye mu bugoryi No mu mwijima mwinshi;
Tumuberey' umuryango : Tumusingize cyane !
Imana yishimye cyane Kubon' ibyo yaremye;
Byari biboneye byose, Nta n'inenge byarimo.
Maz' umunt' iramurema,Ab' umukurambere
W'inyamaswa n'amatungo; Byos' abyit' amazina.
Satan' ajy'arushy' abantu,Abah' ibishushanyo
No kubabuz' agaciro No kubarushya cyane.
Yabahugije Umuremyi,Ababwir' ibinyoma.
Abahemukir' iteka : Ni we mwanz' ukabije.
yemwe mwese abari mw isi. Abakuru n'abato,
Nimumenye yukw Imana Yer'ikang' ibyaha pe !
Ni cyo cyatumy' ic' Adamu,We na Hawa, mw Edeni,
Ikarimbura ya mirwa, Sodomu na Gomora.
Yemwe mwes' abari mw isi, Namw' abari mw ijuru,
Nimumeny' Imana yacu Yukw ar' inyambabazi!
Yatanze n'Umwana wayo,Aratubabarizwa;
Yagiriwe nabi cyane, Bamubamba ku Giti.
Yes' ashobor' imitima Y'abinangiye bose,
Uhereye mu Bulaya,Ukageza mw Afrika.
Nta mitima w' atabasha, Nubwo yaba nk'ibuye;
Nubw' irimw ibyaha byinshi Yos' arayishobora.
Reka nshim’ Umwami Yesu Kuko yankunze rwose :
Yarampinduye mb' umwana, Ngo tubane mw ijuru.
Reka nshim' Umwami Yesu Ko yamvanye mu byaha; None ho, mfit' amahoro
Arut' ay'isi cyane.
Mur'iyi si dutuyemo Yuzuy' uburiganya, Ntabwo yabasha guhaza Iby' imitim'
ishaka.
Kand' Umwuka wawe wera,Abamuhawe bose, Ni W' ujy' abazinukisha Kwifuz' i
by'isi byose,
Ujye wirukan’ ubwenge Bwa Satan' anzanira Bwo kuntandukanya nawe, Isoko
y'ubugingo.
Yemw' ababyawe n'lmana,Mujye muhirimbana, Mugere ku Musaraba, Mubone
kunesh' isi.
Yes' amaz’ imyaka myinshi Ajy'atwihanganira; Nimuze, dusig' ab'isi, Babone
kutwifuza.
Mwe kujya muvuga Yesu,Uwo mwumvany' a bandi; Mujye mumureb’ ubwanyu, Ari ku Musaraba.
Mwe kujya mukebaguza No gusubir' inyuma Mu byo mwahozemo
kera,Mudahemura Yesu !
Iteka Nagendaga Ndemerewe N’ibyaha Ntihagire Ikibasha Kumara Umubabaro
Ndashima Umusaraba Ndashima Ya Mva Nziza Ariko Cyane,Cyane Ndashima
Umwami Yesu
Kugeza Ubwo Nageze Ahantu Heza Cyane Hangiriye Umumaro Ntazibagirwa
Ukundi
Iri N’itangiriro Ry’umunezero Wanjye Aha Niho Umutwaro  Wamvuye Ku
Mugongo
Ku Musaraba Mwiza Niho Umuntu Abonera Abagabo Batatu Bakamuhumuriza
Ku Musaraba Mwiza Niho Umuntu Abonera Urwandiko Rw’ijuru Rutar’urw’itorero
Umugabo Nta Bwenge Yagiye Nta Rwandiko Agira Ngo Azinjira Nk’ukw’abandi
Binjira
Nukw’ageze Kw’irembo Bamubaza Urwandiko Rwa Katanga Ka Mbere Asanga
Atarufite
Mu Rubavu Rwa Yesu Havuyemo Amaraso Y’uruzi Rw’ubugingo Yoza Umutima
Wanjye

Gira Umwete Winjire Mu Maraso Ya Yesu Uzashiraho Inenge Mu Mutima
Wanduye
Kera narabatijwe Kandi  ndakomezwa, Ntari na'bon' amaraso Y'Umwana w'Imana.
Ko wampfiriye, Ndakwitur' iki?Ndaguh' uyu mutima N'ubugingo bwanjye !
Mwa bafit' ibyaha mwe, Nimuze, mukizwe : Yesu ni We bukiriro Bw'abantu
banduye.
Mwumv’ aho dukirizwa : Ni ku Musaraba. Utahagez' ashobewe Ntabw'
ababarirwa.
Mwami Yes' unyemere, Njy' ah' ur' uko nd' uku, Unyuhagiz' amaraso, Ayo
wamviriye.
Yesu, warampfiriye,Uwakugomeye; Nkuruwe n'uko wankunze; Ngusanze non' ubu.
Noneho, ndakwinginze, Nshyira mu maraso, Ay'igiciro wavuye ; Bizambuza kugwa.
Kand' iyo ngiye kugwa, Arankuyakuya; Maz' akanyigiza hafi Kukw ankunda cyane.
N'ubu ndacyabanguka Kuyob’ inzira ye; Nakwihana, nkamwisunga, Angaruramw
ubwo.

Uwiteka Rurema Na Yesu yabyaye N'Umwuka Wera bah wan ye, Nsingiz'
ubutatu.
Dukomeze gutambuka Kuko Satan’ arindira Kutubona tunanirwa Ngw atwicir' umumaro pe !
Mpisemo guhora nkizwa, Ngashingwa mu gakiza ke : Sinzava mu gakiza ke !
Bahungu, namwe bakobwa, Mukijijwe n'amaraso, Nimufash' abananiwe Bavuye ku Musaraba.
Bagabo, namwe bagore, Muze, dukizw' ibyo mu ngo, Kukw ibigusha birimo
Bitubuza kujy' imbere.
Umv' umuhanuz' Elisa, Uko yavuye Namani; Maz' amuh' ingemu nyinshi, Elis'
arabihakana.
Namani yarakijijwe, As him' Iman' ihoraho; Arerur’ a vug' aty' ati: I man' iba mw
Israyeli !
Va mu kibi cya Gehazi Wakurikiy' indamu mbi! Ni we wajyany' ibibembe Bya
Namani yakijijwe.
Abantu bose bo mw isi, A bagabo n'abagore, Bataz' ubuntu bwa Yesu, Tubah'
impumuro nziza.
Twitandukanye n'ab'isi, Ngo bitume bakanguka, Bave no mu butamenya,
Bumvir’Imana y'ukuri.

Namw' abakunda Siyoni, Murek' idin' ikayutse; Nta n'icyo yabamarira : Ikunda
gushimwa gusa.(Rwanda)
Urukundo rwa Yesu
Koko rwatugezeho,
Rudukura mu kaga
Ko gukund’ iby'iyi si.
Yes' arakiza : ( X 3) Ni we wankijije.
Mwemeye kw abakiza,
Mukabambanwa na We.
Yes' azabajyan' i We,
Mu bwiza budashira.
Abahaw’ Umwuka we,
Mugahinduka bashya,
Mujye mumunambaho,
Muzageze ku gupfa.
Ariko mbaburire,
Abajya bigumanya,
Mbese, muzageza he
Kutagir’ ibyishimo?
Reka kwihakirizwa :
Abo si bo bakiza !
Kandi ntibakwandika
Mu Gitabo cya Yesu !
Kwihana s' ubuhanga
Cyangwa guca mu bwenge,
Keretse kwanamiza
Yuk' ur' umunyabyaha.
Abakunda kwihana,
Mukareba Siyoni
Yo mw ijuru ry’Imana,
Mujye muhishimira!
(Rwanda)
Bene Data b'abirabura Murashak' iki se mw Afirika ?Turashak' Uwaducunguye: Ni We Yes' Umwana wa Dawidi.
Umukiza Yes' utubwira, Twamubona tumeze dute se ? N'uko mwasang'
Umucunguzi, Mukazinukw' ingeso zose mbi.
Mwami Yesu, dore, nditabye ! Ngirir' uko washaka nonaha.Umutima wanjy'
ucumura, Uwumaremw umwijima wose.
Si jye wanze : kera nifuje Kugukiza, maz' uriyangira.None reka nze, nkubohore :
Ni jy' urokor' abakiranirwa.

title: Dor' inzira nziz' ijya mw ijuru

lines: Dor' inzira nziz' ijya mw ijuru Ic' aho yabambwe ku Musaraba; Yayibwiy' umwambuz' umwe wihannye, Ashir'agahinda, arakizwa.
Tuzakizwa na nde tutizeye Umukiza wacu wadupfiriye ? Yagiz' agahinda
k'abarimbuka, Atang' ubugingo, ngw abakize.
Nimukizwe mwese kurimbuka, Mugir' ubugingo bw'abakijijwe, Mwizigir' Imana
yabacunguye, Muyiture byose kubwa Yesu.
Dor' uko mu Rwanda barimbuka ! Mubabwir' imana yac' ibakize, Tuzahanwe na bo kuba mw ijuru, Nta gahinda kose, nta kwicuza.
Wa Musaraba we, ndakwifuza ! Waneshej' urupfu rwic' ab'iyi si; Watsinz' i
kuzimu n'ibibabaza, Uduhindura kub' umunt' umwe !
Kera nar' umwangizi
Mu mutima rwihishwa.
Maze, mpura n'uw'Imana,
Anyigish' ibya Yesu,
Uk' umuntu yakizwa
Urubanza rw'ibyaha,
Akabyarw' ubwa kabiri
Kubw' urupfu rwa Yesu.
Ibyo maze kubyumva,
Ntsindwa n'urubanz' ubwo,
Meny’ ibyaha nagakoze
Kuv'aho navukiye.
Nsaba Yes' imbabazi,
Natur' ibyaha byanjye,
Nizer' urukund' ankunda;
Hanyum'arandokora.
Kuv' ubwo, njya nzinukwa
Iby'isi nakundaga,
Menya yuko bizashira.
Yes' ubw'azagaruka.
None, mfit' amahoro
N'ubugingo bw'iteka.
Yes' ampay'. Umwuka Wera;
Anesherez' iby'isi.
Ikimbabaza cyane,
Kikanter' agahinda,
N' ukureb' abari mw isi
Banze kwitaba Yesu.
Abakijijwe twese
Tubabarir' ab'isi,
Tubabwire n'Ubutumwa :
Ni wo murimo wacu.
Abakund' iby'isi—Ntabwo babihaga; Ba sogokuruza—Na bo ntibahaze.
Abanga kwihana—Muratubabaza. Ko tubaburira,—Mukizib' amatwi !
Ibi bibashuka,—Nta kizarokoka, Kerets' abihannye,—Yes' akabakiza
iyi s' izashira—N'ibirimo byose ; Inka n'imirima—N'intoke n'inzoga.
Nta kizasigara :—Bizab' umuyonga Ubw' is' izashira,—Muzasigara he ?
Twebw' abakijijwe—'Turanezerewe guca mur'iyi si,—Dufit' amahoro.
Mwami wacu Yesu,—Turagushimira Ko wadupfiriye,—Ntituzarimbuke.
Abo mur'iyi si—Izashira
Nta cyo mwibajije—Ku by'imperuka ?
Ntimwitegereje—Icyiza twabonye ?
None, mwisigara—Mu butamenya !
Dor' icyo twahawe—Cy'igiciro :
Twahaw' ubugingo—Butazashira.
Yesu ni We zuba—Ritwakira;
Rituma tureba :—Tumusingize !
Isi yo mw ijuru—
N' ihebuza. Turek' iby'iyi si,—Tuhagabane !
Ushak' ubugingo—Apfirw' ibye,
Nk'ushak' izahabu,—Ukw apfirw'ibye.
Yemw' abameze nka —Muka loti,
Mwikund' iby'iyi si—Izarimbuka !
Twebw' abakijijwe,—Dutambuke;
Ntitugakebuke,—Ngo duhomberwe !
Yemw' abasubir' iyo muva, I kuzimu kwa Nyamutezi, Mukarekur' Umusaraba, Ko muneshejwe ?
Yes' ubw' azagaruka, Aje kwim' ingoma ve, Tuzamurebesh' amas' as' ate,
Dufit' ibyaha?
Ubw' utihanira gukizwa, Ukaturir' abantu gusa,Ngo bakumenye k' ukijijwe,
Urushywa n'iki ?
Ubw' ur' umuntu w'umwigisha, Wigish' abant' iby'Uwiteka, Ntubageze ku
Musaraba, Wigish' iki se ?
Ubw' ur' umunyangeso nziza, Ushyitsa byose by'Itorero, Ntusohore ku
Musaraba, Wizey' iki se ?
Ubw' ur' umunyabwenge bwinshi, Byos' uzi no kubigenzura,K' uyobew'
iby'Umusaraba, Bikuvuy' iki ?
Ubw' ur' umunyesoni nyinshi, Utinya kwihana ng' ukizwe, Wibwira kw ar'
uguhemuka, Uzageza he ?
Ngik' icyambu cy'amaraso ye, Wirohemo, wa mutindi we. Hi kub' agace
wasigaza Katuhagiwe.
Abo mur'iyi si mbi Bifuza kwinezeza, Kand' iteka bifuza Icyubahiro.
Twebwehw abakijijwe Tubaburire
Bishwe n'Umurimbuzi, Abagir' imbata ze, Yanga ko bameny' uko Yes' abatura.
Igomwa rya Satani, Ajya yoshy' abantu be Abahemukir' atyo, Akabata pe.
Naho bamutakira, Ntabwo yabarengera; No ku munsi w'imanza Ntazabafasha !
Ajy'ashuk' abant' atyo, Ngw abate mu muriro, Ngw atebon' iryo shyano,Ari
wenyine.
Mana, turakwinginze, Ubahumur' amaso, Ngo bahung' umuriro, Bagutakire !
Wa Mukiza wacu we, Umva, turakwinginga : Ngwin' utwigishe neza Kubaburira.
Nuko, turabinginze, Uk' Umwuka w'Imana Abategetse kose,
Muze mwes' abakijijwe, Abazinutsw' iby' isi; Nimwikorer' umusaraba : Ni w' ubaneshereza.
Umusaraba ni wo bendera Yacu tw' abakijijwe!Twemeye n'isoni zawo : Ni w'
utuneshereza.
Umusaraba w'isoni N' irembo rifunganye. Uduhata kwiyambura Ibituremerera.
Nuko twiyambure byose.Tumere nka ya mpurnyi, Uko  itanze gut' umwenda,Ngw isang' Umwami Yesu.
Twajyaga dutiny' urupfu :Yes' arugir' irembo Ritugeza vuba cyane Mu bwami
bwo mw ijuru.
Ibikangisho by'Umwanzi N' iby'intar' iziriiswe : Ni tudat' inzira yacu, Ntabw'
azadushyikira.
Uzura n'lmana vuba Kubw' urupfu rwa Yesu : Amaraso y'Umusaraba Ni y'
atwuzuza na Yo.
Ubwo nagendaga ndemerewe, Sinari nz' ubw' icyo ntekereza. None ubu, maze kwihitiramo : Mpisemw Umucunguzi.
Tekereza, nimutekereze ! Mbes' iryo jamho muryitayeho ? Mwibaze, muhitemo.
Mbeg' urukundo rw'Umwami Yesu ! Aradukunda tudakwiriye. Ubu ngub'
arabahamagara : None, nimuhitemo !
Ntangajwe cyane n'imbabazi ze : Ni zo zatumy' anyitangirira; Kandi ngiheze mu
mwijim' ubwo, Mvanwamo n'umucyo we.
Emera nawe kwihitiramo ! Imur' umwanz' uguhemukira : Wimik' ahubw' Umukiza
wawe ! Nta wakez' abo bombi.
Mp' amavuta, Yesu, mbone kwaka ! Mp' amavuta, ndakwinginze ! Mp' amavuta, Yesu, mbone kwaka ! Mbone kwaka, burinde bucya !
Turirimbe, turirimbe, Ngo Hozana : tugusingize Wowe, Mwam' utwar' abami:
Yesu, tugusingize
Mp' amahoro. Mukiza, nduhuke :Mp' amahoro. ndakwinginze ! Mp' amahoro,
Mukiza, nduhuke : Mp' amahoro, burinde bucya !
Mp' umunezero, Yesu, ngushime : Mp' igikombe giseseka ! Mp' umunezero, Yesu, ngushime : Njye ngushima, burinde bucya !
Mpa kumenek' iteka, Mukiza :Nkomeza ku Musaraba ! Mpa kumenek' iteka,
Mukiza : Ujy' umena, burinde bucya !
Mpa guhora nkwihangir' amaso :Uk' unyigisha nkwemere ! Mpa guhora nkwihangir'amaso : Nkwigireho, burinde bucya !
